RLE1115
Offset Bit Access INI Symbol Description Efuse Map ANAPAR
18600000h R_BE_SYS_ISO_CTRL
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_PWC_EV2EF_B Power Cut for OTP VDD 0.8V and VDD2 1.8V, 1: Power valid; 0: Power invalid.
[15]: For Big Power cut control,		 no autoload
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_PWC_EV2EF_S Power Cut for OTP VDD 0.8V and VDD2 1.8V, 1: Power valid; 0: Power invalid.
[14] for Small Power cut control		 no autoload
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_PA33V_EN Enable PCIE PHY analog 3.3V power cut, 1: Power valdi, 0: Power invalid no autoload
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_PA12V_EN Enable PCIE PHY analog 1.2V power cut, 1: Power valdi, 0: Power invalid no autoload
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_UA33V_EN Enable USB PHY analog 3.3V power cut, 1: Power valdi, 0: Power invalid no autoload
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_UA12V_EN Enable USB PHY analog 1.2V power cut, 1: Power valdi, 0: Power invalid no autoload
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_RFDIO RF Digital I/O to Power On, 1: isolation; 0: attach (no used) no autoload
[8] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_EB2CORE OTP cell output to Power On, 1: isolation; 0: attach no autoload
[7] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_DIOE Extra Digital I/O to Power On, 1: isolation; 0: attach (no used) no autoload
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_WLPON2PP WL PON to Power On, 1: isolation; 0: attach no autoload
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_IP2MAC_WA2PP Analog IPs to Digital 1.2V, 1: isolation; 0: attach
Isolate signal from WLAN AFE, 1: isolation, 0: attach		 no autoload
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_PD2CORE PCIe Digital 1.2V to Power On/Core 1.2V, 1: isolation; 0: attach (no used) no autoload
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_PA2PCIE PCIe Analog 1.2V to Digital 1.2V, 1: isolation; 0: attach
(PCIe Analog 1.2V and 3.3V are almost turned on at the same time)		 no autoload
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_UD2CORE USB Digital 1.2V to Power On/Core 1.2V, 1: isolation; 0: attach no autoload
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_UA2USB USB Analog 1.2V to Digital 1.2V, 1: isolation; 0: attach
(USB Analog 1.2V and 3.3V are almost turned on at the same time)		 no autoload
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_WD2PP MACTOP/BB Digital to Power On, 1: isolation; 0: attach no autoload
18600002h R_BE_SYS_FUNC_EN
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_MREGEN MAC I/O Registers Enable No autoload
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_FEN_HWPDN 0 : force All analog blocks shutdown, 1 : keep Analog Blocks alive No autoload
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_ELDR Enable EEPROM Loader (Loader POR) No autoload
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_DCORE Enable Core Digital (MACTOP POR) No autoload
[10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_FEN_DIOE Extra Debug I/O PAD Enable No autoload
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_PCIED Enable PCIe eMAC No autoload
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_PPLL Enable PCIe PHY_PLL No autoload
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_PCIEA Enable PCIe PHY No autoload
[5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_USBD Enable USB_SIE No autoload
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_UPLL Enable USB PHY_PLL No autoload
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_USBA Enable USB PHY No autoload
[1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
18600004h R_BE_SYS_PW_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_SOP_ASWRM Suspend option for analog SWR operates in PWM mode.
1: PWM mode, 0: PFM mode
[30] R/W 1 B_BE_SOP_EASWR Suspend option for analog SWR operation
1. SWR enable, 0: SWR disable
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_SOP_PWMM_DSWR Suspend option for D-SWR operates in PWM mode.
1: PWM mode, 0: PFM mode
[28] R/W 1 B_BE_SOP_EDSWR Suspend option for D-SWR operation
1. SWR enable, 0: SWR disable
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_SOP_ACKF Suspend option to switch analog Clock Mode to 12Mhz (Host could suspend by gating, Power Modes by FSM).
1: keep 12M (Fast Clock), 0: 500K(Slow Clock)
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_SOP_ERCK Suspend option to enable SYMON register clock (12M/500KHz) (USB could suspend by gating, Power Modes by FSM)
1: clock on, 0: clock off
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_SOP_ANA_CLK_Division_2 1 : suspend option ANA_CLK 除 2
0 : suspend option ANA_CLK
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_SOP_EXTL Suspend option not to turn off XTAL
1: Enable XTAL, 0: Disable XTAL
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_SOP_OFF_CAPC_EN Suspend option for Enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN as PCIE assert L1.OFF/L2 in PCIE suspend state
(for SUS 要不要關APHY power cut)
0 : disable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
1 : enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_XTAL_OFF_A_DIE A-Die跟著Xtal開關
0: Disable , 1: Enable
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_ROP_SWPR Resume option to skip wait Power Ready.
1: power up no delay, 0: wait power stable
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_HW_LPLDM DIS_HW_LPLDM: Disable HW automatically change LPLDO to normal/sleep mode for power saving (B-CUT ECO)
0: Enable, 1: Disable
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_HW_LPURLDO DIS_HW_ULDO: Disable HW automatically change UART_LDO to normal/sleep mode for power saving
0: Enable, 1: Disable
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_WLBT_PDNSUSEN_SOPC Disable WLBT PDNSUSEN SOPC
為了避免sympmc在跑LPS or SUS的時候
因LPS/SUS的condition過短, 造成選擇LPS/SUS option時誤動作的問題
[17] RO 0 B_BE_RDY_SYSPWR Power ready from LPS, ROF, suspend mode. Valid in normal version.
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_WLON Enable WLON circuit reset. Before enable APFM_ONMAC, driver shall release this bit first. No autoload
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_APDM_HPDN Enable WLAN Power Down operation
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_PSUS_OFF_CAPC_EN Enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN as PCIE assert L1.OFF/L2
( for 單純side-band控制APHY power cut )
0 : disable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
1 : enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_AFSM_PCIE_SUS_EN When this bit is set, PCIE suspends via HW FSM control flow.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_AFSM_WLSUS_EN 1: Host Suspend through FSM operation; 0: Host Suspend by gated
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_APFM_SWLPS Auto Power On State Machine to enter SW LPS mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_APFM_OFFMAC Auto FSM to Turn On, include clock, isolation, power control for MAC only (auto set by ICFG, and clear when Power Ready)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_APFN_ONMAC Auto FSM to Turn On, include clock, isolation, power control for MAC only (auto set by ICFG, and clear when Power Ready)
[7] R/W 1 B_BE_CHIP_PDN_EN Chip powen down enable
0: disable
1: enable
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_RDY_MACDIS Disable MAC power Ready Output for Test Mode
[5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_SW_AFE_MODE Trigger HW State machine to switch AFE mode. The mode is dependent on BIT_AFE_BCN.
It switches to beacon mode if BIT_AFE_BCN =1.
It switches to normal mode if BIT_AFE_BCN = 0.
1: Switch AFE mode, HW clear to zero when finished.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PFM_WOWL Wake On Lan indicator for H/W FSM
[2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] RO 0 B_BE_WL_HCI_ALD Inform WLAN HCI Region load done
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_EFUSE_LDALL 1: SW enable HWSM to autoload all
0: SW enable HWSM to autoload excluding Efuse 0x00~60h
18600008h R_BE_SYS_CLK_CTRL
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_CPU_IDMEM_CLK_EN MCU IDMEM Clock Enable, 1: Enable, 0: Disable
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_CPU_CLK_EN MCU Clock Enable, 1: Enable, 0: Disable
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_SYMR_BE_CLK_EN System on register clock enable, 1: Enable, 0: Disable No autoload
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_MAC_CLK_EN MAC_CLK_EN MAC Clock Enable, 1: Enable, 0 : Disable
[10:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_EXT_32K_EN Enable extern 32K clock
0: disable (internal 32K clock, but the real clock should be set in reg0x5d0[2])
1: enable (external 32K clock, but the real clock should be set in reg0x5d0[2])
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_CLK_TEST WL clock test mode control
[6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_LOADER_CLK_EN Loader Clock Enable No autoload
[4:2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_ANA_CLK_Division_2 1 : select ANA_CLK 除 2
0 : select ANA_CLK		 No autoload
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_CNTD16V_EN CNTD16V_EN Analog Clock source Divide 16 Mode for Hardware Timer No autoload
1860000Ah R_BE_SYS_WL_EFUSE_CTRL
[15] R 0 B_BE_OTP_B_PWC_RPT OTP Big Power Cut OR Result:
WLAN OTP Power Cut 0x00[15] and BT OTP Power cut BT reg OR result		 No autoload
[14] R 0 B_BE_OTP_S_PWC_RPT OTP Small Power Cut OR Result:
WLAN OTP Power Cut 0x00[14] and BT OTP Power cut BT reg OR result		 No autoload
[13] R 0 B_BE_OTP_ISO_RPT OTP ISO AND Result:
WLAN OTP ISO 0x00[8] and BT OTP Power cut BT reg AND result		 No autoload
[12] R 0 B_BE_OTP_Burst_RPT WLBT OTP Burst OR Result:
WLAN OTP Burst mode control 0xA4[19] and BT Burst mode control OR result		 No autoload
[11] R 0 B_BE_OTP_AutoLoad_RPT WL OTP Autoload Report:
1: at Autoload process
0: Autoload Finished
control by Loader		 No autoload
[10:7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[6] R 0 B_BE_AUTOLOAD_DIS_A_DIE Disable Autoload from WL eFuse (A-die) (GPIO5)
1 : Disable
0 : Enable		 No autoload
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_AUTOLOAD_SUS 解鎖 0x1C[3] = 0 can write this bit
1: Autoload successful
0: Autoload fail		 No autoload
[4] R 0 B_BE_AUTOLOAD_DIS Disable Autoload from WL OTP (D-die) (EESK)
1 : Disable
0 : Enable		 No autoload
[3:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
1860000Ch R_BE_SYS_PAGE_CLK_GATED
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REGF_GATE Disable AON PageF register clock gated enable.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REGE_GATE Disable AON PageE register clock gated enable.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REGD_GATE Disable AON PageD register clock gated enable.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REGC_GATE Disable AON PageC register clock gated enable.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REGB_GATE Disable AON PageB register clock gated enable.
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REGA_GATE Disable AON PageA register clock gated enable.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG9_GATE Disable AON Page9 register clock gated enable.
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG8_GATE Disable AON Page8 register clock gated enable.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG7_GATE Disable AON Page7 register clock gated enable.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG6_GATE Disable AON Page6 register clock gated enable.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG5_GATE Disable AON Page5 register clock gated enable.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG4_GATE Disable AON Page4 register clock gated enable.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG3_GATE Disable AON Page3 register clock gated enable.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG2_GATE Disable AON Page2 register clock gated enable.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG1_GATE Disable AON Page1 register clock gated enable.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CLK_REG0_GATE Disable AON Page0 register clock gated enable.
18600010h R_BE_SYS_SWR_CTRL1
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_CTRL_SPSANA_PWMFREQ 1'b1: Control SWR PWM/PFM by register 0x220[6](SWRANA)
1'b1: Control SWR reg_mos_half_L by 0x224[1]
1'b0: SWR PWM/PFM control by WiFi/BT HW
1'b0: Control SWR reg_mos_half_L by WiFi/BT HW
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_CTRL_SPS_PWMFREQ 1'b1: Control SWR PWM/PFM by register 0x200[6] (SPSLDO),0x220[6](SWRANA)
1'b1: Control SWR reg_mos_half_L by 0x0204[1]/0x0224[1]
1'b0: SWR PWM/PFM control by WiFi/BT HW
1'b0: Control SWR reg_mos_half_L by WiFi/BT HW
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_HW_AUTO_CTRL_EXT_SWR 當使用external SWR提供1.3V, interanl SWR提供1.05V時,透過GPIO6去關掉extenal SWR when set LPS option[28] :
1 : always turn on external SWR
0 : HW auto control external SWR
LPS option[28]會把interna SWR and external SWR都關掉(internal SWR關掉時還會有小LDO開啟),但是external SWR有提供1.3V給PHY,所以不能關掉,所以需要再設這個bit強制開啟external SWR以免掉卡, FW需要根據是否有外掛SWR來控制這個bit
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_use_internal_SWR_and_LDO 當完全不需要使用internal SWR的時候可以關掉 : (之前華為有這個使用case, 當1.3V和1.05V都外掛時,可以從efuse關掉internal SWR和LDO)
(外掛兩顆SWR提供1.3V和1.05V)
1 : disable internal SWR and LDO, use external SWR and LDO
0 : use internal SWR and LDO
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_MAC_ID_EN Reserved for RF_ID selection to be MAC
[6:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_OPTION_DIS_XTAL_BG Use in PCIe only :
1 : check reg 0x90[31] value to decide XTAL_BG is disable or not
0 : reg 0x90[31] for PCIe is reserved
[1:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600014h R_BE_ANAPARSW_POW_MAC
[7:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_pow_ldo15 Power on LDO (3.3->1.3) No autoload ANAPARSW_POW_MAC[2]
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_pow_sw_spsana Power on analog switching regulator (3.3->1.3) No autoload ANAPARSW_POW_MAC[1]
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_pow_ldo14_SPSANA Power on SPSANA LDOS (3.3->1.0) ANAPARSW_POW_MAC[0]
18600015h R_BE_ANAPARLDO_POW_MAC
[7] RO 0 B_BE_PWC_EV2EF_B_v1 Power Cut for OTP VDD 0.8V and VDD2 1.8V, 1: Power valid; 0: Power invalid.
[7]: WLAN Big Power cut control Result
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PWC_EV2EF_S_v1 Power Cut for OTP VDD 0.8V and VDD2 1.8V, 1: Power valid; 0: Power invalid.
[6] WLAN Small Power cut control Result
[5] RO 0 B_BE_r_PD12_N_LDO HW的一個 PDN condition會觸發REGU幫忙轉
[4:2] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_pow_sw_spsdig Power on Digital switching regulator (3.3->1.05) No autoload ANAPARLDO_POW_MAC[1]
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_pow_ldo14_SPSDIG Power on Digital SPS LDOS (3.3->1.0) ANAPARLDO_POW_MAC[0]
18600016h R_BE_ANAPAR_POW_MAC
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_LDO_P2P3 1:for port2/port3 clock LDO enable ANAPAR_POW_MAC[7]
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_BG_P2P3 Enable BG (D die AFE BG P2P3) ANAPAR_POW_MAC[6]
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_PC LDO_PORT3 1 for port3 PC /LDO enable ANAPAR_POW_MAC[5]
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_PC LDO_PORT2 1 for port2 PC /LDO enable ANAPAR_POW_MAC[4]
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_PC LDO_PORT1 1 for port1 PC /LDO enable ANAPAR_POW_MAC[3]
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_PC LDO_PORT0 1 for port0 PC/ LDO enable ANAPAR_POW_MAC[2]
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_PLL_V1 1 for PLL enable ANAPAR_POW_MAC[1]
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_POWER_CUT_POW_LDO 1 for POWER_CUT & AFE_PLL_LDO enable ANAPAR_POW_MAC[0]
18600017h R_BE_ANAPAR_POW_XTAL
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_XTAL POW_XBUF_LDO :
0 to 1 Enable XBUF LDO
(control by POW_XTAL)		 No autoload ANAPAR_POW_XTAL[1]
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_POW_BG Enable BG (D die AFE BG P0P1) No autoload ANAPAR_POW_XTAL[0]
18600018h R_BE_SYS_ADIE_PAD_PWR_CTRL
[15:7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_PADPDN_WL_RFC1_1P3 1:WL RFC1 PAD enable ; 0:WL RFC1 PAD power down
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_PADPDN_WL_RFC0_1P3 1:WL RFC0 PAD enable ; 0:WL RFC0 PAD power down
[4:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
1860001Ah R_BE_AFE_LDO_VPULSE_CTRL
[15:10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_VPULSE_LDO_XBUF 1:enable VPULSE for AFE XTAL buffer LDO, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_VPULSE_LDO_PLL_P2P3 1:enable VPULSE for AFE P2P3 PLL LDO , 0: Disable
[6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_VPULSE_LDO_S3_ADDA 1:enable VPULSE for AFE ADDA S3 LDO, 0: Disable
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_VPULSE_LDO_S2_ADDA 1:enable VPULSE for AFE ADDA S2 LDO, 0: Disable
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_VPULSE_LDO_S1_ADDA 1:enable VPULSE for AFE ADDA S1 LDO, 0: Disable
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_VPULSE_LDO_S0_ADDA 1:enable VPULSE for AFE ADDA S0 LDO, 0: Disable
[1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_VPULSE_LDO_PLL 1:enable VPULSE for AFE PLL LDO, 0: Disable
1860001Ch R_BE_RSV_CTRL
[23:12] RO 0000 B_BE_HR_BE_DBG HREG Access Debug information
[11:10] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_R_SYM_DIS_PCIE_FLR 擋住PCIE FLR Reset
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_R_EN_HRST_PWRON Enable (PCIE PERST , USB SE0RST) reset power on.
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
Write Locked by 0xCC[2]
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_LOCK_ALL_EN 1:Enable ‘Locked All’ setting by Hardware, 0: Hardware Enable ‘Locked All’ denied.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_R_DIS_PRST Enable SW_RST (PCIE PERST, USB SE0RST) can reset WL_CORE :
(1) Set PCIE PERST and USB SE0RST CAN reset WL_CORE :
Step 1 : Write reg0x1C[5] = 1'b1
Step 2 : Write reg0x1C[6] = 1'b0
Step 3 : Write reg0x1C[5] = 1'b0

(2) Set Set PCIE PERST and USB SE0RST CANNOT reset WL_CORE :
Step1 : Write reg0x1C[5] = 1'b1
Step2 : Write reg0x1C[6] = 1'b1
Step3 : Write reg0x1C[5] = 1'b0
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_WLOCK_1C_BIT6 0x1C[6] Register Write Locked disable . The control sequence reference 0x1C[6] description.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_WLOCK_40 1:Register Write Locked, 0: Register Accessible by SW/FW (offset:0x0040h~0x0043h)
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_WLOCK_08 1:Register Write Locked, 0: Register Accessible by SW/FW (offset:0x0008h~0x000Bh)
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_WLOCK_04 1:Register Write Locked, 0: Register Accessible by SW/FW (offset:0x0004h~0x0007h)
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_WLOCK_00 1:Register Write Locked, 0: Register Accessible by SW/FW (offset:0x0000h~0x0003h)
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_WLOCK_ALL 1:Register Write Locked, 0: Register Accessible by SW/FW (offset:0x0000h~0x00FFh)

18600028h R_BE_SYS_OCP_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_SPS_OCP_DIS SPS OCP for system mechanism to shutdown chip ( OCP counter , threshold , window )
0: enable sps ocp
1: disable sps ocp
Default: 0
[30:16] R/W 0040 B_BE_SPS_OCP_TH Sps ocp threshold,
If ocp occurs more than ocp_th_cfg_sps times in the ocp monitor window, shut down sps
[15:0] R/W 0100 B_BE_OCP_WINDOW Ocp monitor window width configure, count on ana_clk/16
1860002Ch R_BE_SYSANA_OCP_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_SPSANA_OCP_DIS SPSANA OCP for system mechanism to shutdown chip ( OCP counter , threshold , window )
0: enable spsana ocp
1: disable spsana ocp
Default: 0
[30:16] R/W 0040 B_BE_SPSANA_OCP_TH Spsana ocp threshold,
If ocp occurs more than ocp_th_cfg_spsana times in the ocp monitor window, shut down spsana
[15:0] R/W 0100 B_BE_OCPANA_WINDOW Ocp monitor window width configure, count on ana_clk/16
18600030h R_BE_EFUSE_CTRL
[31:30] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_MODE_SEL Efuse controller Mode selection
2’b00 : Read
2’b10 : Write
2’b01 : Autoload Enable
2’b11 : Compare Secure Data Enable
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_RDY Ready bit
Note : HW set , SW clear
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_COMP_RESULT compare result
1 : PASS
0 : FAIL
Note : HW set , SW clear
[27:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_ADDR Access Address
need 4 Byte Alignment (ex: 0,4,…..)
18600034h R_BE_EFUSE_CTRL_1_V1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_DATA Access Data
access data is need 4 byte alignment
[31:0] : Read / Write
[31:0] : Compare
18600038h R_BE_EFUSE_TEST_V1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_SCAN_SADR Scan start Address (unit in byte)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_SCAN_EADR EFuse Scan End address
1860003Ch R_BE_EFUSE_TEST_1_V1
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_CRES_SEL 1: for debug , 0: for normal
[30:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_SCAN_TRPT Test Scan Report: 1 : Fail, 0 : OK
[6:0] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_SCAN_FTHR Threshold number of bit error
若[6:0] = 7’h1,
則scan check的時候若有任何一個cell bit不是1’b1 (default), 就會判定為fail
依此類推, 7’h2, 表示允許有一個cell bit fail….
18600040h R_BE_GPIO_MUXCFG
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_WCPU_JTAG_EN WLAN CPU JTAG Enable Control
0 : WLAN CPU JTAG disabled
1 : WLAN CPU JTAG enabled
[23] R/W 1 B_BE_WCPU_DBG_EN WLAN CPU Debug Enable Control
0 : WLAN CPU debug disabled
1 : WLAN CPU debug enabled
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_DCPU_JTAG_EN DATA CPU JTAG Enable Control
0 : DATA CPU JTAG disabled
1 : DATA CPU JTAG enabled
[21] R/W 1 B_BE_DCPU_DBG_EN DATA CPU Debug Enable Control
0 : Data cpu debug disabled
1 : Data cpu debug enabled
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_JTAG_CHAIN_EN JTAG CHAIN Enable Control
0 : JTAG chain disabled
1 : JTAG chain enabled
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_BOOT_MODE CPU boot from flash. autoload by efuse.
0: FW from driver (boot from IMEM)
1: FW from Flash (including MP and usb auto install) [boot from Flash]
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_EECS_EXT_32K_SEL 1: Disable
0: select EECS as external 32K clock source.
[17] RO 0 B_BE_WL_SEC_BONDING_OPT_STS WLAN Security bonding option status ( Default : down bond )
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_SECSIC_SEL CR_SIC_SEL for selecting WLCPU or SIC_OFF (default select WLCPU)
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_EnHTP 0 : Enable SIC as Host Debug Port (from MCU path, default)
1 : Enable SIC as Host Test Port (from HCI path, auto set by ICFG)
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_EnSIC Enable GPIO Pins as SIC, (auto set by ICFG)
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_SIC_SWRST 0 : Reset SIC by SW, prevent SIC Dead Lock,
(auto release by specific ICFG SIC mode)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_PINMUX_PTA_EN PINMUX PTA function enabled
0 : Disabled (Default)
1 : Enabled
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_BT_PTA_SEC WL_PTA and BT_PTA Selection
0 : WL_PTA
1 : BT_PTA
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_EnUartTX Enable GPIO[7] Pins as UART TX
[7:6] R/W 0 B_BE_BTMode Bluetooth COEX Mode
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_EnBT Enable PTA
[4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_EnUartRX Enable GPIO[6] Pins as UART RX
[1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600044h R_BE_GPIO_PIN_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_MOD_7_TO_0 When the specific bit is set to zero, the corresponding GPIO port is configured to data port; otherwise, when a specific bit is set to “1”, and GPIO_IO_SEL is set to “0”, then it is interrupt mode.
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_IO_SEL_7_TO_0 GPIO pins output enable when a bit is set to “1”; otherwise, input is configured.
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_OUT_7_TO_0 GPIO pins output value
[7:0] RO 0 B_BE_GPIO_IN_7_TO_0 GPIO pins input value

[15] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIOF_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIOE_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIOD_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIOC_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIOB_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIOA_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO9_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO8_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO7_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO6_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.

[3] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO3_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO2_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO1_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO0_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
1860004Ch R_BE_LED_CFG
[31] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[30] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_XTALCLK_O_EN 1 : XTAL Clock output enable
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_MAILBOX_3Wire_GPIO_CFG 1 : enable GPIO mux switch to MAILBOX mode
GPIO5 : I2C_INT
GPIO9 : I2C_SD
GPIO11 : I2C_CLK
[27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W 1 B_BE_LED2_EN 1: Disable
0: WL GPIO control ( LED2 enable )
[21] R/W 1 B_BE_LED2DIS GPIO-8 as LED2
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_LED2PL LED2 polarity control
0: Normal Polarity definition for LED2SV, LED2CM;
1: Inverse the Polarity definition for LED2CM. Default: 0h.
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_LED2SV LED2 software value.
Default: 0h.
[18:16] R/W 010 B_BE_LED2CM LED2 Control Mode
000: Software control (this mode can handle LED on, LED off, and LED twinkle [we assume there are ms-level delays between each twinkle, and this includes the twinkle BAR cases])
001: Always off (LED pin drives high)
010: Tx or Rx event (LED on = active, so LED pin drives low). Rx active only physical address match, and should be used only when adapter is linked.
011: Tx or Rx event (LED off = active, so LED pin drives high). Rx active only physical address match, and should be used only when adapter is linked.
100: Tx event only (LED on = active)
101: Tx event only (LED off = active)
110: Rx event only (LED on = active)
111: Rx event only (LED off = active)
Default: 010b
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:13] RO 00 B_BE_LED0LED1_RD_ONLY LED0 and LED1 Read Only
[12:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600050h R_BE_PWR_OPTION_CTRL
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_LPS_WT_PDNSUS
[23:20] R/W 7 B_BE_WLBBPONLPC_DT Delta time between BB S PC and PON L PC. Unit: 8us.

[15:12] R/W 7 B_BE_WLPONSMACPC_DT Delta time between PON S PC and MAC S PC. Unit: 8us.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_SYSON_DBG_PAD_E2 DBGTST[31:0] IOPAD output driving
0 : 4mA , 1 : 8mA

[9] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_PAD_E2 GMAC PAD
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_SYSON_PCI_PAD_E2 PCIE IOPAD output driving
0: 4mA, 1: 8mA
UART IOPAD output driving
0: 8mA, 1: 16mA

00: x1
01: x2
10: x3
11: x4
[5:4] R/W 0 B_BE_SYSON_SPS0WWV_WT Waiting Time for SPS
[3:2] R/W 0 B_BE_SYSON_SPS0LDO_WT Waiting Time for SPS_LDO
2’b00 = 104us,
2’b01 = 56us
2’b10 = 256us
2’b11 = 512us

18600058h R_BE_DBG_CTRL
[31:30] R/W 0 B_BE_DBG_SEL1_4BIT gpio_out[15:12]:gpio_out[7:4] sel, share with dbg_pad[15:8]
00: dbg_port[23:16]
01: dbg_port[27:20]
10: dbg_port[31:24]
11: dbg_port[19:16][31:28]
[29:28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_DBG_SEL1_16BIT 0: reg_dbg_port[31:16] = dbg_sel1[31:16]
1: reg_dbg_port[31:16] = dbg_sel1[15:0]
[26:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_DBG_SEL1 DBG port selection1
[15:14] R/W 0 B_BE_DBG_SEL0_4BIT gpio_out[11:8]:gpio_out[3:0] sel, share with dbg_pad[7:0]
00: dbg_port[7:0]
01: dbg_port[11:4]
10: dbg_port[15:8]
11: dbg_port[3:0][15:12]
[13:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_DBG_SEL0_16BIT 0: reg_dbg_port[15:0] = dbg_sel0[15:0]
1: reg_dbg_port[15:0] = dbg_sel0[31:16]
[10:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DBG_SEL0 DBG port selection0

[31:24] R/W F B_BE_WLBBPC1_WT waiting time for WLBB big power cut (8us/unit)

[7:4] R/W F B_BE_WLPONPC1_WT waiting time for WLPON big power cut (8us/unit)
[3:0] R/W F B_BE_WLPONPC0_WT waiting time for WLPON small power cut (8us/unit)
18600060h R_BE_GPIO_EXT_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_MOD_15_TO_8 GPIO[15:8] function mode selection. When the specific bit is set to zero, the
corresponding GPIO port is configured to data port; otherwise, when a specific
bit is set to “1”, and GPIO_IO_SEL is set to “0”, then it is interrupt mode.
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_IO_SEL_15_TO_8 GPIO[15:8] pins output enable when a bit is set to “1”; otherwise, input is configured.
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_OUT_15_TO_8 GPIO[15:8] pins output value

[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_BTGP_UART0_SEL BTGP BQB function enable
[26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_BTGP_JTAG_EN RSVD
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_XTAL_CLK_EXTARNAL_EN Need external XTAL clock
0: Internal XTAL clock
1: External XTAL clock
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_BTGP_UART0_EN Enable BT UART0 function
[21] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_BTGP_SPI_EN Enable BT SFLASH function at GPIO[7:4], EECS and EESK
[19] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_BTGPDBG_EN BT Group Debug function enable
1 : enable
0 : disable
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_BTGP_I2C_EN BT Group I2C function enable
1 : enable
0 : disable
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_GPIO IE_V18 set GPIOs PAD input voltage threhsold to decision high or low
1 : 1.8V
0 : 3.3V
若要改值需要寫0xCC[2]=1先解鎖
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_PCIE IE_V18 set PCIe PAD (WAKEn/PERSTn/CLKREQn) input voltage threhsold to decision high or low
1 : 1.8V
0 : 3.3V
若要改值需要寫0xCC[2]=1先解鎖
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_UART IE_V18 set UART PAD input voltage threhsold to decision high or low
1 : 1.8V
0 : 3.3V
若要改值需要寫0xCC[2]=1先解鎖
18600068h R_BE_WL_BT_PWR_CTRL
[31] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_BD2PP BT Digital to Power on. 1: Isolation, 0: attach
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_LDOV12B_EN Enable LDOV12B Macro block (For BT Power Cut)
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_CKEN_BT Enable BT PON clock enable No autoload
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_BT Enable BT function No autoload
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_BTCPU_BOOTSEL Enable BT CPU BOOT From SPI
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_SPI_SPEEDUP Not used Currently
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_LDO_Mode BT_PLL_LDO_Mode
0: LDO mode
1: power cut mode
[24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_CLKREQ_PAD_TYPE_SEL PAD Type control select for GPIO15 (CLKREQ) in USB or SDIO interface:
0: Push-Pull
1: Open-Drain
[22] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_BTPON2PP BT PON to Power On, 1: isolation; 0: attach
[21:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BT_FUNC_EN BT function enable
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_HWPDN_SL BT HW PDn polarity control, 0: Low active, 1: High active
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_DISN_EN Enable GPIO[11] as BT HW PDn source
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 1 RSVD RSVD
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_EXTERNAL_REQUEST_PL When system request the clock of platform, it need to pull high/low GPIO 15.
Request GPIO polarity:
0: low active
1: high active
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_SDM_SRC_SEL SDM input source select.
0:XTAL.
1:OSC.
[11] R/W 1 B_BE_ISO_BA2PP Isolate signal from BT Top, 1: isolation, 0: attach
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_AFE_LDO_EN BT AFE LDO
0: disable
1; enable
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_AFE_PLL_EN BT AFE PLL
0: disable
1; enable
[8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_WLAN_32K_SEL WLAN 32K_SEL (WL_ON)
0 : XTAL 32K (default)
1 : OSC 32K
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_DRV_EXIST_IDX WLAN driver exist index or not
1 : Exist
0 : Not exist
0x68[5] =1 一定要設才能使用LPS option降壓
=> 表示 WiFi Driver 在, 主控權切給 WiFi
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_DOP_EHPAD DOP_EHPAD: disable SDIO/UART iopad shutdown in SDIO-UART power down mode (B-
(PICE 3 pin)
0:enable
1:disable
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_WL_FUNC_EN WLAN function enable
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_HWPDN_SL WLAN HW PDn polarity control, 0: Low active, 1: High active
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_HWPDN_EN Enable GPIO[9] as WLAN HW PDn source
1860006Ch R_BE_SDM_DEBUG
[31:14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13:12] R/W 0 B_BE_DCPU_CLK_SEL DATACPU clock sel
x0 : CLK divide by 1
x1 : CLK divide by 2
[11:10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[9:8] R/W 0 B_BE_WLCPU_CLK_SEL WLCPU clock sel
x0 : CLK divide by 1
x1 : CLK divide by 2
[7:5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_CMAC_CLK_SEL Select DMAC_CLK : CMAC_CLK select 1:1 or 2:1
0 : 1:1
1: 2:1
[3:2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[1:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DMAC_CLK_SEL DMAC clock sel
00 : CLK divide by 1
01 : CLK divide by 2
10 : CLK divide by 4
11 : CLK divide by 4
18600070h R_BE_SYS_SDIO_CTRL
[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29] R/W 1 RSVD RSVD
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_MCM_FLASH_EN MCM Flash enable
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26] RO 0 B_BE_PCIE_SEC_LOAD For PCIE SEC LOAD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_SER_RSTB For PCIE SER RSTB with 0xCC[7] = 1
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_SEC_LOAD_CLR For PCIE SEC LOAD CLR with 0xCC[7] = 1
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_SDIO_CMD_SW_RST SDIO Command Software Reset
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_SDIO_INT_POLARITY 0: Low Active 1: High Active
[18] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_SDIO_OFF_EN Enable SDIO_OFF module
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_SDIO_ON_EN Enable SDIO_ON module No autoload
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_DIS_WLSUS_AFT_PDN 在L2等到EPHY回phystatus之後，才拿powerdown=P2去告知CHIPTOP可以進WL SUS
1 : Disable
0 : Enable
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_FORCE_PWR_NGAT 1 : disable PCIE EMAC power gated
0 : enable PCIE EMAC power gated
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_FORCE_IBX_EN For PCIE force IBX ( Cobmo APHY )
1 : Force
0 : No Force		 No autoload
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_AUXCLK_GATE AUX clock switch to access PCIE local register under PCIE L1 state
0: Gated (default)
1: Enable
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_WAIT_TIMEOUT_EVENT Enable PCLK wait timeout event
1 : Enabled (Let PCIE can entry suspend mode)
0 : Disabled
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_PCIE_WAIT_TIME Enable PCLK wait time
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_L1OFF_TO_L0_RESUME_EVT L1.2->L0 當作 resume event.
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_USBA_FORCE_PWR_NGAT 1: Disable USB link_usb2 to gate CA10PC_EN/CA33PC_EN for USB Multi
Disable USB link_usb3 to gate UA10PC_EN/UA33PC_EN
0: Enable USB link_usb2 to gate CA10PC_EN/CA33PC_EN for USB Multi
Enable USB link_usb3 to gate UA10PC_EN/UA33PC_EN
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_USBD_FORCE_PWR_NGAT 1: disable USB link_usb2 to gate CD10PC_EN/U3MAC_D10PC_En for USB Multi
0: enable USB link_usb2 to gate CD10PC_EN/U3MAC_D10PC_En for USB Multi
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_BT_CTRL_USB_PWR Back door for BT control usb related (BT FW 去控制 USB APHY power cut)
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_D_STATE_Hold USB D+/D-line state hold (擋住 USB bus D+/D- 訊號變化)
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_R_BE_force_dp 1: special suspend(DP pull-up resistor by R_BE_dp_mode)
0: normal suspend
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_R_BE_dp_mode 1: pull-up DP resistor
0: pull-down DP resistor
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RES_USB_MASS_STORAGE_DESC 1: Need response usb mass storage descriptor
0: Disabled
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_WAIT_TIME Enable USB CLK wait time
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
18600074h R_BE_HCI_OPT_CTRL
[31:27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26] RO 0 B_BE_PCIE_BD_PATH_SEL 0: H_AXIDMA
1: PCIE
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_BD_RESTORE_EN Trigger restore BD
0 : Done
1 : enable and busy
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_BD_BACKUP_EN Trigger backup BD
0 : Done
1 : enable and busy
[23:22] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_USBMAC_ANACLK_SW rollback CR for USB LPS clock selection
0 : USB select ana_clk or usb_clk
1 : rollback to original design, always used usb_clk
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_CPHY_CCK_XTAL_SEL PCIE Combo PHY XTAL source select
0 : Digital Buffer (APR)
1 : Special Route (NO Buffer)
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_SDIO_DATA_PAD_SMT SDIO data pad smith trigger control
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_SDIO_PAD_E5 SDIO PAD Driving Control E5
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_FORCE_PCIE_AUXCLK 0 : Normal ; 1 : force PCIE auxclk to ana_clk
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_HCI_LA_ADDR_MAP HCI LA address mapping switch ( 切換控制CR/ indirect read Read SRAM )
1: mapping to READ HCI_LA SRAM
0 : mapping to READ/ WRITE HCI_LA CR ( hw default value )
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_HCI_LA_GLO_RST HCI_LA function global reset
1 : Reset release
0 : Reset State ( hw default value )
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_USB3_SUS_DIS Disable USB3.0 Suspend Signal
Disable USB3.0 suspend to AON (SUSB_TOON = 1)
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_NOPWR_CTRL_SEL Disable USB2.0 suspend to USBPHY(SUSB_TOPHY = 1)
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_HOST_PWR_OFF_EN 1: USB host power off control enable
0: disable
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_LPS_BLOCK_EN HCI Type: 00
SDIO/GSPI
1: SDIO will postpone response until the bit becomes zero
GSPI will reply 32k bit enable until the bit becomes zero.
0: SDIO/GSPI work normally.
HCI TYPE: 01
USB
1: SIE start ack to WL Usb bus transaction
0: SIE start nak to WL Usb bus transaction
[10] R/W 1 B_BE_USB_LPM_ACT_EN When enable LPM, SYMON filter USB_PHY_SUSB signal.
0: disable filter (Hw/Fw can know USB suspend)
1: enable filter (Hw/Fw can't know USB suspend)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_LPM_NY Indicate USB report NotYet for LPM Token
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_USB2_SUS_DIS Disable USB2.0 Suspend Signal
Disable USB2.0 suspend to AON (SUSB_TOON = 1)
[7:5] R/W 111 B_BE_SDIO_PAD_E SDIO PAD Driving Control {E4,E3,E2}
Bit[5] : 1'b1 => PCIE WAKE enabled ( PCIE+USB & PCIE+UART package)
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_LPPLL_EN Lower Power USB PLL Enable (Only used in HCI-MIX Mode)
SDIO I/O pull up resistance H3L1
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_USB1_1_USB2_0 decision BIT[0] : only use in PCIE+USB package
1 : USB1.1 (HW default value)
0 : USB2.0
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_ROP_SW15 ROP_SW15: Resume option to skip wait SPS_LD15 power ready
1: Enable, 0: Disable
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_PCI_CKRDY_OPT PCIE Clock ready option
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_PCI_VAUX_EN Board provide VAUX
0: Enable, 1: Disable
18600078h R_BE_HCI_BG_CTRL
[15] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[13:5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_Forced_IB_EN control if need to forced IB_EN (protect by 0xCC[2]) No autoload
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_REGBG Bandgap enable (protect by 0xCC[2])
[2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[1:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
1860007Ah R_BE_HCI_LDO_CTRL
[15:7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_LW_PWR Enable LDO low power mode (protect by 0xCC[2])
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_REGU Enable LDO (protect by 0xCC[2]) No autoload
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_PC Bypass LDO (protect by 0xCC[2])
[3:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
1860007Ch R_BE_LDO_SWR_CTRL
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 1 B_BE_DIG_ZCD_HW_AUTO_EN Enable DIG ZCD HW auto calibration
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_DIG_ZCD_REGSEL 0 : Select Auto ZCD code in (0x7C[25:21])
1 : Select ZCD code in register (0x7C[20:16])
[25:21] RO 10000 B_BE_DIG_AUTO_ZCD_IN_CODE For DIG AUTO_ZCD_IN_Code
[20:16] R/W 10000 B_BE_DIG_ZCD_code_in_L For PFM efficiency to DIG SWR (from efuse)
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 1 B_BE_ANA_ZCD_HW_AUTO_EN Enable ANA ZCD HW auto calibration
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_ANA_ZCD_REGSEL 0 : Select Auto ZCD code in (0x7C[25:21])
1 : Select ZCD code in register (0x7C[20:16])
[9:5] RO 10000 B_BE_ANA_AUTO_ZCD_IN_CODE For ANA AUTO_ZCD_IN_Code
[4:0] R/W 10000 B_BE_ANA_ZCD_code_in_L For PFM efficiency to ANA SWR (from efuse)
18600080h R_BE_SYS_ISO_CTRL_EXTEND
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 RSVD

18600084h R_BE_FEN_RST_ENABLE
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_r_SYM_FEN_WLMACOFF
[30:26] R/W 0 RSVD

[17] R/W 0 B_BE_CMAC1_FEN
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_CMAC0_FEN
[15:14] R/W 0 RSVD

[11] R/W 0 RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_BOOT_RDY1
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_FEN_BB1_IP_RSTn 0: reset
1: enable

1: enable

[4] R/W 1 B_BE_SYM_ISO_BB02PP
[3] R/W 0 RSVD 0: reset
1: enable
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_BOOT_RDY0

18600088h R_BE_PLATFORM_ENABLE
10 R/W 1 B_BE_SYM_WLPLT_MEM_MUX_EN Enable WLAN platform IDMEM MUX
0: disable
1: enable;
9 R/W 0 B_BE_WCPU_WARM_EN WLAN_CPU Core Warm reset enable bit
0: plat_reset will assert cpu_cold_reset only
1: plat_reset will assert cpu_warm_reset only
8 R/W 0 B_BE_SPIC_EN SPIC enable bit
0: SPIC reset
1: SPIC enable
7 R/W 0 B_BE_UART_EN UART enable bit
0: UART reset
1: UART enable
6 R/W 0 B_BE_IDDMA_EN IDDMA enable bit
0: IDDMA reset
1: IDDMA enable
5 R/W 0 B_BE_IPSEC_EN IPSEC enable bit
0: IPSEC reset
1: IPSEC enable
4 R/W 0 B_BE_HIOE_EN HIOE enable bit
0: HIOE reset
1: HIOE enable
3 R/W 0 rsvd
2 R/W 1 B_BE_APB_WRAP_EN APB_WRAP enable bit
0: APB_WRAP reset
1: APB_WRAP enbale
1 R/W 0 B_BE_WCPU_EN WLAN_CPU Core enable bit
0: WLAN_CPU reset
1: WLAN_CPU enable
0 R/W 0 B_BE_PLATFORM_EN WLAN_CPU platform enabled bit
0: Platform reset
1: Platform enable
18600090h R_BE_WLLPS_CTRL
[31:30] R/W 00 RSVD RSVD
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_BBOFF LPS option to enable WL BB OFF block
1: Enable WL BB OFF block power
0: Disable WL BB OFF block power
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_MACOFF LPS option to enable WL MAC OFF block
1: Enable WL MAC OFF block power
0: Disable WL MAC OFF block power
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_OFF_CAPC_EN LPS option for Enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN as PCIE assert L1.OFF/L2 in PCIE LPS state
(for LPS 要不要關APHY power cut)
0 : disable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
1 : enable to cut CA33PC_EN & CA10PC_EN
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_MEM_DS LPS option to enable memory to deep sleep mode
1 : Enable memory to deep sleep mode
0 : Disable memory to deep sleep mode
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_WLMEM_PC_DIS LPS option to disable WLCPU memory power cut
1 : Disable memory power cut
0 : keep memory power cut state
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_DATAMEM_PC_DIS LPS option to disable DATA CPU memory power cut
1 : Disable memory power cut
0 : keep memory power cut state
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_XTALM_LPS LPS option for POW_XTAL_LPS
1 : XTAL is LowPower Mode in LPS
0 : XTAL is OFF in LPS
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_XTAL LPS option not to turn off XTAL (POW_XTAL)
1: Enable XTAL, 0: Disable XTAL
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_ACLK_DIV_2 1 : LPS option ANA_CLK Div 2
0 : LPS option ANA_CLK
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_ACLK_SEL LPS option to switch analog Clock Mode to 12Mhz
(Host could suspend by gating, Power Modes by FSM).
1: keep 12M (Fast Clock), 0: 500K(Slow Clock)
[19:18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_ASWRM LPS option for SWR_A operates in LPS.
1: PWM mode, 0: PFM mode
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSOP_ASWR LPS option for SWR_A operation
1. SWR enable, 0: SWR disable
[15:12] R/W 1010 B_BE_LPSOP_DSWR_ADJ SWR PFM VADJ
0000: 0.55V 0001: 0.60V 0010: 0.65V 0011: 0.70V
0100: 0.75V 0101: 0.80V 0110: 0.85V 0111: 0.90V
1000: 0.95V 1001: 1.00V 1010: 1.05V 1011: 1.10V
1100: 1.10V 1101: 1.10V 1110: 1.10V 1111: 1.10V
[11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_DSWRSD LPS option to enable digital SWR step down
1: enable SWR_D step down
0: disable SWR_D step down
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_DSWRM LPS option for SWR_D operates in LPS.
1: PWM mode, 0: PFM mode
[8] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSOP_DSWR LPS option for SWR_D operation
1. SWR enable, 0: SWR disable
[7:4] R/W 1011 B_BE_LPSOP_OLD_ADJ LDOH12 voltage select (ON block LDO)
0000: 0.824V 0001: 0.84V 0010: 0.857V 0011: 0.875V
0100: 0.894V 0101: 0.913V 0110: 0.933V 0111: 0.955V
1000: 0.977V 1001: 1.000V 1010: 1.024V 1011: 1.050V
1100: 1.077V 1101: 1.105V 1110: 1.167V 1111: 1.235V
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_Force_Leave_LPS Set this bit to 1 to trigger HW leave LPS
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSOP_OLDSD LPS option to enable WLAN On LDO step down
1: enable On LDO step down
0: disable On LDO step down
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_WLBT_LPSEN_LOPC Disable WLBT LPSEN_LOPC
為了避免sympmc在跑LPS or SUS的時候
因LPS/SUS的condition過短, 造成選擇LPS/SUS option時誤動作的問題
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_LPS_EN Inform WLAN PMC FSM to enter LPS mode.
(auto clear when ready)
18600094h R_BE_WLRESUME_CTRL
[31] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_DMEM7_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2030_0000 ~ 0x2031_7FFF (96KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[30] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_DMEM6_PC_EN Addr range : 0x202A_0000 ~ 0x202C_7FFF (160KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[29] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_DMEM5_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2028_0000 ~ 0x2029_FFFF (128KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[28] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_DMEM4_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2026_0000 ~ 0x2027_FFFF (128KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[27] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_DMEM3_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2024_0000 ~ 0x2025_FFFF (128KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[26] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_DMEM2_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2022_0000 ~ 0x2023_FFFF (128KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[25] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_DMEM1_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2020_0000 ~ 0x2021_FFFF (128KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[24] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_IMEM4_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2019_0000 ~ 0x201C_7FFF (224KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[23] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_IMEM3_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2015_0000 ~ 0x2018_FFFF (256KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[22] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_IMEM2_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2012_0000 ~ 0x2014_FFFF (192KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[21] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_IMEM1_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2011_0000 ~ 0x2011_FFFF (64KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[20] R/W 1 B_BE_LPSROP_IMEM0_PC_EN Addr range : 0x2010_0000 ~ 0x2010_FFFF (64KB)
LPS option to enable MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_DATAMEM_PC_EN LPS option to enable DATA CPU MEM PC when LPS resume
1: Enable MEM PC
0: disable MEM PC
[18:15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_BB1_W_BB0 LPS option to enable BB1 when Enable BB0
1: Enable BB1 and BB0
0: Follow CMAC(CMAC0/BB0; CMAC1/BB1)
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_CMAC1 LPS option to enable CMAC1 when LPS resume
1: Enable CMAC1
0: disable CMAC1
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_CMAC0 LPS option to enable CMAC0 when LPS resume
1: Enable CMAC0
0: disable CMAC0
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_XTALM LPS resume option to set xtal mode ( XTAL_MODE )
1 : Set XTAL_MODE=1 for HP
0 : Set XTAL_MODE=0 for Normal
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_AFEM LPS option to enable AFE low power beacon mode when LPS resume
1 : Enable AFE low power beacon mode
0 : Disable AFE low power beacon mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_HIOE LPS option to enable FSM to load HIOE address and trigger HIOE to execute
- restore sequence when LPS resume,
- backup sequence when enter LPS (RP_END_INT issued)
1: Enable
0: Dislable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_LPSROP_CPU LPS option to enable CPU when LPS resume
1: Enable CPU
0: disable CPU
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[5:4] R/W 10 B_BE_LPSROP_DSWRSD_SEL LPS option for SWR_D step down time selection
00: 0.1ms 01: 0.25ms 10: 0.5ms 11:1ms
[3:0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
18600098h R_BE_GPIO_DEBOUNCE_CTRL
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_WLGP_DBC1EN Enable GPIO Debounce Loop-1
[14:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0 B_BE_WLGP_DBC1 Debounce Loop-1 stage count
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_WLGP_DBC0EN Enable GPIO Debounce Loop-0
[6:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0 B_BE_WLGP_DBC0 Debounce Loop-0 stage count
186000A0h R_BE_SYSON_FSM_MON
[31:27] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26:24] R/W 0 B_BE_FSM_MON_SEL FSM monitor selector
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_DOP_ELDO Power Down option for LDO analog block control
1: Enable LDO, 0: power down LDO
p.s. If power down LDO, then CLK_ANA will be gated
[22:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] WC 0 B_BE_FSM_MON_UPD FSM parameters Update
[14:0] R/W 0 B_BE_FSM_PAR FSM parameters
186000A4h R_BE_EFUSE_CTRL_2_V1
[31] R/W 1 B_BE_EF_ENT OTP IP enable time (OTP SPEC Tcs >10us)
Clock 12MHz 計算
0:24us
1:36us
建議default value : 1
[30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_TCOLUMN_EN OTP Test Column Select:
0: Test Column Function Disable
1: Test Column Function Enable
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_OTP_PWC_DIS 1 : OTP SW Power cut control force to wlan control only
0 : OTP SW Power cut control need to check with BT SW Power cut control
[27] R/W 1 B_BE_EF_RDT OTP Clock cycle time (OTP SPEC Tcyc >80ns)
Clock 12MHz 計算
0:166.66ns
1:249.9ns
建議default value : 1
[26:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:20] R/W 0011 B_BE_EF_PGTS OTP Program Setup time and Recovery time. In the unit of cycle time.
OTP SPEC 5us< Tpps=Tppr <20us
Clock 12MHz 計算
0 : 5us, 1 : 6us, 2 : 7us, 3 : 8us,
4 : 9us, 5 : 10us , 6 : 11us , 7 : 12us
8 : 13us, 9 : 14us , A : 15us , B : 16us
C : 17us, D : 18us , E : 19us , F : 20us
建議default value : 3
F : 100us
建議default value : 3
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_BURST Efuse Read / Write Burst Mode Enable
0 : Disable
1 : Enable
[18:16] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_TEST_SEL OTP Test Mode Selection:
000: User Mode
001: Initial Margin Read Mode
010: Program Margin Read Mode
101: Repair Margin Read Mode
110: Repair Check Mode
111: Repair Program Mode
Bit18=0:User mode and Test mode
Bit18=1: Use Repair mode
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_TROW_EN OTP Test Row Select:
0: Test Row Function Disable
1: Test Row Function Enable
[14] R 0 B_BE_EF_ERR_FLAG OTP Error Flag:
When OTP read/write and test mode mapping process Error, this flag will be set to 1
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_FBURST_DIS Force WLBT OTP Burst Mode Disable :
0: Non-Force
1: Force WLBT Burst Disable
need OTP autoload
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_HT_SEL HT mode for Program Margin read and Initial Marginal Read
0: non HT mode
1: HT Mode
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_EF_DSB_EN 0: OTP Deep Standby Mode Disable
1 : OTP Deep Standby Mode Enable
[10:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3:0] R/W 1000 B_BE_EF_DLY_SEL OTP HCI autoload Delay:
0x38[3:0] = 0x1 : add 4T delay / 0x2 : add 8T delay / …. / 0xF : add 60T delay
Default value 0x8
186000A8h R_BE_PMC_DBG_CTRL1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_PMC_WR_OVF PMC Write Access Timer Overflow
[7:0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_WLPMC_ERRINT WLPMC Error interrupt
186000ACh R_BE_SCOREBOARD
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_TOGGLE Toggle bit for Scoreboard
[30:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DATA_LINE DATA Line for Scoreboard
186000C0h R_BE_DBG_PORT_SEL
[31:0] RO 0 B_BE_DEBUG_ST Debug signals polling
186000C4h R_BE_PAD_CTRL2
[31:26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_FORCE_CLK_U2 Force clock USB2
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_FORCE_U2_CK Force USB2 CK
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_FORCE_U3_CK Force USB3 CK
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_USB2_FORCE Force USB2 mode
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_USB3_FORCE Force USB3 mode
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_USB3_USB2_TRANSITION USB3/USB2 transition enable :
0 : USB3 card emulation follow up USB3 spec
1 : USB2 card emulation , but support USB3/USB2 switch
[19:18] R/W 00 B_BE_USB23_SW_MODE_V1 if efuse 0x06[7] =1'b1:
2’b00,2’b01 : usb2 for next chipoff resume
2’b10 : usb3 for next chipoff resume
2’b11 : rsvd
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_NO_PDN_CHIPOFF_V1 Chipoff not powerdown(ana clock always has)
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_RSM_EN_V1 When Timer Expired, Resume Hardware StateMachine
[15:8] R/W 00 B_BE_MATCH_CNT USB2 and USB3 Match counter for sleep mode
[7] RO 0 B_BE_LD_B12V_EN Autoload option for 1.5V of board, 1: 1.5V provided by Board; 0: 1.5V provided by WLAN chip
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_EECS_IOSEL_V1 EECS PAD GPIO output control
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_EECS_DATA_O_V1 Data Output for EECS PAD
[4] RO 0 B_BE_EECS_DATA_I_V1 EECS PIN current status
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_EESK_IOSEL_V1 EESK PAD GPIO output control
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_EESK_DATA_O_V1 Data Output for EESK PAD
[0] RO 0 B_BE_EESK_DATA_I_V1 EESK PIN current status
[31:0] RO EAEAEAEA
186000CCh R_BE_PMC_DBG_CTRL2
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_EFUSE_BURN_GNT The Grant Code for Efuse Burn
[23:17] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] RO 0 B_BE_DIS_IOWRAP_TIMEOUT 0 : Enable IOWRAP time out
1 : Disable IOWRAP time out
[PS : hw tie 0 , 無法write]
[15:10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_STOP_WL_PMC Halt the WL FSM
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_STOP_SYM_PMC Halt the SYM FSM
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_ACCESS_WL_PAGE0 BT access WL page0 Enable
0 : Disabled
1 : Enabled
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_R_BE_RST_WLPMC Option to gengerate WLREG initial when SW auto power on WLAN
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_R_BE_RST_PD12N Option to generate HOSTRST when Power Down
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_SYSON_DIS_WLR_BE_WRMSK Write Access Mask for PMC FSM
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_SYSON_DIS_PMCR_BE_WRMSK Write Access Mask for PMC FSM
[1:0] R/W 01 B_BE_SYSON_R_BE_ARB HW PMC Access Register Time Out Control
186000D0h R_BE_MEM_PWR_CTRL
[31:18] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_BB_SD For BB Memory SD(Shutdown)
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_BB_DS For BB Memory DS
[15:11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_BT_DS For BT_memory DS
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_SDIO_LS For memory SDIO LS
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_SDIO_DS For memory SDIO DS
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_USB_LS For memory USB LS
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_USB_DS For memory USB DS
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_PCI_LS For memory PCI LS
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_PCI_DS For memory PCI DS
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_WLMAC_LS For memory WL MAC LS
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_WLMAC_DS For memory WL MAC DS
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_WLMCU_LS For memory WL MCU LS
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_MEM_WLMCU_DS For memory WL MCU DS
186000D4h R_BE_Indir_Adr_SDIO
[31:18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W1C 0 B_BE_INDIR_READY_SDIO Polling to 1, it indicates the indirect access R/W is ready.
Write 1 Clear.
[16] R0/W 0 B_BE_INDIR_R_SDIO When write this bit to 1, the indirect read request will be issued. This bit is always read as 0
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_INDIR_ADR_SDIO SDIO register address, need 4 Byte alignment
Addr = 0x00h, HW get sdio local reg 0x00h ~ 0x03h
Addr = 0x04h, HWget sdio local reg 0x04h ~ 0x07h

Start address
FN1 local: 0x0000
CCCR: 0x4000
FN1 FBR: 0x5000
FN2 FBR: 0x6000
186000D8h R_BE_Indir_data_SDIO
[31:0] R 0 B_BE_INDIR_DATA_SDIO Read data [31:0] = {sdio_local_R_BE_N+3, sdio_local_R_BE_N+2, sdio_local_R_BE_N+1, sdio_local_R_BE_N }
186000DCh R_BE_USB_SIE_INTF_ADDR
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_SIE_INTF_ADDR USB address
186000E0h R_BE_USB_SIE_INTF
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_REG_SEL 0: USB local register
1: USB PHY parameter
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_WRITE_EN USB write enable bit, 0: read 1: write
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_REG_EN USB register enable bit
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_SIE_SEL USB SIE buffer enable bit for debug
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_REG_STATUS 0: IO done
1:indirect access should set BIT_USB_REG_STATUS=1
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_PHY_BYTE_SEL B_BE_USB_REG_SEL =0
USB address[10]
,B_BE_USB_REG_SEL =1
PHY high/low byte selector
[25:18] R/W 0 RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_REG_SELECT 0:USB local register
1:USB2.0 PHY parameter
2:USB3.0 PHY parameter
[15:8] RO 0 B_BE_USB_SIE_INTF_RD The read data from USB SIE.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_SIE_INTF_WD The write data from USB SIE.
186000E4h R_BE_PCIE_MIO_INTF
[31:30] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[29:24] R/W 0 B_BE_AON_MIO_EPHY_1K_SEL Select EMAC reg mapping to EPHY reg
6’b000000: EMAC 0x3800~0x3BFF equal to EPHY 0x0000~0x03FF
6’b000001: EMAC 0x3800~0x3BFF equal to EPHY 0x0400~0x07FF
6’b000010: EMAC 0x3800~0x3BFF equal to EPHY 0x0800~0x0BFF
…
6’b111111: EMAC 0x3800~0x3BFF equal to EPHY 0x0000~0xFFFF
[23:21] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[20:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_MIO_ADDR_PAGE_V1 If B_BE_PCIE_SEL = 2'b00
The page of PCIE MIO access address:
5’b00000 : 0x2000 page
5’b00001 : 0x2100 page
5’b00010 : 0x2200 page
5’b00011 : 0x2300 page
…
5’b11011 : 0x3B00 page

If 0xB_BE_PCIE_SEL = 2'b01
The page of PCIE MIO access address:
Others: RSVD
5’bX0100 : 0x6400 page
5’bX0101 : 0x6500 page
5’bX0110 : 0x6600 page
5’bX0111 : 0x6700 page
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_MIO_ASIF Select MIO access block
1'b0: PCIe local、PCIe configuration space、PCIe PHY、HCILA (0x2000~0x3FFF)
1'b1: PCIe RXI300 (0x6000~0x6FFF)
[14] RO 0 RSVD Reserved
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_MIO_BYIOREG MIO bypass IOREG interface.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_MIO_RE Read Enable of MIO interface.
[11:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_MIO_WE Write Byte Enable of MIO interface
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_MIO_ADDR The address of PCIE MIO Access register.
186000E8h R_BE_PCIE_MIO_INTD
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PCIE_MIO_DATA The data read from /write to PCIE MIO.
186000ECh R_BE_GMAC_MIO_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_MIO_TRIGGER Write 1 to trigger MIO access , when transaction completes , HW auto clear to 0
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_MIO_WE Write Enable
1 : this is a write command
0 : this is a read command
[29:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:24] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_MIO_BYTE_EN Byte enable bitmap
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[23:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_MIO_ADDR Register address offset from GMAC register base address
186000F0h R_BE_SYS_CFG1
[31:28] R 0 B_BE_TRP_ICFG Trapped ICFG data value
0: normall mode
XXXX: the other mode (Test Mode)
[27] R 1 B_BE_RF_TYPE_ID 1 : 2*2
0 : 1*1
[26] R 1 RSVD RSVD
[25] R 0 B_BE_BD_PKG_SEL Trapped PKG_ENG_SEL value
[24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] RO 1 B_BE_RTL_ID TestChip ID, 1 : Test (RLE) ; 0 : MP (RL)
[22] R 1 B_BE_PAD_HWPD_IDN HWPDN PAD status Indicator, when this bit is high, any HWPDN INT is a fake interrupt.
[21] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[20] RO 0 B_BE_Testmode Test mode trap :
0: normal mode
1: test mode
[19:18] RO 00 B_BE_FOUNDRY_ID Foundry ID :
00: TSMC , 01: SMIC, 10: UMC
[17:16] RO 11 RSVD RSVD
[15:12] RO 0000 B_BE_CHIP_VER Chip version (From RF_RTL_ID) – 8922A
0000 : A-cut
0001 : B-cut
0010 : C-cut
0011 : D-cut
……以此類推.
[11] RO 1 B_BE_BD_MAC3 Bonding option for MAC function-3 Enable (Reserved bonding option)
[10] RO 1 B_BE_BD_MAC1 Bonding option for MAC function-1 Enable (VHT_SIGB_CRC enable)
[9] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] RO 1 B_BE_SIC_IDLE Indicator of SIC idle state
[7] RO 0 B_BE_ANA_SPS_OCP_SHUTDN ANA SPS OCP shutdown Chip
[6] RO 0 B_BE_DIG_SPS_OCP_SHUTDN Digital SPS OCP shutdown Chip
[5] RO 0 B_BE_V15_VLD SWR_DIG Core Power Ready. 1: Reset relese after Power Ready
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PCIRSTB PCIE External PERST, Pin Status
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PCLK_VLD PCIE PHY Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
[2] RO 0 B_BE_UCLK_VLD USB PHY Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
[1] RO 0 B_BE_ACLK_VLD AFE Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
[0] RO 0 B_BE_XCLK_VLD Xtal Clock Stable, 1: Clock Stable
186000F4h R_BE_SYS_STATUS1
[31:28] RO 0 B_BE_RF_RL_ID Vendor ID defined in RF
[27] RO 0 B_BE_BT_LPS_EN BT LPS enabled
[26] RO 0 B_BE_WLAN_LPS_EN WLAN LPS enabled
[25:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_HPHY_ICFG Enable Host PHY LBK Pin Out
[18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0 B_BE_SEL_0xC0 Debug Message Selector for 0xC0
[15:13] R/W 0 B_BE_HCI_SEL_V4 Final HCI configuration
3'b000 : WL-SDIO/SPI , BT-UART
3'b001 : USB-MF
3'b010 : WL-PCIe , BT-UART
3'b011 : WL-PCIe , BT-USB1.1&USB2.0
3'b100 : SDIO Multi
3'b111 : WL-GMAC , BT-UART
[12] RO 0 B_BE_USB_OPERATION_MODE HCI Selection: 11
0 => USB 2.0
1 => USB 1.1
HCI Selection: 10
0 => USB 2.0
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_BT_PDN Option for Disable all function when BT is disable
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_AUTO_WLPON Option for WL Auto power on
[9:7] RO 011 B_BE_WL_MODE 3'b000 : 11N
3'b001 : 11AC
3'b010 : 11AX
3'b011 : 11BE
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PKG_SEL_HCI Bounding option for using PAD_HCI_SEL[1:0] as HCI configuration
[5:3] RO 0 B_BE_PAD_HCI_SEL_V2 Bounding option for HCI configuration:
3'b000 : WL-SDIO/SPI , BT-UART
3'b001 : USB-MF
3'b010 : WL-PCIe , BT-UART
3'b011 : WL-PCIe , BT-USB1.1&USB2.0
3'b100 : SDIO Multi
3'b111 : WL-GMAC , BT-UART
[2:0] R/W 3'b000 B_BE_EFS_HCI_SEL_V1 Efuse/EEPROM for HCI configuration:
3'b000 : WL-SDIO/SPI , BT-UART
3'b001 : USB-MF
3'b010 : WL-PCIe , BT-UART
3'b011 : WL-PCIe , BT-USB1.1&USB2.0
3'b100 : SDIO Multi
3'b111 : WL-GMAC , BT-UART
186000F8h R_BE_SYS_STATUS2
[31:26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_A_DIE_1_PWR_RDY A-Die_1 power ready
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_A_DIE_0_PWR_RDY A-Die_0 power ready
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W1C 0 B_BE_SIC_ON_timeout SIC access page 0 timeout error flag
[21] R/W1C 0 B_BE_CPU_ON_timeout CPU access page 0 timeout error flag
[20] R/W1C 0 B_BE_HCI_ON_timeout HCI access page 0 timeout error flag
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_SIO_ALDN SDIO Interface autoload done bit No autoload
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_USB_ALDN USB Interface autoload doen bit No autoload
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PCI_ALDN PCIE Interface autoload done bit No autoload
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_SYS_ALDN System Configuration autoload done bit No autoload
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_EPVID1 Efuse/EEPROM load verification ID-1
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_EPVID0 Efuse/EEPROM load verification ID-0
186000FCh R_BE_SYS_CHIPINFO
[31] RO 0 B_BE_USB2_SEL
[30] RO 0 B_BE_U3PHY_RST_V1
[29] RO 0 B_BE_U3_TERM_DETECT
[28:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] RO 01110000 B_BE_HW_ID Hardware Version ID
0x70: RTL8922A
18600100h R_BE_USER_DEFINED_0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_USER_DEFINED_0 USER_DEFINED_0
18600104h R_BE_USER_DEFINED_1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_USER_DEFINED_1 USER_DEFINED_1
18600108h R_BE_USER_DEFINED_2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_USER_DEFINED_2 USER_DEFINED_2
1860010Ch R_BE_USER_DEFINED_3

18600148h R_BE_GPIO16_27_EXT_INTM
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO27_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO26_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO25_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO24_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO23_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO22_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO21_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO20_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO19_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO18_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO17_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO16_INT_MD When this is set 0, positive edge is sensed as interrupt; otherwise, negative edge is sense as interrupt.
18600150h R_BE_GPIO_16_TO_23_EXT_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_MOD_23_TO_16 GPIO[23:16] function mode selection. When the specific bit is set to zero, the
corresponding GPIO port is configured to data port; otherwise, when a specific
bit is set to “1”, and GPIO_IO_SEL is set to “0”, then it is interrupt mode.
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_IO_SEL_23_TO_16 GPIO[23:16] pins output enable when a bit is set to “1”; otherwise, input is configured.
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_OUT_23_TO_16 GPIO[23:16] pins output value
[7:0] RO 0 B_BE_GPIO_IN_23_TO_16 GPIO[23:16] pins input value
18600154h R_BE_GPIO_24_TO_27_EXT_CTRL
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:24] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_MOD_27_TO_24 GPIO[27:24] function mode selection. When the specific bit is set to zero, the
corresponding GPIO port is configured to data port; otherwise, when a specific
bit is set to “1”, and GPIO_IO_SEL is set to “0”, then it is interrupt mode.
[23:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_IO_SEL_27_TO_24 GPIO[27:24] pins output enable when a bit is set to “1”; otherwise, input is configured.
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0 B_BE_GPIO_OUT_27_TO_24 GPIO[27:24] pins output value
[7:4] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[3:0] RO 0 B_BE_GPIO_IN_27_TO_24 GPIO[27:24] pins input value
18600160h R_BE_HALT_H2C_CTRL
31:1 R/W 0 RSVD
0 R/W 0 B_BE_HALT_H2C_TRIGGER Write 1 to trigger HALT H2C REG interrupt to FW.
(After receiving H2C, FW must write 0 to B_BE_HALT_H2C_TRIGGER to let the host know the data has been received)
18600164h R_BE_HALT_C2H_CTRL
31:1 R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
0 R/W 0 B_BE_HALT_C2H_TRIGGER Write 1 to trigger HALT C2H REG interrupt to the host.
(After receiving HALT C2H, the host must write 0 to B_BE_HALT_C2H_TRIGGER to let FW know the data has been received)
18600168h R_BE_HALT_H2C
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_HALT_H2C HALT H2CREG data
1860016Ch R_BE_HALT_C2H
[31:28] R/W 0 B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO Wlan CPU Senario
1: RXI-300 Error
2: CPU Exception
3: Assertion Function
4.WDT
[27:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_ERROR_CODE Error code:
When B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0001' ,the field means RXI-300 Error Code

When B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0002',the field means CPU ExcCode (CoProcessor General Register Address13)

When B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0003',the field means FW Alarm Code. (Defined by FW,refer the src/Internal/RTL8852A/Intl8852A_Debug_RAM.h)
18600170h R_BE_SYS_CFG5
[31:13] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_WDT_DATACPU_WAKE_PCIE_EN WDT DATA CPU WAEK PCIE enable
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_WDT_DATACPU_WAKE_USB_EN WDT DATA CPU WAEK USB enable
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_WDT_WAKE_PCIE_EN WDT WAEK PCIE enable
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_WDT_WAKE_USB_EN WDT WAEK USB enable
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_SYM_DIS_HC_ACCESS_MAC 通知 Host read/write DMAC/CMAC
0 : Disable
1 : 通知 HCI 回覆 0xEA
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R 0 B_BE_LPS_STATUS 0: In Active State
1: In LPS State
[2] R 0 B_BE_HCI_TXDMA_BUSY 0: Idle
1: Busy
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_HCI_TXDMA_ALLOW 0: TXDMA Not allowed
1. TXDMA allowed
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_CTRL_HCI_TXDMA_EN 0: HCI send the Packet to MAC FIFO directly when receiving Packet from the host.
1. HCI need to check the value of LPS_STATUS and HCI_TXDMA_ALLOW for DMA behavior
18600180h R_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_0 for fw debug
18600184h R_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_1 for fw debug
18600188h R_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_2 for fw debug
1860018Ch R_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_DEBUG_USE_ONLY_3 for fw debug
18600190h R_BE_FWS0IMR
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_HALT_H2C_INT_EN Enable HALT H2C(triggered by0x160) interrupt
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_FSM_HIOE_TO_EVENT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that when FSM load register to HIOE in LPS flow, FSM keeps in waiting state and start counting. If the counter over 87ms, issue this interrupt to wake WCPU.
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_HCI_SUS_INT_EN Enable USB, PCIE, and SDIO suspend event
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_HCI_RES_INT_EN Enable USB, PCIE and SDIO Resume Event
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_HCI_RESET_INT_EN Enable HCI reset event
WL 在 USB 是代表 SE0 reset,
WL 在 PCIe 是代表 PERST
[26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_ACT2RECOVERY_INT_EN USB3 Active to Recovery Interrupt source, PCIE STC interrupt source
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_GEN1Gen2_SWITCH_INT_EN PCIE Gen1 <-> Gen2 switch
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_USB_LPMRSM_INT_EN Enable USB LPM Resume Interrupt. The status bit is asserted when USB resume from LPM state.
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_USB_LPMINT_INT_EN Enable USB LPM Interrupt. The status bit is asserted when USB enters into LPM states.
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PWMERR_INT_EN Enable HCION iowrap timeout error interrupt source
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PDNINT_EN Enable Hardware Power Down interrupt source
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_SPSA_OCP_INT_EN Enable SPS Analog OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt source
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_SPSD_OCP_INT_EN Enable SPS Digital OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt source
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_BT_SB_INT_EN enable BT scoreboard update interrupt
When 0xAC[31] write to 1 , this interrupt is issue to indicate the status updated.

18600194h R_BE_FWS0ISR
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_HALT_H2C_INT HALT H2C(triggered by0x160) interrupt
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_FSM_HIOE_TO_EVENT_INT After FSM load B_BE_BKP_HIOE_CTRL or B_BE_RES_HIOE_CTRL, FSM keeps in waiting state and start counting. If the counter over 87ms(20bit counter, ana_clk), issue this interrupt to wake WCPU.
[29] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_HCI_SUS_INT USB, PCIE, and SDIO suspend event
[28] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_HCI_RES_INT USB, PCIE and SDIO Resume Event
[27] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_HCI_RESET_INT HCI reset event
WL 在 USB 是代表 SE0 reset,
WL 在 PCIe 是代表 PERST
[26] R/W1C 0 RSVD RSVD
[25] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_ACT2RECOVERY_INT USB3 Active to Recovery Interrupt, PCIE STC interrupt
[24] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_GEN1Gen2_SWITCH_INT PCIE Gen1 <-> Gen2 switch
[23] R/W1C 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_USB_LPMRSM_INT The status bit is asserted when USB resume from LPM state.
[21] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_USB_LPMINT_INT The status bit is asserted when USB enters into LPM states.
[20] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PWMERR_INT HCION iowrap timeout error interrupt
[19] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PDNINT Hardware Power Down interrupt
[18] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_SPSA_OCP_INT SPS Analog OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt
[17] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_SPSD_OCP_INT SPS Digital OCP(Over Current Protection) alarm interrupt
[16] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_BT_SB_INT BT scoreboard update interrupt
When 0xAC[31] write to 1 , this interrupt is issue to indicate the status updated.

186001B0h R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_0 For driver handshake reg
186001B4h R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_1 For driver handshake reg
186001B8h R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_2 For driver handshake reg
186001BCh R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_3 For driver handshake reg
186001C0h R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_4
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_4 For driver handshake reg
186001C4h R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_5
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_5 For driver handshake reg
186001C8h R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_6
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_6 For driver handshake reg
186001CCh R_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_7
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_FW_HSK_7 For driver handshake reg
186001D0h R_BE_IO_Hang_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23] R/W 1 B_BE_AHB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_EN Enable fix AHB bus hang. It will return 0xEAEA_EAEA for those AHB stuck
1 : Enabled
0 : Disabled
[22:16] R/W 1000000 B_BE_AHB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_THD Maximum timeout cycles for AHB response
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_APB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_EN Enable platform backdoor bit. It will return 0xDEADBEAF for those IO register stuck.
[14:0] R/W 100000000000000 B_BE_APB_AUTO_FIX_HANG_THD Maximum timeout cycles for IO register response.
186001E0h R_BE_WCPU_FW_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_WCPU_ROM_CUT_REQ IROM write ROM cut id to B_BE_WCPU_ROM_CUT and then clear this bit if this bit is set
[29:28] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_ENV FW Environment
2'b00: ASIC
2'b01: FPGA
2'b10: PXP
2'b11: rsvd
[27:18] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_WDT_PLT_RST_EN in wowlan mode it decide WDT platform reset need to enable for fw init wdt
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_CPUUTIL_STS_EN 1'b0: disable cpu utilization status collection
1'b1: enable cpu utilization status collection
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_WCPU_ROM_CUT IROM write ROM cut id to this byte if B_BE_WCPU_ROM_CUT_REQ is set
[7:5] R/W 0 B_BE_WCPU_FWDL_STS WCPU fw download status, set by WCPU. (For SW handshake)
FWDL procedure is done if this symbol value is equal to WCPU_FW_INIT_RDY.
2'b111 : WCPU_FW_INIT_RDY
2'b110 : WCPU_FWDL_RDY
2'b101 : rsvd
2'b100 : CUT_NOT_MATCH
2'b011 : SECURITY_FAIL
2'b010 : CHECKSUM_FAIL
2'b001 : FWDL_ONGOING
2'b000 : INITIAL_STATE
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_RAM_RUN_IND This bit is set to 1 to means FW RAM code is running.
[3] RW 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] RW 0 B_BE_FWDL_PATH_RDY This bit is set to 1 to means that AXIDMA_CH1 is realdy(by cpu). Then driver could download fw. (For SW handshake)
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_H2C_PATH_RDY This bit is set to 1 to means that AXIDMA_CH0 is realdy(by cpu). Then driver could use H2C to handshake with cpu. (For SW handshake)
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_WCPU_FWDL_EN WCPU Firmware download enable. (For SW handshake)
This bit is enabled by driver to notify WCPU need FW Patch. This bit is cleared by WCPU to notify driver that FWDL is done, and driver should check B_BE_WCPU_FWDL_STS.
1:Enable(Default),
0:Disable.
186001E4h R_BE_RPWM
[15] RO 0 B_BE_RPWM_TOGGLE HRPWM register.
If driver toggle this bit, RPWM FWISR will be issued
(This register is a direct bus signal from each HCI block HRPWM register.)
[14:0] RO 0 B_BE_RPWM_VAL RPWM value (SW defined)
BIT14: ACK bit. When FW receive RPWM Interrupt, FW should trigger CPWM to response to host.
BIT13~BIT0 : RPWM SW defined value
(This register is a direct bus signal from each HCI block HRPWM register.)
186001E6h R_BE_Boot_Reason
[15:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2:0] R/W 0 B_BE_Boot_Reason WCPU Boot Reason:
0: boot reason is Pwr_On (initial value or updated by FW)
2: boot reason is LPS (updated by FW)
Else, it is unknown state.
186001E8h R_BE_LDM
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_32K Enable CG/PG indicator.
[30:0] R/W 0 B_BE_LDM LPS Debug Message

PS:
Reuse this register for FW Log Control usage before FWDL. FW log will be controled by H2C after FW initial ready
[7:4]: Debug Level
[3:0]: Debug Path (BIT0: UART, BIT1: C2H)
186001F0h R_BE_UDM0
[31:28] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM0_SEND2RA_CNT FW send to RA counter
[27:24] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM0_TX_RPT_CNT Tx report counter that can indicate the cmac is still alive
[23:8] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM0_FS_CODE FW state code: the code is defined by fw .
Please reference: src/Internal/RTL8852A/Intl8852A_Debug_RAM.h
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_NULL_POINTER_INDC Null pointer Indicator
0: null pointer event never happened
1: null pointer event ever happened
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_ROM_ASSERT_INDC ROM Assert Indicator
0: Assert never happened
1: Assert ever happened
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_RAM_ASSERT_INDC RAM Assert Indicator(except null pointer)
0: Assert never happened
1: Assert ever happened
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FW_IMAGE_TYPE FW image type
0: Normal FW
1: Wowlan FW
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_HCI_ILLEGAL_CMD_INDC HCI illegal command indicator
0: Illegal command not happened
1: Illegal command happened( HCI read value with 0xDEADBEE0)
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM0_TRAP_LOOP_CTRL The bit control the error senario will send haltc2h or not.The bit only effect when the below 3 conditions are true at the same time:
B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0011'b and B_BE_UDM0_DBG_MODE_CTRL= 1'b and B_BE_UDM0_Send_HALTC2H_CTRL = 1'b
0:Send haltc2h
1:Will not send haltc2h
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM0_Send_HALTC2H_CTRL The bit control the error senario will send haltc2h or not.The bit only effect in the condition:Error type:Assertion and B_BE_UDM0_DBG_MODE_CTRL=1'b
0:Send haltc2h
1:Will not send haltc2h
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM0_DBG_MODE_CTRL The bit control current mode is debug or normal mode.If debug mode,FW will dump information into share buffer
0: Normal mode
1: Debug mode
186001F4h R_BE_UDM1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM1_ERROR_ADDR The address that been accessed and cause bus error or cpu exception
If B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0001'b , it means RXI300 Error Log Register
If B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0010'b , it means CPU BadVAddr(Coprocessor 0 General Register Addr=8)
If B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0011'b , it's meanlingness
BIT 15:0 is temperally used by h2c/ch2 counter. No impact while error happend
[15:12] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM1_HALMAC_C2H_ENQ_CNT Halmac C2H EnQ counter
[11:8] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM1_HALMAC_H2C_DEQ_CNT Halmac H2C DeQ counter
[7:4] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM1_WCPU_C2H_ENQ_CNT FW C2H EnQ counter
[3:0] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM1_WCPU_H2C_DEQ_CNT FW H2C DeQ counter
186001F8h R_BE_UDM2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM2_EPC_RA The address of the next instruction to be executed following return from the exception handler or subroutine.
If B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0001'b/0011'b , it means RA.
If B_BE_HALT_C2H_ERROR_SENARIO = 0010'b , it means Return EPC
186001FCh R_BE_UDM3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_UDM3 User Defined Message
18600218h R_BE_LDO_AON_CTRL0
[31:29] R/W 100 B_BE_reg_BOD_l_L 000 2.4
001 2.455813953
010 2.514285714
011 2.575609756
100 2.64
101 2.707692308
110 2.778947368
111 2.933333333
[28:26] R/W 010 B_BE_reg_BOD_h_L 000 2.455813953
001 2.514285714
010 2.575609756
011 2.64
100 2.707692308
101 2.778947368
110 2.933333333
111 3.105882353
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_enb_bg_fast_l 0:bg fast setting
1:bg with low leakage
Digital can modify it.
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_en_bg_pulse_l 1:improve BG PSRR
[23:22] R/W 00 B_BE_BG_CURRENT_L BG Iq current
00:100n
01:163n
10:233n
[21:19] R/W 100 B_BE_BG_R2_L BG R2 tune for temperature
[18:16] R/W 100 B_BE_BG_R1_L BG R1 tune for temperature
[15:14] R/W 0 B_BE_AONLDO_CURRENT_L LDO OP current
00:50n
01:100n
10:150n
11:200n
[13:12] R/W 00 B_BE_AONLDO_CAP_L Compensation cap
00:MOS CAP
01:MOS CAP+4.3p
10:MOS CAP+8.6p
11:MOS CAP+12.9p
[11] R/W 1 B_BE_CK12M_EN 1: enable 12M ring
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_CK12M_SEL ( NO autoload )
1: 12MHz 0:500kHz
12M and 500K選擇，選擇500K的時候12M一定要開
12M是給選擇用邏輯電路的CLK，選完後就可以關"		 No autoload
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_REG_OTP_PC33_VODIS // OTP PWRCUT VOUT DISCHARGE
// 1'b0 : no discharge (default)
// 1'b1 : discharge
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_SLEEP Enable LDO09H sleep mode
0 : disable (default)
1 : enable"
[7:4] R/W 0110 B_BE_AONLDO_VOSEL_H AONLDO08 voltage select
VREF 0P500V 0P6V
0000: 0.500V 0.600V
0001: 0.596V 0.715V
0010: 0.609V 0.730V
0011: 0.622V 0.747V
0100: 0.636V 0.764V
0101: 0.651V 0.781V
0110: 0.667V 0.800V
0111: 0.683V 0.819V
1000: 0.700V 0.840V
1001: 0.718V 0.861V
1010: 0.737V 0.884V
1011: 0.757V 0.908V
1100: 0.778V 0.933V
1101: 0.800V 0.960V
1110: 0.823V 0.988V
1111: 0.848V 1.018V"
[3:2] R/W 0 B_BE_AONLDO_DUMMY [REGU][AONLDO] dummy
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_LV_POR_VREF_SEL AONLDO VREF_SEL
0 (default) VREF = 0P600V
1 VREF = 0P500V"
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_AONLDO_VREF_SEL AONLDO VREF_SEL
0 (default) VREF = 0P600V
1 VREF = 0P500V"

18600270h R_BE_WLAN_XTAL_SI_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_CMD_POLL 此bit要寫bit為1才代表觸發CMD, 下完CMD後要check此bit為0,才代表HW有把CMD完成
(HW完成後需要把此bit clear為0)		 No autoload
[30:28] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_CHIPID CHIP ID No autoload
[27:26] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD No autoload
[25:24] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_MODE Control mode :
2'b00 : normal write
2'b01 : normal read
2'b10 : fast write
2'b11 : fast read		 No autoload
[23:16] R/W 0xFF B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_BITMASK Bitmask :
1 : 需要寫入的bit要填1
0 : 不需寫入的bit要填0
如果bitmask = 0, 傳送到A-die志凱那邊,應該是都不寫入,預期是寫入無效的case		 No autoload
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_DATA Read data or write data
Normal mode : data bit is 8 bit
SI_data = B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_DATA[15:8]
Fast mode : data bit is 3 bit
SI_data = B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_DATA[15:13] (MSB)		 No autoload
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_ADDR Address (WL可以控制範圍 :
Read : 0x00~0xFF
Write : 0x00~0xFF)
Normal mode : address it 8 bit
SI_addr = B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_ADDR[7:0]
Fast mode : address it 2 bit
SI_addr = B_BE_WL_XTAL_SI_ADDR[7:6] (MSB)		 No autoload
18600274h R_BE_WLAN_XTAL_SI_Config
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_XTAL_SI_RST XTAL_SI reset
0 : release reset
1 : reset
Software control 1’b1 & 1’b0. (no auto clear) (0->1->0)
若XTAL_SI在傳輸過程中, 發生force reset
這時候, XTAL_SI_EN訊號應該被clear,
所以, 理論上應該不會有問題才對
[30:11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10] RO 0 B_BE_BT_XTAL_SI_ERR_FLAG Error flag :
WLAN: 目前應該沒有
BT :當write address不是0xC0~0xFF時,會舉ERR flag
[9] RO 0 B_BE_WL_XTAL_GNT 1 : 目前XTAL_SI grant to WLAN
[8] RO 0 B_BE_BT_XTAL_GNT 1 : 目前XTAL_SI grant to BT
[7:2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_XTAL_SI_CLK_DIV2 0 : XTAL_SI_CLK = 6M
1 : XTAL_SI_CLK = 6M/2 = 3M
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_XTAL_SI_ADDR_NOT_CHK 0 : WLAN check BT過來的write address offset是否在0xC0~0xFF, 若不是就return,不執行CMD
會舉ERR flag並把bt_xtal_rdy設為1
1 : WLAN不check BT過來的write address offset

000: 8 / 200n / 300n

186002A0h R_BE_SYM_ANAPAR_XTAL_MODE_DECODER
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_WiFi_FORCE_XTAL_HPMODE Force XTAL mode in high performance mode
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_bypass_Adie_PWR_READY 0 : check A-die power ready 訊號
1 : bypass A-die power ready 訊號
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_bypass_XTAL_CHG_OK 0 : check XTAL_change_OK 訊號
1 : bypass XTAL_change_OK 訊號
[28] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_ADIE_EN A-Die power ctrl by SW. Only vaild when a_die_ctrl_by_sw = 1.
1: A-Die force enable. 0: A-Die force disable.
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_ADIE_CTRL_BY_SW Enable A-Die power ctrl by SW.
1: control by SW. 0: control by HW.
[25:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[20:19] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] RO 0 B_BE_XTAL_MODE_Final HW結合WLAN/BT state最終要給XTAL的結果
0x2A0[1]是單純WLAN的結果
[17] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[16:15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] RO 0 B_BE_XTAL_CLK_CHANGE_OK XTAL clock change OK
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_XTAL_POW_XTAL_LPS XTAL_POW_XTAL_LPS
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_XTAL_MODE xtal mode define:
{POW_XTAL, XTAL_MODE, POW_XTAL_LPS}
[efuse for power on ]
[0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
186002ACh R_BE_GMAC_LDO_SYS
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7:5] R/W 0 RSVD
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_GMAC_VPULSE_LDO VOULSE enable. 1 → 0
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_POW_LDO LDO enable. 0 → 1
[2:1] R/W 01 B_BE_GMAC_SW_LDO_OUT LDO out selection. Default=01
00=0.75V, 01=0.8V, 10=0.85V, 11=0.9V
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_SW_LDO2PWRCUT LDO power cut. Default=0
0=power cut off, 1=power cut on
186002B0h R_BE_GMAC_PLL_SYS_0
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_pow_erc erc enable. 0 → 1
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_pow_pll (need pwl signal) 0 → 1
[28:26] R/W 011 B_BE_GMAC_reg_cp_bia charge pump current selection . Default=5uA CP current select :
000: Icp=1.25uA, 001: Icp=2.5uA, 010: Icp=3.75uA, 011: Icp=5uA; 100: Icp=6.25uA, 101: Icp=7.5uA, 110: Icp=8.75uA, 111: Icp=10uA;
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_dogenb 0: watch dog on, 1: watch dog off
[24:22] R/W 000 B_BE_GMAC_reg_ps phase selector
[21] R/W 1 B_BE_GMAC_reg_psen phase selector enable
[20:19] R/W 01 B_BE_GMAC_reg_cp_set Cp selection. Default=1p 00: Cp=0.5p, 01: Cp=1p, 10: Cp=1.5p, 11: Cp=2p
[18:16] R/W 010 B_BE_GMAC_reg_rs_set Rs selection. Default=11k 000: Rs=15k, 001: Rs=13k, 010: Rs=11k, 011: Rs=9k, 100: Rs=7k, 101: Rs=5k, 110: Rs=3k, 111: Rs=1k;
[15:14] R/W 10 B_BE_GMAC_reg_cs_sel Cs selection. Default=30p 00: Cs=20p, 01: Cs=25p, 10: Cs=30p, 11: Cs=35p
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_reg_fref_edge 0:fref, 1:frefb
[12] R/W 1 B_BE_GMAC_reg_ck_en output clk enable
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_reg_ck_en_d4 output clk div 4 enable
[10:8] R/W 000 RSVD
[7] R/W 1 B_BE_GMAC_reg_xtal_manual_mode reg_xtal_maunal_mode. Default=1 0: reg_xtal_sel<3:0> is controlled by REG, xtal_div_sel is controlled by mapping table. 1: reg_xtal_sel<3:0>=4'b1111, xtal_div_sel is controlled by reg_xtal_div_sel_maunal<1:0>
[6:5] R/W 00 B_BE_GMAC_reg_xtal_div_sel_manual input divider selection in xtal maunal mode. Default=00 00=/1, 10=/2, 11=/4
40MHz XTAL=00
50MHz XTAL=00
60MHz XTAL=00
80MHz XTAL=10
[4:3] R/W 00 B_BE_GMAC_reg_vc_thl VC voltage, Default=00 00: VC=1/4Vdd, 01: VC=1/2Vdd, 10=3/4Vdd, 11: VC=Vdd
[2:1] R/W 01 B_BE_GMAC_c3_set C3 selection. Default=1p 00: 0.5p, 01: 1p, 10: Cs=1.5p, 11: 2p
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_GMAC_r3_set Rs selection. Default=1k 0: 0 Ohm, 1: 1k Ohm
186002B4h R_BE_GMAC_PLL_SYS_1
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:20] R/W 0000 B_BE_GMAC_TBASE_FREQ now is empty
[19:16] R/W 0000 B_BE_GMAC_STEP_FREQ step size selection for switching freq. 0000: 2^5 0001: 2^6 0010: 2^7 0011: 2^8 0100: 2^9 0101: 2^10 0110: 2^11 0111: 2^12
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_TRIG_FREQ freq. step up or step down enable
[14:11] R/W 0000 B_BE_GMAC_BB_DBG_SEL_AFE_SDM
[10:5] R/W 001010 B_BE_GMAC_DIVN_SDM PLL out frequency=250MHz
40MHz XTAL=001010 (default)
50MHz XTAL=001000
60MHz XTAL=000110
80MHz XTAL=001010
[4:1] R/W 1000 B_BE_GMAC_reg_ck_out_sel output divider selection. Default=1000 0000=/1, 1000=/2, 1100=/8, 1110=/16, 1111=/32
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_GMAC_cp_double charge pump current double or not 0: no double 1: double
186002B8h R_BE_GMAC_PLL_SYS_2
[31:19] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_STEP ssc step size selection.
[18:7] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_TBASE ssc freq selection
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_EN_SSC ssc enable. Default=0
[5:0] R/W 0 RSVD
186002BCh R_BE_GMAC_PLL_SYS_3
[31:19] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_F0F_SDM PLL out frequency=250MHz
40MHz XTAL=0000000000000(default)
50MHz XTAL=0000000000000
60MHz XTAL=1010101010101
80MHz XTAL=0000000000000
[18:16] R/W 100 B_BE_GMAC_F0N_SDM PLL out frequency=250MHz
40MHz XTAL=100(default)
50MHz XTAL=000
60MHz XTAL=010
80MHz XTAL=100
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_GMAC_ORDER_SDM SDM order. Default=0
0=second order, 1=third order
[14:0] R/W 0 RSVD

[24:22] R 000 B_BE_GMAC_reg_ps_F phase selector
[21] R 1 B_BE_GMAC_reg_psen_F phase selector enable

[18:16] R 010 B_BE_GMAC_reg_rs_set_F Rs selection. Default=11k 000: Rs=15k, 001: Rs=13k, 010: Rs=11k, 011: Rs=9k, 100: Rs=7k, 101: Rs=5k, 110: Rs=3k, 111: Rs=1k;
[15:14] R 10 B_BE_GMAC_reg_cs_sel_F Cs selection. Default=30p 00: Cs=20p, 01: Cs=25p, 10: Cs=30p, 11: Cs=35p
