1860B100h R_BE_HAXI_DBG_CTRL
[31:25] RO 7'b0 RSVD RSVD
[24:16] R/W 9'b0 B_BE_HAXI_DBG_SEL 1: enable pcie rxdma at check descriptor state which can't trigger rx stuck.
0: disable.
[15:3] RO 13'b0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_en_chkdsc_no_rx_stuck 1: enable pcie rxdma at check descriptor state which can't trigger rx stuck.
0: disable.
[1] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_en_fifo_full_no_tx_stuck 1: Async FIFO full does NOT trigger PCIe stuck.
[0] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_en_dbg_stuck 1: Enable PCIe stuck debug.
1860B104h R_BE_DBG_ERR_FLAG
[31:12] RO 25'b0 RSVD RSVD
[11] RO 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_MSTR_WDT_TO [11] : axi master watchdog timeout
[10] RO 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_ROQ1_FULL [10] : ch6 (ROQ1) R/W pointer not enough
[9] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_RPQ1_FULL [9] : ch5 (RPQ1) R/W pointer not enough
[8] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_RXQ1_FULL [8] : ch4 (RXQ1) R/W pointer not enough
[7] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_ROQ0_FULL [7] : ch2 (ROQ0) R/W pointer not enough
[6] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_RPQ0_FULL [6] : ch1 (RPQ0) R/W pointer not enough
[5] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_RXQ0_FULL [5] : ch0 (RXQ0) R/W pointer not enough
[4] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_RX_STUCK_V1 PCIe RX stuck, write 1 clear
[3] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_TX_STUCK_V1 PCIe TX stuck, write 1 clear
[2] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_RXP1_ERR0 Append length > Rx part 1 buffer size, write 1 clear
[1] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_TXBD_LEN0 Length of TXBD which NOT cross 4KB boundary is 0, write 1 clear
[0] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_HAXI_TXBD_4KBOUD_LENERR Length of TXBD which cross 4KB boundary is NOT 0, write 1 clear
1860B108h R_BE_HAXI_INFO
[31:2] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] RO 1'b0 B_BE_RXDMA_IDLE When PCIE RXDMA finishes on-going operation, PCIE will set idle state to 1.
[0] RO 1'b0 B_BE_TXDMA_IDLE When PCIE TXDMA finishes on-going operation, PCIE will set idle state to 1.
1860B10Ch R_BE_HAXI_MST_WDT_TIMEOUT_SEL
[31:5] RO 30'b0 RSVD RSVD
[4:0] R/W 5'b0 B_BE_AXI_MST_WDT_TIMEOUT_SEL 5'd0 : disable axi master watchdog
5'd1~31: 1~31 ms timeout
1860B180h R_BE_INT_MIT_TX
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_CH12_SEL 1: Select CH12 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH12 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_CH11_SEL 1: Select CH11 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH11 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_CH10_SEL 1: Select CH10 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH10 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_CH9_SEL 1: Select CH9 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH9 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_CH8_SEL 1: Select CH8 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore CH8 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH7_SEL 1: Select ACH7 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH7 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH6_SEL 1: Select ACH6 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH6 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH5_SEL 1: Select ACH5 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH5 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH4_SEL 1: Select ACH4 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH4 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH3_SEL 1: Select ACH3 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH3 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH2_SEL 1: Select ACH2 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH2 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH1_SEL 1: Select ACH1 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH1 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_TXMIT_ACH0_SEL 1: Select ACH0 to join TX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore ACH0 in TX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] R/W 0 B_BE_MIT_TXTIMER_UNIT Timer unit for setting Interrupt Migration TX timer.
For MAC clock is 160MHz: (80MHZ will multiply by 2)
00: 25.5 us, 01: 50 us, 10: 100 us, 11: 200 us
Combine with [7:0] to obtain time value of TX timer.
ex : this reg. = 0x00030001, TX timer = 3x205 = 615 us
Note: Timeout variation is +- 1 timer unit
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_MIT_TXCOUNTER_MATCH When the buffered TX packet number is matched, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable TX counter
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MIT_TXTIMER_MATCH Multiple value of TX timer unit.
Combine with [17:16] to obtain time value of TX timer.
When the counting time matches or exceeds this setting, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable TX timer
1860B184h R_BE_INT_MIT_RX
[31:22] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_RXMIT_RXQ1P2_SEL 1: Select RXQ1 part 2 (RX in packet mode) to join RX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore RXQ1 part 2 (RX in packet mode) in RX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_RXMIT_RXQ1P1_SEL (only valid in separation mode)
1: Select RXQ1 part 1 to join RX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore RXQ1 part 1 in RX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_RXMIT_RXQ0P2_SEL 1: Select RXQ0 part 2 (RX in packet mode) to join RX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore RXQ0 part 2 (RX in packet mode) in RX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_RXMIT_RXQ0P1_SEL (only valid in separation mode)
1: Select RXQ0 part 1 to join RX interrupt mitigation.
0: Ignore RXQ0 part 1 in RX interrupt mitigation statistic.
[17:16] R/W 0 B_BE_MIT_RXTIMER_UNIT Timer unit for setting Interrupt Migration RX timer.
For MAC clock is 160MHz: (80MHZ will multiply by 2)
00: 25.5 us, 01: 50 us, 10: 100 us, 11: 200 us
Combine with [7:0] to obtain time value of TX timer.
ex : this reg. = 0x00030001, TX timer = 3x205 = 615 us
Note: Timeout variation is +- 1 timer unit
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_MIT_RXCOUNTER_MATCH When the buffered RX packet number is matched, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable RX counter
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MIT_RXTIMER_MATCH Multiple value of RX timer unit.
Combine with [17:16] to obtain time value of RX timer.
When the counting time matches or exceeds this setting, the interrupt is then issued.
0x00: disable RX timer
1860B200h R_BE_RXBD_RWPTR_CLR1
[31:7] RO 25'b0 RSVD RSVD
[6] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_CLR_ROQ1_IDX [6] : Clear ROQ1(ch6) cpu and dma index, write 1 and hardware auto clear
[5] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_CLR_RPQ1_IDX [5] : Clear RPQ1(ch5) cpu and dma index, write 1 and hardware auto clear
[4] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_CLR_RXQ1_IDX [4] : Clear RXQ1(ch4) cpu and dma index, write 1 and hardware auto clear
[3] RO 1'b0 RSVD [3] : RSVD
[2] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_CLR_ROQ0_IDX [2] : Clear ROQ0(ch2) cpu and dma index, write 1 and hardware auto clear
[1] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_CLR_RPQ0_IDX [1] : Clear RPQ0(ch1) cpu and dma index, write 1 and hardware auto clear
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_CLR_RXQ0_IDX [0] : Clear RXQ0(ch0) cpu and dma index, write 1 and hardware auto clear

3'b011: 4
3'b100: 5
3'b101: 6
3'b110: 7
3'b111: 8

[1] RO 1'b0 B_BE_RPQ0_BUSY [1]: RPQ0 DMA is busy.
[0] RO 1'b0 B_BE_RXQ0_BUSY [0]: RXQ0 DMA is busy.

1860B504h R_BE_WR_PRECOST_REQ
[31:13] R/W 19'b0 RSVD RSVD
[12:0] R/W 13'b0 B_BE_REQ_CH_PG request precost page
1860B700h R_BE_HCI_FC_CTRL
[31:18] RO 14'b0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] R/W 2'b0 B_BE_wd_page_mode temp WD page mode for dispatcher return wd page by parsing RXD
2'b00: No return page mode
2'b01: 1 page mode
2'b10: 2 page mode
2'b11: 3 page mode
[15:14] RW 2'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_CH14_FULL_COND HCI FC H2DCMD (CH14) buffer full condition in pcie with data cpu mode (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[13:12] R/W 2'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_TWD_FULL_COND HCI FC Temp WD (CH0~7+CH13) buffer full condition in pcie with data cpu mode (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[11:10] R/W 2'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_CH12_FULL_COND HCI FC CH12 full condition (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[9:8] R/W 2'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_WP_CH811_FULL_COND HCI FC WP full condition of CH 8~11 (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[7:6] R/W 2'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_WP_CH07_FULL_COND HCI FC WP full condition of CH 0~7 (xx times preRSVDcost setting). 0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[5:4] R/W 2'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_WD_FULL_COND HCI FC WD full condition (xx times preRSVDcost setting) for precost_twd_pg, precost_wd_pg and precost_ch13_pg.
0: 1 preRSVDcost. 1: 2 preRSVDcost. 2: 3 preRSVDcost. 3: 4 preRSVDcost.
[3] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_CH12_EN 1: Enable CH12 flow control; 0: Disable.
[2:1] R/W 2'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_MODE 2: SDIO mode, only record used page of each channel
1: STF for PCIe and USB (CH + WP) mode
0: Payload from host (CH) mode
[0] R/W 1'b0 B_BE_HCI_FC_EN 1: Enable HCI flow control (except for CH12 which is enabled by B_AX_HCI_FC_CH12_EN)
0: Disable and reset HCI flow control
1860B704h R_BE_CH_PAGE_CTRL

[24:16] R/W 9'b0 B_BE_PREC_PAGE_CH12 PreRSVDcost page number for channel 12
[15:9] RO 7'b0 RSVD RSVD
[8:0] R/W 9'b0 B_BE_PREC_PAGE_CH011 PreRSVDcost page number for channel 0 ~ 11

1860E300h R_BE_BTC_CFG
31 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_EN Enable BT coex
30 RO 0 RSVD
29 R/W 0 B_BE_EN_EXT_BT_PINMUX Enable external interface
28 R0 0 B_BE_BTC_RST Reset BTC circuit state
write 1T pulse to reset HW design, rdata don't care this bit.
27 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_DBG_SRC_SEL 0: Debug port is from BT1
1: Debug port is from BT2
26 RO 0 RSVD
25:24 R/W 9 B_BE_BTC_MODE 0: RTK mode
1: CSR 3-wire mode
2, 3: RSVD
23:18 RO 0 RSVD
17 R/W 0 B_BE_INV_WL_ACT2 0: wl_act2 = wl_act2
1: wl_act2 = ~wl_act2
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL 影響 WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX 輸出
(WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX = GNT_BT_BB0 & BTS1_BB_SEL_S1_TRX & B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL)
15:8 R/W 4 B_BE_COEX_DLY_CLK WL module 參考 PTA 訊號所需的delay時間
7 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_RX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_RX
6 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_TX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_TX
5 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2 1: Ignore GNT_BT2
4:3 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_DBG_SEL
2 R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_BTC_CLK_G Control BTCOEX module clk gating disable
0:clok gating
1:disable clock gating
1 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL 0 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX
1 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX & GNT_WL
0 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_SRC 0: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC0
1: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC1
1860E304h R_BE_RTK_MODE_CFG_V1
31:25 RO 0 RSVD
24 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_BLE_EN_V1 0: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & BT_TX, GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & BT_RX
1: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & (BT_TX | BT_BLE), GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & (BT_RX | BT_BLE)
23:17 RO 0 RSVD
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_ULTRA_EN Config GNT_BT & GNT_WL when BT_CMD_ID = 0 & BT_CMD_DATA[3] = 1
15:14 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_L_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
13:12 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_L_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
11:10 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_H_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
9:8 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_H_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
7:0 R/W 0 B_BE_SAMPLE_CLK The number of clocks HW detects RTK-command is 0 or 1
1860E308h R_BE_CSR_MODE_CFG
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23:16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_TIME_CNT_V1 The number of clocks of 1us
15:12 RO 0 RSVD Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
11:8 R/W 0 B_BE_CSR_DELAY The number of clocks of BT_STATE delay
7:4 R/W 0 B_BE_CSR_TRX The number of clocks of CSR-TRX(T2)
3:0 R/W 0 B_BE_CSR_PRI The number of clocks of CSR-PRI(T1)
31:0 RO 0xDEAD_BEEF RSVD
1860E310h R_BE_BT_CNT_CFG
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_CNT_RST Write 1 to reset BT_ACT_STATISTICS counters
0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_CNT_EN When this bit is set, the BT_CNT starts counting
1860E314h R_BE_BT_CNT_HI
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT_HI_RX Counters for BT high priority RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT_HI_TX Counters for BT high priority TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860E318h R_BE_BT_CNT_LOW
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT_LOW_RX Counters for BT low RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT_LOW_TX Counters for BT low TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860E320h R_BE_RTK_CMD_ERR_RPT
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 W1C 0 B_BE_RTK_CMD_CRC Indicate the RTK mode command is CRC error
0 W1C 0 B_BE_RTK_CMD_INC Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
1860E324h R_BE_COEX_WL_REQ
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_NULL_HI WL TX NULL 時為 High-priority TX
22 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BCN_HI WL TX Beacon 時為 High-priority TX
21 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_NDP_HI WL TX NDPA/NDP 時為 High-priority TX
20 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_PROT_HI WL TX RTS/CTS2SELF 時為 High-priority TX
19 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_CF_END_HI WL TX CF-END 時為 High-priority TX
18 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BAR_HI WL TX BAR/MBAR 時為 High-priority TX
17 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_TRI_HI WL TX Trigger/Basic Trigger Frame 時為 High-priority TX
16 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_VOQ_HI WL TX VO-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
15 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_VIQ_HI WL TX VI-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
14 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BEQ_HI WL TX BE-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
13 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BKQ_HI WL TX BK-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
12 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_MGQ_HI WL TX MGNT-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
11 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_HIQ_HI WL TX Hi-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
10 R/W 0 B_BE_RSP_ACK_HI WL TX CBA/MBA/ACK/CTS 時為 High-priority TX
9 R/W 0 B_BE_RSP_CSI_HI WL TX CSI 時為 High-priority TX
8 R/W 0 B_BE_RSP_BSR_BQR_HI WL TX BSR/BQR 時為 High-priority TX
7:5 RO 0 RSVD
4:3 R/W 0 B_BE_PRI_MASK_TX_TIME If the estimate TX time larger than B_BE_PRI_MASK_TX_TIME, the TX is high priority TX.
2'b00: disable
2'b01: 4 ms
2'b10: 6 ms
2'b11: 8 ms
2:1 R/W 0 B_BE_PRI_MASK_RX_TIME_V1 If the estimate RX time larger than B_BE_PRI_MASK_RX_TIME, the RX is high priority RX.
2'b00: disable
2'b01: 4 ms
2'b10: 6 ms
2'b11: 8 ms
0 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_RX 0: CCA-RX
1: Idle RX
1860E330h R_BE_BTC_COEX_SEL
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1:0 R/W 0 B_BE_COEX_TBL_SEL 2'b00: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_0
2'b01: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_1
2'b10: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_2
2'b11: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_3
1860E334h R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_0
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_0
1860E338h R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_1
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_1
1860E33Ch R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_2
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_2
1860E340h R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_3
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_3
1860E344h R_BE_BT_BREAK_TABLE
31:16 R/W 0 B_BE_BREAK_WL
15:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BREAK_BT
1860E348h R_BE_GNT_SW_CTRL
31:26 RO 0 RSVD
25 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_ACT2_VAL Valid when B_BE_WL_ACT2_CTRL = 1
0: wl_act2 = 0
1: wl_act2 = 1
24 R/W 1 B_BE_WL_ACT2_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control wl_act2
1: Enable SW control wl_act2
23 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_ACT_VAL Valid when B_BE_WL_ACT_CTRL = 1
0: wl_act = 0
1: wl_act = 1
22 R/W 1 B_BE_WL_ACT_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control wl_act
1: Enable SW control wl_act
21 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_rx_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_bt_rx_bb1 = 1
20 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb1
19 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_tx_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_bt_tx_bb1 = 1
18 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb1
17 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_rx_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_bt_rx_bb0 = 1
16 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb0
15 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_tx_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_bt_tx_bb0 = 1
14 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb0
13 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_rx = 0
1: gnt_wl_rx = 1
12 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_rx
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_rx
11 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_TX_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_TX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_tx = 0
1: gnt_wl_tx = 1
10 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_TX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_tx
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_tx
9 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_bt_bb1 = 1
8 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_bb1
7 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_wl_bb1 = 1
6 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_bb1
5 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_bt_bb0 = 1
4 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_bb0
3 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_wl_bb0 = 1
2 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_bb0
1 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_bb = 0
1: gnt_wl_bb = 1
0 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_bb_pwr
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_bb
1860E34Ch R_BE_GNT_VAL
31:13 RO 0 RSVD
12 RO 0 B_BE_WL_ACT2 The value of wl_act2
11 RO 0 B_BE_WL_ACT The value of wl_act
10 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1 The value of gnt_bt_rx_bb1
9 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1 The value of gnt_bt_tx_bb1
8 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0 The value of gnt_bt_rx_bb0
7 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0 The value of gnt_bt_tx_bb0
6 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX The value of gnt_wl_rx
5 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_TX The value of gnt_wl_tx
4 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1 The value of gnt_bt_bb1
3 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0 The value of gnt_bt_bb0
2 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1 The value of gnt_wl_bb1
1 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0 The value of gnt_wl_bb0
0 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR The value of gnt_wl_bb_pwr
1860E400h R_BE_BTC2_CFG
31 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC2_EN Enable BT coex
30 RO 0 RSVD
29 R/W 0 B_BE_EN_EXT_BT2_PINMUX Enable external interface
28 W1C 0 B_BE_BTC2_RST Reset BTC circuit state
27 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC2_DBG_SRC_SEL 0: Debug port is from BT1
1: Debug port is from BT2
26 RO 0 RSVD
25:24 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC2_MODE 0: RTK mode
1: CSR 3-wire mode
2, 3: RSVD
23:18 RO 0 RSVD
17 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_INV_WL_ACT 0: wl_act2 = wl_act2
1: wl_act2 = ~wl_act2
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL 影響 WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX 輸出
(WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX = GNT_BT_BB0 & BTS1_BB_SEL_S1_TRX & B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL)
15:8 R/W 4 B_BE_COEX_DLY_CLK WL module 參考 PTA 訊號所需的 delay 時間
7 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_RX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_RX
6 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_TX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_TX
5 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2 1: Ignore GNT_BT2
4:3 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_DBG_SEL
2 R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_BTC_CLK_G Control BTCOEX module clk gating disable
0:clok gating
1:disable clock gating
1 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL 0 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX
1 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX & GNT_WL
0 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_SRC 0: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC0
1: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC1
1860E404h R_BE_BT2_RTK_MODE_CFG
31:25 RO 0 RSVD
24 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_BLE_EN 0: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & BT_TX, GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & BT_RX
1: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & (BT_TX | BT_BLE), GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & (BT_RX | BT_BLE)
23:17 RO 0 RSVD
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_ULTRA_EN Config GNT_BT & GNT_WL when BT_CMD_ID = 0 & BT_CMD_DATA[3] = 1
15:14 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_L_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
13:12 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_L_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
11:10 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_H_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
9:8 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_H_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
7:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_SAMPLE_CLK The number of clocks HW detects RTK-command is 0 or 1
1860E408h R_BE_BT2_CSR_MODE_CFG
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23:16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_TIME_CNT The number of clocks of 1us
15:12 RO 0 RSVD Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
11:8 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CSR_DELAY The number of clocks of BT_STATE delay
7:4 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CSR_TRX The number of clocks of CSR-TRX(T2)
3:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CSR_PRI The number of clocks of CSR-PRI(T1)
31:0 RO 0xDEAD_BEEF RSVD
1860E410h R_BE_BT2_CNT_CFG
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CNT_RST Write 1 to reset BT_ACT_STATISTICS counters
0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CNT_EN When this bit is set, the BT_CNT starts counting
1860E414h R_BE_BT2_CNT_HI
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT2_HI_RX Counters for BT high priority RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT2_HI_TX Counters for BT high priority TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860E418h R_BE_BT2_CNT_LOW
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT2_LOW_RX Counters for BT low RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT2_LOW_TX Counters for BT low TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
1860E420h R_BE_BT2_RTK_CMD_ERR_RPT
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 W1C 0 B_BE_BT2_RTK_CMD_CRC Indicate the RTK mode command is CRC error
0 W1C 0 B_BE_BT2_RTK_CMD_INC Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
31:0 R/W 0 RSVD

31:2 RO 0 RSVD

1861008Ch R_BE_PTCL_RRSR0
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_HE BIT[31:24] = {(msb) HE 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_VHT BIT[23:16] = {(msb) VHT 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_HT BIT[15:8]={(msb) HT MCS7, MCS6, …, MCS0}
[7:0] R/W 0x15 B_BE_RRSR_OFDM BIT[7:0] = { (msb) OFDM54, OFDM48, …,OFDM6}
18610090h R_BE_PTCL_RRSR1
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_EHT BIT[23:16] = {(msb) EHT 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[15:13] R/W 0 RSVD
[12:8] R/W 0x1 B_BE_RRSR_RATE_EN Enabled response rate mode BIT[3:0] = {EHT rate, HE rate,VHT rate,HT rate, OFDM/CCK rate}
[7:6] R/W 0 B_BE_RSC Response frame sub-channel configuration. Response frames (CTS, ACK, BA) are transmitted in the following condition. 00: Primary 20Mhz BW(0x483[3:0] ) 01: Follow Rx packet BW mode. 10: Duplicate mode. (ofdm rate only, others bw20) 11: rsvd
[5:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0x5 B_BE_RRSR_CCK BIT[3:0] = {(msb) CCK11, …, CCK1}

18610100h R_BE_FWC00IMR
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER6 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_SND_RDY_INT_EN Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RP_END_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx period end.
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that BCN_TO_CNT >= BCN_TO_CNT_THD.
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx Bcn hit.
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT_EN When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT_EN Enable BCNQ lock interrupt source.
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE7_INT_EN Enable MACID 224~255 power change interrupt source.
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE6_INT_EN Enable MACID 192~223 power change interrupt source.
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE5_INT_EN Enable MACID 160~191 power change interrupt source.
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE4_INT_EN Enable MACID 128~159 power change interrupt source.
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_CTWEnd_INT_EN Enable the CTWindow End 0 interrupt source.
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_TSF32_TOGGLE_INT_EN Enable TSF_BIT32_TOGGLE interrupt source.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_RFON_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt source.
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_RFOFF_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt source.
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT_EN Enable MACID 96~127 power change interrupt source.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT_EN Enable MACID 64~95 power change interrupt source.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT_EN Enable MACID 32~63 power change interrupt source.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT_EN Enable MACID 0~31 power change interrupt source.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN If B_BE_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTM_INT_EN If B_BE_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_FTM_PTT_EN
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_TXFTM_INT_EN If B_BE_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT_EN Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXDONE_INT_EN Enable Rx Packet done interrupt source.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER3 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER2 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER1 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER0 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
18610104h R_BE_FWC00ISR
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT PSTIMER6 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_SND_RDY_INT Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RP_END_INT This event means Rx period end, start to enter LPS.
When the below event happened, issue this interrupt.
- ( (Rx Bcn timeout) | (Bcn hit check done) | (BcnNoHit) )
[27] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT When BCN_TO_CNT > BCN_TO_CNT_THD, issue this interrupt to wake WCPU
[26] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT When Rx Bcn and IE_HIT or BCAID_HIT or UNIAID_HIT, this interrupt is issued.
[25] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT BCNQ lock interrupt.
[23] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE7_INT MACID 224~255 power change interrupt.
[22] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE6_INT MACID 192~223 power change interrupt.
[21] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE5_INT MACID 160~191 power change interrupt.
[20] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE4_INT MACID 128~159 power change interrupt.
[19] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, CTWindow End 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[18] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, TSF Timer BIT32 toggle indication interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[17] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[16] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT MACID 96~127 power change interrupt.
[14] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT MACID 64~95 power change interrupt.
[13] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT MACID 32~63 power change interrupt.
[12] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT MACID 0~31 power change interrupt.
[11] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT If B_BE_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTM_INT If B_BE_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_FTM_PTT_INT
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_TXFTM_INT If B_BE_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXDONE_INT Rx Packet done interrupt.
[5] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT PSTIMER5 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT PSTIMER4 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT PSTIMER3 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT PSTIMER2 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT PSTIMER1 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT PSTIMER0 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
18610108h R_BE_FWC01IMR
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD
[28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27] R/W 0 RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_SW_TXOK1_INT_EN R_FS_P0_SW_TXOK1_INT_EN
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_SW_TXOK0_INT_EN R_FS_P0_SW_TXOK0_INT_EN
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT_EN Enable RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR) interrupt source(Port0)
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF1MRR0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port0)
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port0)
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TRIGGER_PKT_INT_EN Enable TRIGGER_PKT interrupt source.(Port0)
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_EOSP_INT_EN EOSP_INT interrupt mask (HW do not check EOSP, wrong ?).(Port0)
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TXPKTIN_EN
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL1_INT_EN Enable TX null 1 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL0_INT_EN Enable TX null 0 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCNOK_INT_EN When this bit is enable, the interrupt is issued when RX beacon frame occurs.(Port0)
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_RXTSFDIFF_INT_EN Enable RX TSF difference detection. (Port0)
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNERR_INT_EN Enable TX beacon Error interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNOK_INT_EN Enable TX beacon OK interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_HIQWND_INT_EN Enable HIQ window end interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source from the exact TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTTERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by TBTTERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_BCNERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
1861010Ch R_BE_FWC01ISR
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[29] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[28] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[27] R/W1C 0 RSVD

[22] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT The interrupt is issued while RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR)(Port0)
[21] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF1MRR0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port0)
[20] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port0)
[19] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[18] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[17] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TRIGGER_PKT_INT The interrupt is issued while the pkt is Tx ok which Tri_Frame bit of TXDESC is equal to 1.(Port0)
[16] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_EOSP_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx pkt's EOSP bit = 1.(Port0)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TXPKTIN_INT
[14] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL1_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 1 packet done.(Port0)
[13] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL0_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 0 packet done.(Port0)
[12] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[11] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[10] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[9] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCNOK_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving beacon frame.(Port0)
[7] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[6] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_RXTSFDIFF_INT The interrupt is issued while RX TSF difference is lager than threshold value. (Port0)
[5] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNERR_INT TX beacon Error interrupt(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[4] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNOK_INT TX beacon OK interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[3] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_HIQWND_INT HIQ window end interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[2] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTT_INT The exact TBTT time interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTTERLY_INT This interrupt is issued at the time set by TBTTERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_BCNERLY_INT This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)

[4] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P3_TXBCNOK_INT Enable TX beacon OK interrupt source.(Port3)

[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT_EN Enable RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR) interrupt source(Port4)
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXMTF1MRR0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port4)
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXMTF0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port4)
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port4)
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port4)
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TRIGGER_PKT_INT_EN Enable TRIGGER_PKT interrupt source.(Port4)
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_EOSP_INT_EN EOSP_INT interrupt mask (HW do not check EOSP, wrong ?).(Port4)
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TXPKTIN_INT_EN
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TX_NULL1_INT_EN Enable TX null 1 packet done interrupt source.(Port4)
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TX_NULL0_INT_EN Enable TX null 0 packet done interrupt source.(Port4)
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_BMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_BMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXBCNOK_INT_EN When this bit is enable, the interrupt is issued when RX beacon frame occurs. (Port4)
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXTSFDIFF_INT_EN Enable RX TSF difference detection. (Port4)
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TXBCNERR_INT_EN Enable TX beacon Error interrupt source (Port4)
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TXBCNOK_INT_EN Enable TX beacon OK interrupt source.(Port4)

[0] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P4_BCNERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port4)

[18] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port4)
[17] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TRIGGER_PKT_INT The interrupt is issued while the pkt is Tx ok which Tri_Frame bit of TXDESC is equal to 1.(Port4)
[16] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_EOSP_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx pkt's EOSP bit = 1.(Port4)

18610180h R_BE_HC00IMR
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD
[28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27] R/W 0 RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0 RSVD
[21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_255to224_INT_EN MACID 255 to 224 power bit change HIMR
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_223to192_INT_EN MACID 223 to 192 power bit change HIMR
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_191to160_INT_EN MACID 191 to 160 power bit change HIMR
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_159to128_INT_EN MACID 159 to 128 power bit change HIMR
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P4_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 4 band 0
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P3_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 3 band 0
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P2_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 2 band 0
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P1_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 1 band 0
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P0_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 0 band 0
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PKT_INFO_ERR_INT_EN packet content error or illegal HIMR (EX: WDINFO_EN = 1 but no WDINFO)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_BB_STOPRX_INT_EN RX is over when BB stop HIMR
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_TXERR_INT_EN Tx Error Flag HIMR
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RXERR_INT_EN Rx Error Flag HIMR
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P1_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 1 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P0_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 0 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_127to96_INT_EN MACID 127 to 96 power bit change HIMR
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_95to64_INT_EN MACID 95 to 64 power bit change HIMR
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_63to32_INT_EN MACID 63 to 32 power bit change HIMR
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_31to0_INT_EN MACID 31 to 0 power bit change HIMR
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
18610200h R_BE_PPS0_CTRL
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS0_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS0_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_BE_PPS0_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 0. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 0 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 0. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 0.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 0 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
18610204h R_BE_PPS0_SPEC_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 0 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18610205h R_BE_PPS0_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POW_STATE PPS 0 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_BE_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_BE_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18610206h R_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL0
[15] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_0_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_0_pps1_mgq_pause_en
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_0_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_0_pps1_hiq_pause_en
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_0_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_0_pps1_bcnq_pause_en
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_MACID PPS 0 MACID selection.
18610208h R_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1861020Ch R_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL2
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 0 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PPS0_POWON_ERLY PPS 0 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
18610210h R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_DUR PPS 0 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
18610214h R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_ITVL PPS 0 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
18610218h R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_START First PPS 0 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861021Ch R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM3
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18610220h R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_DUR PPS 0 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
18610224h R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_ITVL PPS 0 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
18610228h R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_START First PPS 0 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861022Ch R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM3
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18610230h R_BE_PPS0_CURR_DOZE0
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
18610234h R_BE_PPS0_CURR_DOZE1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
18610240h R_BE_PPS1_CTRL
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS1_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS1_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_BE_PPS1_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 1. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 1 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 1. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 1.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 1 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
18610244h R_BE_PPS1_SPEC_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 1 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18610245h R_BE_PPS1_STATE
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POW_STATE PPS 1 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_BE_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_BE_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18610246h R_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL0
[15] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_1_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_1_pps1_mgq_pause_en
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_1_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_1_pps1_hiq_pause_en
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_1_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_1_pps1_bcnq_pause_en
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_MACID PPS 1 MACID selection.
18610248h R_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1861024Ch R_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL2
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 1 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PPS1_POWON_ERLY PPS 1 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
18610250h R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_DUR PPS 1 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
18610254h R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_ITVL PPS 1 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
18610258h R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_START First PPS 1 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861025Ch R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM3
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18610260h R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM0
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_DUR PPS 1 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
18610264h R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_ITVL PPS 1 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
18610268h R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM2
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_START First PPS 1 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861026Ch R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM3
[31:16] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18610270h R_BE_PPS1_CURR_DOZE0
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
18610274h R_BE_PPS1_CURR_DOZE1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
186102A0h R_BE_port_0_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_BE_p0_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_BE_p0_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_BE_p0_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_BE_p0_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_BE_p0_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
186102A4h R_BE_port_1_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_BE_p1_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_BE_p1_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_BE_p1_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_BE_p1_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_BE_p1_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus

[29] W 0 B_BE_p2_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_BE_p2_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_BE_p2_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_BE_p2_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
186102ACh R_BE_port_3_tsf_sync

[26:24] RW 0 B_BE_p3_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun

[18:0] RW 0 B_BE_p3_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
186102B0h R_BE_port_4_tsf_sync
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_BE_p4_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_BE_p4_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_BE_p4_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int

186102F0h R_BE_ABORT_CNT_SEL
[31:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] RW 1'b0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_OV_EN "1": tx abort cnt will overflow from 0xFF -> 0x0.
[6] $RW 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_CLR_P write 1T pulse to HW design
[5] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_CLR_REQ "1": still clear abort counters. "0": finish clear abort counters
[4:0] RW 5'h0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_SEL to select SCH_ABORT_CNT
186102F4h R_BE_ABORT_CNT
[31:24] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_3 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
[23:16] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_2 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
[15:8] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_1 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
[7:0] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_0 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
18610300h R_BE_edca_be_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_be_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_BE_be_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_BE_be_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18610304h R_BE_edca_bk_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_bk_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA5 B_BE_bk_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x49 B_BE_bk_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18610308h R_BE_edca_vi_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x5e B_BE_vi_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x43 B_BE_vi_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x26 B_BE_vi_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1861030Ch R_BE_edca_vo_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD

An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_vo_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_vo_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_vo_1_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18610320h R_BE_edca_mgq_param
[31:24] R/W 0x32 B_BE_cpumgq_cw ( cpumgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[23:16] R/W 0x24 B_BE_cpumgq_aifs ( cpumgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_mgq_cw ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_mgq_aifs ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18610324h R_BE_edca_bcnq_param
[31:24] R/W 0x44 B_BE_bcnq_cw Beacon Contention Window MAX/MIN
Defines the contention window value for back off before transmitting beacon frame. This field is set to 0 in AP mode to indicate no back off window. In ad hoc mode, its default value is 6. 26-1 = 63 time slots.
[23:16] R/W 0x13 B_BE_bcnq_aifs Beacon Interframe Space
In units of microseconds, this register defines the medium idle time required before transmitting beacon (AP mode) or entering random back off window.
[15:8] R/W 0x1C B_BE_pifs
[7:0] R/W 0x20 B_BE_force_bcn_ifs
18610328h R_BE_edca_ulq_param
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_ulq_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_ulq_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_ulq_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1861032Ch R_BE_edca_twt_param_0
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_twt_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_twt_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_twt_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18610330h R_BE_edca_twt_param_1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD

An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_twt_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.

In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

[23] RO 0 RSVD
[22:16] R/W 7'h19 B_BE_BURST_CNT_DOWN_TIME
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7:0] R/W 8'h09 B_BE_SLOT_TIME count for 1 slot (unit: 1us)
18610338h R_BE_prebkf_cfg_0
[31:29] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[28:24] R/W 0x10 B_BE_100ns_time count for 100ns. (unit: clock cycle) EX: 8 for 80MHz
[23] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:16] R/W 0x3c B_BE_rx_air_end_time when rx_air_end == 1, assume air has idle for this setting value. unit: 0.1 us ( EX: 0x3C is 6 us)
[15:11] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:8] R/W 0x02 B_BE_mactx_latency assume latency from mactx to phytx. (unit: 1us)
[7:5] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0x09 B_BE_prebkf_time inform ptcl to gen txcmd if backoff remain time less than this setting value. (unit: 1us) (For ACQ and F2PTXCMD)
1861033Ch R_BE_prebkf_cfg_1
[31:24] RW 0x89 B_BE_sifs_timeout_tb_aggr_V1 if sifs_timer > (rx_air_end+sifs_timeout_tb_aggr), inform ptcl to break aggr.
[23:16] R/W 0x46 B_BE_sifs_prebkf if sifs_prebkf_cnt < prebkf time in burst tx, inform ptcl to gen cmd. unit: 0.1us
[15] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:8] R/W 0x2f B_BE_sifs_timeout_t2 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t2), inform ptcl sifs timeout unit: 0.1us
[7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:0] R/W 0x48 B_BE_sifs_mactxen_t1 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t1), inform wmac txunit: 0.1us
18610340h R_BE_cca_cfg_0
[31:24] RW 0x32 B_BE_r_sifs_aggr_time_V1 rx_air_end 後, r_sifs_aggr_time[6:0] * 0.1 us PTCL 停止 aggregation
[23] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC160_EN r_edcca_s160_en
[22] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC80_EN r_edcca_s80_en
[21] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC40_EN r_edcca_s40_en
[20] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC20_EN r_edcca_s20_en
[19] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_SEC160_EN r_ofdm_cca_s160_en
[18] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_CCA_BITMAP_EN r_cca_per_bitmap_en
[17] R/W 1 B_BE_TXPKTCTL_RST_EDCA_EN
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_WMAC_RST_EDCA_EN
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_TXFAIL_BRK_TXOP_EN This bits control tx fail break/ not break txop.
"0" : tx fail break txop
"1" : tx fail NOT break txop
tx fail indicates receive unexpected frame or acktimeout after transmission.
[10] R/W 1 B_BE_EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS_EN 1: TX TB PPDU 會檢查 EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_NO_GNT_WL_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: BT CCA break txop
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_NAV_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: NAV break txop
[7] R/W 1 B_BE_TX_NAV_EN 1: contention 會看 tx_nav
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_IGNORE_EDCCA Not ready
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_NO_GNT_WL_EN scheduler BTCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 BTCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_EDCCA_EN scheduler EDCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 EDCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_SEC80_EN scheduler SEC 80 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 80 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_SEC40_EN scheduler SEC 40 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 40 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_SEC20_EN scheduler SEC20 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 20 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_CCA_EN scheduler primary 20M CCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
18610344h R_BE_misc_0
[31] RW 0 B_BE_sifs_aggr_brk_time_mode "1": refer rx_air_end + aggr_break_ref_time. "0" : refer txon rising + aggr_break_ref_time
[30] RW 1'b1 B_BE_hiq_chk_wmac_tx "1": check wmac txok. "0": check sch_tx_gnt. May occur last tx hiq no retry issue.
[29] $RW 0 B_BE_SCH_NO_GNT_WL_RST_P r_sch_no_gnt_wl_rst_p
[28] RO 0 B_BE_sch_no_gnt_wl sch_no_gnt_wl
[27:24] R/W 9 B_BE_SCH_DBG_FORCE_ABORT_CNT extend scheduler debug force abort signal. (unit : 1us)
[23] RW 1'b1 B_BE_edca_chk_q_empty_en r_edca_chk_q_empty_en
[22:20] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] RW 0 B_BE_dis_bcn_mbss_gating_clk r_dis_sch_bcn_mbss_gating_clk
[14] RW 1'b1 B_BE_dis_bcn_mprt_gating_clk r_dis_sch_bcn_mprt_gating_clk
[13] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 1 B_BE_SCH_ABORT_BRK_TB_EN "1" : clear scheduler tb timer logic when tx abort
[11] R/W 1 B_BE_SCH_ABORT_BRK_BURST_EN "1" : clear scheduler burst timer logic when tx abort
[10] R/W 1 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_LOW_AUTO_RST “1” : reset port function logic when port function enable is low
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_SCH_CLK_GATING_DIS "1" : scheduler disable dynamic clock gating. "0" : scheduler enable dynamic clock gating
[8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W 0 B_BE_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_CLR_P "1" : clear sch_dbg_rst_edca signal
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_EN "1" : scheduler creates a sch_dbg_rst_edca signal to reset ifs timer when tx ppdu.
[5:4] R 0 RSVD
[3] W 0 B_BE_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_P "1" : create a pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_AUTO_EN "1" : scheduler creates periodic 32 us pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx. It is a stress test for PTCL/SCH tx abort procedure.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_TXOP_RESP_EN "1" : allow response tx in txop.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_en_tbtt_area_foR_BE_bb

18610350h R_BE_muedca_be_param_0
[31:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_muedca_be_param_0_timer MU EDCA TIMER, in units of 32 us
Note: SPEC: The MU EDCA Timer field (8b) indicates the duration of time, in units of 8 TUs
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_BE_muedca_be_param_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_BE_muedca_be_param_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.

"1" : wmm 1 支援 mu edca
[7:6] RO 0 RSVD RSVD

[4] R/W 0 B_BE_set_muedcatimer_tf_0 1: enable HW updating MUEDCATimer after Tx HE TB PPDU
0: disable HW updating MUEDCATimer after Tx HE TB PPDU
[3] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] RW 0 RSVD RSVD

0: disable HW updating MUEDCATimer

[31:23] RO 0 RSVD RSVD

18610378h R_BE_random_cfg
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:0] R/W 0xE21051 B_BE_rand_set [23] : "1" enable random generator
[22:0] : random generater 生成多項式
1861037Ch R_BE_MISC_1
[31:6] RO 0 rsvd
[5] RW 0 B_BE_cal_tbtt_ov_en "1": value after tbtt shift can more than one beacon space. (1st tbtt_int after LPS restore may after 2 beacon space.) "0": If value after tbtt shift is more than one beacon space, HW will minus one beacon space.
[4] RO 0 rsvd
[3] RW 0 B_BE_subbcn_ms_cnt_mode "1": subbcn_ms_cnt refer tsft[10] toggle. "0": subbcn_ms_cnt refer (us_cnt_down[9:0] == 0)
[2] RW 1'b1 B_BE_cal_always_en "1": can always calculate next tbtt when event occur. "0": only calculate next tbtt when event occur and t_1us_p.
[1] RW 0 B_BE_sifs_timer_auto_rst_en "1": auto reset sifs timer if sifs timer reach max.
[0] RW 1'b1 B_BE_chk_has_sifs_tx_abort "1": Do not sifs tx if has already sifs tx abort. Until rx_air_end or cca end.
18610380h R_BE_MUEDCATIMER_0
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BK_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BE_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
18610384h R_BE_MUEDCATIMER_1
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VO_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VI_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BK_1 muedca_timer_bk1
[15:0] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BE_1 muedca_timer_be1
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VO_1 muedca_timer_vo1
[15:0] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VI_1 muedca_timer_vi1

[31:18] RO 14'h0 rsvd rsvd
[17] RW 1'b1 B_BE_sr_eht_ctn_chk_nstr r_sr_eht_ctn_chk_nstr
[16] RW 1'b1 B_BE_sr_eht_ctn_chk_sr_pd r_sr_eht_ctn_chk_sr_pd

[11] RW 1'b0 B_BE_sr_eht_ctn_chk_edcca_s160 r_sr_eht_ctn_chk_edcca_s160

186103E0h R_BE_PUNC_RPT_CFG
[31] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[30] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[29] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[28] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[27] RO 1'b0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_max
[26] RO 1'b0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_clr_req "1" : after writing "r_punc_rptreg_clr", "0" : after finish reset counter
[25:16] $RO 10'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_total
[15:14] RO 2'h0 rsvd
[13:12] RW 2'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_blk_prd
[11] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[10:8] RW 3'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_mode
[7] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[6:4] RW 3'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_sel
[3] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[2] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[1] $RW 1'b0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_clr write 1 pulse to request clear puncture counter
[0] RW 1'b1 B_BE_punc_rptreg_en
186103E4h R_BE_PUNC_RPT_CNT
[31:24] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_3 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
[23:16] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_2 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
[15:8] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_1 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
[7:0] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_0 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
186103E8h R_BE_SCHEDULE_ERR_IMR
[31:2] R/W 0 RSVD -
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_SORT_NON_IDLE_ERR_INT_EN [RSVD] During sort process, and discover another sort_req
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT_EN State machine of SCHEDULE over 32us, and not retrun idle state
186103ECh R_BE_SCHEDULE_ERR_ISR
[31:2] RO 0 RSVD -
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_SORT_NON_IDLE_ERR_INT During sort process, and discover another sort_req
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT State machine of SCHEDULE over 32us, and not retrun idle state
186103F4h R_BE_sch_dbg_sel
[31:17] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_sch_dbg_en enable scheduler debug
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_sch_cfg_cmd_sel scheduler config command select
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_sch_dbg_sel scheduler debug select
186103F8h R_BE_sch_dbg
[31:0] RO 0 B_BE_scheduler_dbg scheduler debug port (for debug)
186103FCh R_BE_SCH_EXT_CTRL
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_31_REG
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_30_REG
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_29_REG

[25] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_25_REG
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_24_REG
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_23_REG
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_22_REG

[20] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_20_REG
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_19_REG

[17] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_17_REG

[7] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_7_REG
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_6_REG
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_5_REG
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_4_REG

[1] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_1_REG

18610400h R_BE_PORT_CFG_P0
[31:19] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_ERLY_SORT_EN_P0 BCN early timer sorting enable.
1: Timer sorting will consider Port 0 BCN early timer count down timer when PORT_FUNC_EN_P0 = 1 and TBTT_AGG_P0 != 0.
0: Timer sorting does not consider Port 0 BCN early count down timer.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P0 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_BRK_SETUP_P0 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P0 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P0 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P0 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNTX_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_NET_TYPE_P0 Network Type for port 0 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_AGRES_P0 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_TSFTR_RST_P0 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P0 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_TSF_UDT_EN_P0 1: Enable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_P0 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.
18610404h R_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_P0
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0xC8 B_BE_TBTT_HOLD_P0 TBTT prohibit hold time. unit: 32 us.
[15:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0x02 B_BE_TBTT_SETUP_P0 TBTT prohibit setup time. unit: 32 us.
18610408h R_BE_BCN_AREA_P0
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_MSK_AREA_P0 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x60 B_BE_BCN_CTN_AREA_P0 BCN contention area 1 width. Unit: 32us ( Not ready)
1861040Ch R_BE_BCNERLYINT_CFG_P0
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_BE_BCNERLY_P0 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1861040Eh R_BE_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P0
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x05 B_BE_TBTTERLY_P0 It is used to config BB/RF early at TBTT early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 1 us.
18610412h R_BE_TBTT_AGG_P0
[15:8] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_AGG_NUM_P0 Set TBTT AGG number for DTIM TBTT. TBTT related INTs are NOT issued at non-DTIM TBTT.
[7:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
18610414h R_BE_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P0
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_SUB_BCN_SPACE_P0 BCN interval of the VAP in port 0. Not valid for port 1~4. Unit: TU.
[15:0] R/W 0x64 B_BE_BCN_SPACE_P0 When MBSSID is disable, this field is the beacon interval. When MBSSID is enable, this register is the beacon space of root. Unit: TU.
18610418h R_BE_BCN_FORCETX_P0
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x01 B_BE_FORCE_BCN_NUM_P0 When BCN TX forced mode is enabled, force mode will be over after BCN TX OK number reaches this threshold. Set to 0 is equal to 1 (Still have 1 BCN in forced mode). (Not ready)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_BE_BCN_MAX_ERR_P0 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)
18610420h R_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_P0
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P0 BCN error total count of port 0
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_NAV_P0 BCN error count caused by NAV of port 0
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_EDCCA_P0 BCN error count caused by EDCCA of port 0
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_CCA_P0 BCN error count caused by CCA of port 0
18610424h R_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_P0
[15:4] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_SRCHEND_P0 BCN error flag caused by search until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[2] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_INVALID_P0 BCN error flag caused by INVALID of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[1] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_CMP_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCN_SRCH_SEQ compare illegal of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[0] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_LOCK_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCNQ locked until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
18610426h R_BE_DTIM_CTRL_P0
[15:8] R/W 1 B_BE_DTIM_NUM_P0 Set the DTIM count of port 0.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DTIM_CURRCNT_P0 Current DTIM count of port 0.
18610428h R_BE_TBTT_SHIFT_P0
[31:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_SHIFT_OFST_P0 TBTT shift offset. unit: TU.
Notice that this field is an signed number, it is minus value if MSB is 1.
Next TBTT counter = BCN_ITVL - (current TSF % BCN_ITVL) +- TBTT_SHIFT
18610434h R_BE_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0 Beacon count down timer of port 0. Unit: us.
18610438h R_BE_TSFTR_LOW_P0
[31:0] $R/W 1 B_BE_TSFTR_LOW_P0 TSFT TIMER low 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
1861043Ch R_BE_TSFTR_HIGH_P0
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_TSFTR_HIGH_P0 TSFT TIMER high 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
18610440h R_BE_PORT_CFG_P1
[31:19] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_ERLY_SORT_EN_P1 BCN early timer sorting enable.
1: Timer sorting will consider Port 1 BCN early count down timer when PORT_FUNC_EN_P1 = 1 and TBTT_AGG_P1 != 0.
0: Timer sorting does not consider Port 1 BCN early count down timer.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P1 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_BRK_SETUP_P1 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P1 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P1 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P1 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNTX_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_NET_TYPE_P1 Network Type for port 1 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_AGRES_P1 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_TSFTR_RST_P1 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P1 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_TSF_UDT_EN_P1 1: Enable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_P1 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.

[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_BE_BCNERLY_P1 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1861044Eh R_BE_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD

18610452h R_BE_TBTT_AGG_P1

18610454h R_BE_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
