18611410h R_BE_RXPSF_CTRL_TYPE
[15:1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_CTRL_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type = 01.
18611412h R_BE_RXPSF_RATE
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HETB_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE TB
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HEMU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE MU
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HEERSU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE ERSU
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HESU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE SU
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_VHTMU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = VHT MU
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_VHTSU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = VHT SU
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HT_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HT
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_OFDM_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = OFDM
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_CCK_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = CCK
18611414h R_BE_RXAI_CTRL
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_RXAI_INFO_RST Write 1 to reset the RXAI events
[6] RO 0 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_REL If recca_protect is set to 0 by MAC decision circuit (address/A-MPDU checking), set this bit to 1. Reset by BIT_RXAI_INFO_RST = 1
[5] RO 0 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_VIO If MAC gets BB_reset_MAC pulse when recca_protect = 1, set this bit to 1. Reset by BIT_RXAI_INFO_RST = 1
[4:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_rxai_recca_dis 0 : enable phy recca
1 : disable phy recca
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_SEL recca_protect rises at
0: DATA_ON rises
1: MAC header and FCS check done (HW default)
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_EN Set to 1 to enable MAC to inform BB not doing reCCA during receiving the address matched PPDU.
18611418h R_BE_RX_FIFO_STATUS
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_ADDR_CLR addr mode = 2'd0 : write 1 to clear read/write address
addr mode = 2'd1 : write 1 to clear last normail rx mode read/write pointer
addr mode = 2'd2 : write 1 to clear last csi mode read/write pointer
[30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29:28] R/W 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_ADDR_MODE 0 : current pointer
1 : last normail rx mode read/write pointer
2.: last csi mode read/write pointer
[27:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:12] RO 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_RADDR RXD FIFO read pointer
[11:0] RO 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_WADDR RXD FIFO write pointer
1861141Ch R_BE_RX_FIFO_CTRL
[31:26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_RXS_FIFO_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[24] W1C 0 B_BE_RXD_FIFO_MAX_LEV_CLR clear rxd fifo maximum data level
[23:12] R 0 B_BE_RXD_FIFO_MAX_LEV maximum data level of rxd fifo
[11:0] R/W 0x2ff B_BE_RXD_FIFO_FULL_TH RXD FIFO full threshold
18611420h R_BE_RX_FLTR_OPT
[31:24] R/W 0xf B_BE_UID_FILTER user id filter
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_UNSPT_TYPE unsupported type filter
[21:16] R/W 0x1f B_BE_RX_MPDU_MAX_LEN RX packets upper limit. The unit is 512 bytes. Set to“0", no RX limit is forced.
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_A_FTM_REQ Accept FTM REQ packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_A_ERR_PKT Accept error packets.
Protocol Version set to nonzero.
Encrypted pkts IV to short.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_A_UNSUP_PKT Accept upsupport packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_A_CRC32_ERR Accept CRC32 Error packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[10] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[9:8] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_RULE Beacon or probe response check rule. Only valid when B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_EN=1
0: A3 hit
1: A2 hit
2: A2 & A3 hit
3: A2 | A3 hit
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_EN Determine whether HW needs to check B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_RULE when receiving beacon or probe response.
1: Need to check
0: No need to check
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_A_MC_LIST_CAM_MATCH Receive specific MC packets. Only valid when B_A_MC=1.
1: Whitelist. If cam_srch_hit=1, this MC packet should be received;
otherwise, drop this packet.
0: Blacklist. If cam_srch_hit=1, this MC packet should be dropped;
otherwise, receive this packet.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BC_CAM_MATCH Determine whether HW need to check cam_srch_hit=1 when receiving BC packets. Only valid when B_A_BC=1.
1: If cam_srch_hit=1, this packet should be received; otherwise, drop this packet.
0: No need to check cam_srch_hit when receiving BC packets
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_A_UC_CAM_MATCH Determine whether HW need to check cam_srch_hit=1 when receiving UC packets. Only valid when B_A_UC=1.
1: If cam_srch_hit=1, this packet should be received; otherwise, drop this packet.
0: No need to check cam_srch_hit when receiving UC packets.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_A_MC 0: Accept
1: Depends on B_BE_A_MC_CAM_MATCH
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BC 0: Accept
1: Depends on B_BE_A_BC_CAM_MATCH.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_A_A1_MATCH 0: Accept
1: If a1_match = 1 depends on B_BE_A_UC_CAM_MATCH; Else Drop.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE Sniffer mode. No matter the result of ADDR_CAM search, all packets will be received.
1: Enable
0: Disable
18611424h R_BE_CTRL_FLTR
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_CTRL_STYPE Every bit maps to ctrl frame sub-type 0 ~ 15.
0: indicates dropping this sub-type
1: indicates receiving this sub-type
18611428h R_BE_MGNT_FLTR
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0xffff B_BE_MGNT_STYPE Every bit maps to mgnt frame sub-type 0 ~ 15.
0: indicates dropping this sub-type
1: indicates receiving this sub-type
1861142Ch R_BE_DATA_FLTR
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0xffff B_BE_DATA_STYPE Every bit maps to data frame sub-type 0 ~ 15.
0: indicates dropping this sub-type
1: indicates receiving this sub-type
18611430h R_BE_ZLENDEL_COUNT
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:8] R 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_NUM Delimiter count value of last MPDU
[7:4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_NUM_SEL USER select (UID) of B_BE_RXD_DELI_NUM
[3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2:1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_UNIT zero length delimiter count unit
2'd0 : 4 Bytes
2'd1 : 16 Bytes
2'd2 : 128 Bytes
2'd3 : 8192 Bytes
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_EN zero length delimiter count enable
18611434h R_BE_ADDR_CAM_CTRL
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0x7f B_BE_ADDR_CAM_RANGE Indicate how many entries do HW searches, which can be used to decrease HW search time.
[15:12] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_CMPLIMT address cam search limit (timeout)
0 : no limit
limit = 2^[11:8]
[11] R/W 0 RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_ADDR_CLK_GATED 1: disable address CAM clock gated
0: enable address CAM clock gated
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_CLR Clear all address CAM contents. Set VALID of all ADDR_CAM entries to 0.
Write '1' to trigger clear and read '0' to check clear done
[7:3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_A2_B0_CHK address cam search enable A2 Bit0 compare
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_SRCH_PERPKT address cam search per MPDU.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_EN Enable address CAM.
1: Enable
0: Disable
18611438h R_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_INFO
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_MACID address cam info macid
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_SEC_IDX address cam security index
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14:12] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_PORT address cam port select
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A3_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A3 not hit
1 : A3 hit
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A2_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A2 not hit
1 : A2 hit
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A1_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A1 not hit
1 : A1 hit
[8] R/W 1 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_CAM_HIT address cam hit flag
0 : addr cam not hit
1 : addr cam hit
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_IDX address cam search report
1861143Ch R_BE_RESPBA_CAM_CTRL
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_SKIP_ALL_QOSNULL 1: ignore all SN from qosnull
0: just skip qosnull when SN = 0
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_STD_SSN_SEL The way to decide SSN of BA. (for standard entry initial only)
0: SSN = Rx SN – (window size-1)
1: SSN = Rx SN
[19:18] R/W 0 RSVD
[17:16] R/W 2 B_BE_BACAM_TEMP_SZ temp entry size
2'd0: 256 bitmap
2'd1: 512 bitmap
2'd2: 1024 bitmap
others : rsvd
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_RST_IDX
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_BACAM_SHIFT_POLL Write 1’b1 to trigger HW moving BA CAM control field and BA bitmap content from src_entry_idx (temp) to dest_entry_idx (std).
HW sets to 0 after completion.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_GCK_DIS Disable ba cam clock gating control
[4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_COMPL_VAL Within BA window size, the value of bitmap outside of the range between min. SN and max. SN:
0: set to all 0
1: set to all 1
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_SSN_SEL The way to decide SSN of BA.
0: SSN = max. Rx SN – window size
1: SSN = min. Rx SN
[1:0] W1C 0 B_BE_BACAM_RST 0: no reset
1: reset specific BA CAM entry (indicated in BIT[11:8] B_BE_SRC_ENTRY_IDX)
2: reset all BA CAM entry
3: rsvd
18611440h R_BE_PPDU_STAT
[15:14] R/W 0 RSVD
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_stat_iorst
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_stat_gckdis
[11:10] R/W 0x3 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_WR_BW status report write bandwidth option
2'd0 : 5.12Gbps
2'd1 : 7/(1+7) * 5.12 = 4.48Gbps
2'd2 : 5/(1+5) * 5.12 = 4.267Gbps
2'd3 : 4/(1+4) * 5.12 = 4.096Gbps
[9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_TRIG (For debug use)
Write one would trigger a pulse to HW. HW would send a PPDU status to host/WLCPU. The PHY status in the PPDU status is removed and the others are valid (if has).
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_DMA 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a DMA-OK MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: Always generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT, and don't care whether DMA OK or not.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_CRC32 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a CRC-OK MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: Always generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT, and don't care whether CRC OK or not.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_ADDR 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a AddressCAM-hit MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: don't care
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_APP_PLCP_HDR_RPT Append PLCP_HDR after MAC_INFO. Only valid when B_BE_APP_MAC_INFO_RPT = 1.
1: Append, 0: Not append.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_APP_RX_CNT_RPT Append RX_CNT_RPT after MAC_INFO. Only valid when B_BE_APP_MAC_INFO_RPT = 1.
1: Append, 0: Not append.
[1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_EN Enable PPDU status report function.
1: Enabe, 0: Disable.
18611442h R_BE_PPDU_STAT_ERR
[15:8] RO 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_CNTR PPDU status_counter
[7:0] W1C 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_err_flag error flag of status write
[0] : status idle but dma busy & phy status trigger
[1] : input buffer overflow
[2] : status active & phy status trigger
[3]~[7]: RSVD
18611444h R_BE_CH_INFO_QRY
[31:24] RO 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_TIME The period CMAC requests channel info to DMAC
Unit: 1us
[23:21] RO 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_CNT The times of requesting channel info
[20] RO 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_REQUSTING Indicate CMAC has sent the channel info request to DMAC
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_MGNT_FRM 1: Indicate the management frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_CTRL_FRM 1: Indicate the control frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_DATA_FRM 1: Indicate the data frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_CRC_FAIL 1: Indicate the CRC-fail packet would trigger get-channel-info operation
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_MACID MAC ID of channel info.
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:1] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_MODE 0: MACID trigger.
1: MACID + NDPA + NDP trigger.
2: MACID + Sounding PPDU
Else: RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_GET_CH_INFO_EN 1: Start to get channel info if B_BE_CH_INFO_MACID equals received packet.
0: Do not get channel info
18611448h R_BE_MACID_MATCH
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_MACID_MATCH (Valid when B_BE_MACID_MATCH_EN = 1)
The MACID which would trigger mac_id_match signal to BB.
[7:2] R/W 0 RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_MACID_MATCH_MODE (Valid when B_BE_MACID_MATCH_EN = 1)
0: (smart antenna, check CRC)sends the mac_id_match signal every PPDU
1: (LA mode, DO NOT check CRC)sends the mac_id_match signal every MPDU
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_MACID_MATCH_EN Enable MAC sends the mac_id_match signal to BB. 1: Enable, 0: Disable
1861144Ah R_BE_RX_SR_CTRL
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 B_BE_SR_OP_MODE Set the OP_MODE for Inter/Intra decision use. The OP_MODE is same as
NETYPE.
[3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_SRG_CHK_EN Enable SRG decision module. If this bit = 0, all PPDU decide to non-SRG
PPDU.
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_SR_CTRL_PLCP_EN When this bit enable, 802.11AX Spatial Reuse PLCP RX parsing enable.
Otherwise, all SR RX related decision by MACHDR.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_SR_EN When this bit enable, 802.11AX Spatial Reuse function enable.
1861144Bh R_BE_BSSID_SRC_CTRL
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_BSSID_MATCH if B_BE_ADDR_CAM_EN = 1 ADDRESSCAM will use MACHDR information to decide BSSID match or not.
If B_BE_ADDR_CAM_EN = 0 ADDRESSCAM will output this bit as a search result.
0: BSSID not match.
1: BSSID match.
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_PARTIAL_AID_MATCH This bit will be set as the result of PATIAL_AID search when B_BE_PLCP_SRC_EN = 0.
0: PATIAL AID not match.
1: PATIAL AID match.
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_BSSCOLOR_MATCH This bit will be set as the result of BSSID_COLOR search when B_BE_PLCP_SRC_EN = 0.
0: BSSID_COLOR not match.
1: BSSID_COLOR match.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PLCP_SRC_EN if this bit is 1 ADDRESSCAM will use PLCP information to decide BSSID_COLOR, PATIAL_AID match or not.
if this bit is 0 ADDRESSCAM will output B_BE_BSSCOLOR_MATCH and B_BE_PARTIAL_AID_MATCH as search results
1861144Ch R_BE_SR_OBSS_PD
[31:24] R/W 0xC0 B_BE_SRG_OBSS_PD_MAX For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -62dbm + SRG OBSS PD Max Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[23:16] R/W 0x70 B_BE_SRG_OBSS_PD_MIN For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -82dbm + SRG OBSS PD Min Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[15:8] R/W 0xC0 B_BE_NONSRG_OBSS_PD_MAX For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -62dbm + Non-SRG OBSS PD Max Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[7:0] R/W 0x70 B_BE_NONSRG_OBSS_PD_MIN For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -82dbm.
18611450h R_BE_SR_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
18611454h R_BE_SR_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
18611458h R_BE_SR_PARTIAL_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
1861145Ch R_BE_SR_PARTIAL_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP_H For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
18611460h R_BE_SCOPE_CTRL
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_LEN sgement length (Unit : 1K *2^[7:4])
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_FILTER scope packet target
0 : drop
1 : to host
2 : to WLCPU
3 : rsvd
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_APPZERO scope mode append zero when data is not enough
[2:0] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_MODE scope mode
0 : disable
1 : BB scope
2 : MAC RXD dump
3 : MAC PSDU segment
18611464h R_BE_CSIRPT_OPTION
[31] R 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_CHKSUM_ERROR Indicate MAC Rx csi rpt checksum error
[30] R 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_BBLEN_LT_MAC Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number underflow
[29] R 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_BBLEN_GT_MAC Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number overflow
[28:26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIPRT_HESU_AID_EN 0:check AID 1:bypass HE NONTB SU AID check
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIPRT_VHTSU_AID_EN 0:check AID 1:bypass VHT SU AID check
[23:16] R/W 0x20 B_BE_CSIRPT_FIFO_RESUME_THR mac resume csi data when fifo data last than threshold
[15:8] R/W 0xA0 B_BE_CSIRPT_FIFO_PAUSE_THR mac pause csi data when fifo data more than threshold
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_CSIRPT_LEN_MISMATCH destory fcs when bb length mismatch rdrdy number
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_CSIRPT_DMAFULL_IGNORE pause data write when dma assert fifo full
[4:3] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_FILTER CSI report filter
0 : drop
1 : To Host
2 : To WLCPU
3 : Rsvd
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_CHECKSUM_DIS Disable CSI checksum
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_CSIRPT_EMPTY_APPZERO Append zero if csi data from BB is sharter than mac expectation
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_NDPPLCP_CHK_EN NDP PLCP check enable
18611468h R_BE_BSR_UPD_CTRL
[31:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_QSIZE_UPD If received Queue Size Subfield = 255,
0: report queue size 0 to STA_SCH (ac_type follows TID subfield of OoS ctrl)
1: ignore to report queue size
1861146Ch R_BE_WMRX_LA_EVENT_OPTION
[31:17] RW 0 RSVD
[16] RW 1'h0 B_BE_dbg_ignore_unexprx 1: ignore unexpected rx
0: do nothing
[15:6] RW 0 RSVD
[5:4] RW 2'h0 B_BE_lastop_cont_fcs_error stop LA record when continue fcs error > threshold
0 : disable
1 : 4
2 : 8
3 : 16
[3] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_rx_fsm_hang stop LA record when FSM timeout
[2] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_rx_self_rst stop LA record when RX self reset
[1] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_plcp_error stop LA record when RX PLCP with parity or CRC error
[0] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_plcp_incomp stop LA record when RX PLCP content is incompleted
18611470h R_BE_DRV_INFO_OPTION
[31:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_INFO_PHYRPT_EN Fill phy report into driver informatation (first 32 bytes)
18611480h R_BE_BCN_PSR_CTRL
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_MLT_PARSER_EN Multi-Link Traffic element parsing enable. 1:Enable. 0:Disable.
[7:4] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_HIT_INT_PORT Port selection of RX BCN HIT INT of band 0.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_TIM_PARSER_EN 1: Enable RX Beacon TIM Parser of band 0.
18611482h R_BE_BCN_IECAM_CTRL
[15] RO 0 B_BE_BCN_PSR_BUSY 1: Beacon parser is busy. 0: idle.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[13:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_NOHIT_FRWD Forwarding selection when BCN IE no hit in band 0.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[9:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_HIT_FRWD Forwarding selection when BCN IE hit in band 0.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[7:4] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_PORT Port selection of BCN IE CAM of band 0.
[3] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_CLR
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_NOHIT_FRWD_EN 1: Enable BCN forwarding overwrites when IE no hit in band 0. 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_HIT_FRWD_EN 1: Enable BCN forwarding overwrites when IE hit in band 0. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_EN 1: Enable BCN IE CAM detection of band 0. 0: Disable.
18611484h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P0
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P0 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P0 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P0 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P0 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P0 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P0 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P0 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P0 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 0.
18611488h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P1
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P1 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P1 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P1 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P1 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P1 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P1 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P1 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P1 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 1.
1861148Ch R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P2
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P2 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P2 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P2 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P2 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P2 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P2 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P2 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P2 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 2.
18611490h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P3
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P3 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P3 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P3 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P3 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P3 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P3 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P3 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P3 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 3.
18611494h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P4
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P4 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P4 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P4 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P4 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P4 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P4 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P4 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P4 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 4.
18611498h R_BE_MLT_RPT0
[31] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P3 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 3.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[30] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P3 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 3.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[29:24] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_P3 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 3. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
[23] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P2 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 2.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[22] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P2 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 2.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[21:16] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_P2 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 2. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
[15] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P1 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 1.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[14] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P1 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 1.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[13:8] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_P1 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 1. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
[7] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P0 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 0.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[6] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P0 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 0.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[5:0] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_MLT_RPT_P0 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 0. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
1861149Ch R_BE_MLT_RPT1
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P4 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 4.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[6] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P4 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 4.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[5:0] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_MLT_RPT_P4 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 4. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
186114A0h R_BE_PS_RXINFO
[31:15] R/W 0 rsvd
[14] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P4_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[13] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P4_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[12] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P4_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[11] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P3_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[10] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P3_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[9] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P3_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P2_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[7] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P2_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[6] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P2_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[5] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P1_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[4] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P1_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[3] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P1_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[2] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P0_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P0_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P0_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
186114ACh R_BE_PWRINT_CTRL
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_SEQNUM_MACID The sequence number for the selected macid for power bit check[19:16] is the segment
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_REF_MACID the selected macid to check the seqnumber of the power bit
[7:1] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PWRINT_EN When this bit set, HW auto detect power state per MACID by check every RX packets. And HW will fill power state to power state register. If power state change, generate interrupt to host.
186114B0h R_BE_SPWR0
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_31to0 MICID 31 ~ 0 power bit value
186114B4h R_BE_SPWR1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_63to32 MICID 63 ~ 32 power bit value
186114B8h R_BE_SPWR2
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_95o64 MICID 95 ~ 64 power bit value
186114BCh R_BE_SPWR3
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_127to96 MICID 127 ~ 96 power bit value
186114C0h R_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_CTRL
[31:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_AID3_ENABLE Enable bit for fourth AID register
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_AID2_ENABLE Enable bit for third AID register
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_AID1_ENABLE Enable bit for second AID register
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_AID0_ENABLE Enable bit for first AID register
186114C4h R_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_CFG0
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_AID1 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 1.
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD
186114C8h R_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_CFG1
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_AID3 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 0.
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_AID2 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 0.
186114CCh R_BE_RPL_CFG
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_rplcfg_uppeB_BE_en repleace upper 80M RPL for BW = 80M + 80M
[30:25] RW 0 RSVD
[24:16] RW 0 B_BE_rplcfg_uppeB_BE_dbm b"[8:0] = upper RPL dBm/(20Mhz*path) + 110 unit : dbm
repleace RPL from BB when [31] = 1
[15] RW 0 B_BE_rplcfg_en rpl repleace enable for BW <= 80 M
[14:9] RW 0 RSVD
[8:0] RW 0 B_BE_rplcfg_dbm b"[8:0] = RPL dBm/(20Mhz*path) + 110 unit : dbm
repleace RPL from BB when [15] = 1
186114D0h R_BE_RX_TO_BRK_OPT
[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29:24] RW 3 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_frmtype pause parser when match specific frame type
[23:22] RW 0 RSVD
[21] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_beacon pause parser when reecive beacon
[20] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_trigger pause parser when reecive trigger
[19] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_bar pause parser when reecive bar
[18] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_ba pause parser when reecive ba
[17:16] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_mode pause parser dependent on frame type
00 : disable
01 : 1/2 * 80M * 64bit = 2.56Gbps
10 : 1/3 * 80M * 64bit = 1.706Gbps
11 : 1/4 * 80M * 64bit = 1.28Gbps
[15:13] RW 0 RSVD
[12:8] RW 0 B_BE_rxbrk_tb_time RX TB will drop remain data in 2p ram when break timeout
5'd0 : disable others : unit us
[7:4] RW 0 RSVD
[3:0] RW 0 B_BE_rxbrk_time RX will drop remain data in 2p ram when break timeout (except TB)
4'd0 : disable others : unit us
186114E0h R_BE_RX_DBG_CNT_SEL
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_RX_DBG_CNT The counter value corresponding to B_BE_RX_CNT_IDX.
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_RXERR_RPT_RST Write “one” to set the counter to zero.
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:0] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_CNT_IDX 6'd0: OFDM MPDU OK counter
6'd1: OFDM MPDU Fail counter
6'd2: OFDM PPDU OK counter
6'd3: OFDM False Alarm counter
6'd4: CCK MPDU OK counter
6'd5: CCK MPDU Fail counter
6'd6: CCK PPDU counter
6'd7: CCK False Alarm counter
6'd8: HT MPDU OK counter
6'd9: HT MPDU Fail counter
6'd10: HT PPDU counter
6'd11: HT False Alarm counter
6'd12: VHT SU MPDU OK counter
6'd13: VHT SU MPDU Fail counter
6'd14: VHT SU PPDU counter
6'd15: VHT SU False Alarm counter
6'd16: VHT MU MPDU OK counter
6'd17: VHT MU MPDU Fail counter
6'd18: VHT MU PPDU counter
6'd19: VHT MU False Alarm counter
6'd20: HE SU MPDU OK counter
6'd21: HE SU MPDU Fail counter
6'd22: HE SU PPDU counter
6'd23: HE SU False Alarm counter
6'd24: HE MU MPDU OK counter
6'd25: HE MU MPDU Fail counter
6'd26: HE MU PPDU counter
6'd27: HE MU False Alarm counter
6'd28: HE TB MPDU OK counter
6'd29: HE TB MPDU Fail counter
6'd30: HE TB PPDU counter
6'd31: HE TB False Alarm counter
6'd32: EHT MU_SU FCS OK
6'd33: EHT MU_SU FCS FAIL
6'd34: EHT MU_SU PPDU (PLCP ok)
6'd35: EHT MU_SU PLCP False Alarm
6'd36: EHT MU FCS OK
6'd37: EHT MU FCS FAIL
6'd38: EHT MU PPDU (PLCP ok)
6'd39: EHT MU PLCP False alarm
6'd40: EHT TB FCS OK
6'd41: EHT TB FCS FAIL
6'd42: EHT TB PPDU (PLCP ok)
6'd43: EHT MU PLCP False Alarm
6'd44: Invalid packet counter
6'd45: PHY RECCA
6'd46: RXD overflow
6'd47: RX packet full drop
6'd48: RX packet DMA OK
6'd49: RX packet address filter drop
6'd50: RX packet type/subtype + length filter drop
6'd51: RX NDP PPDU counter
6'd52: user define 0 counter
6'd53: user define 1 counter
6'd54: user define 2 counter
6'd55: user define 3 counter
6'd56: user define 4 counter
6'd57: user define 5 counter
6'd58: user define 6 counter
6'd59: user define 7 counter
6'd60: user define 8 counter
6'd61: user define 9 counter
6'd62: user define 10 counter
6'd63: user define 11 counter
186114E4h R_BE_RX_CNT_RPT_CFG
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_UD_W1S write 1 to set user define counter
[30:28] $W 0 B_BE_UD_CNT_MODE UD_MODE:
3'd0: specific user counter
3'd1: plcp error
3'd2: RSVD
3'd3: RSVD
3'd4: Host define
3'd5: HW debug
3'd6: RX parser counter (per RX reset)
3'd7: PPDU status
others: RSVD
[27] $W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26] $W 0 B_BE_UD_MSK_PORT 1: Ignore B_BE_UD_PORT
0: Do not ignore B_BE_UD_PORT
[25] $W 0 B_BE_UD_MSK_TYPE 1: Ignore B_BE_UD_TYPE and B_BE_UD_FRM_SUB_T YPE
0: Do not ignore B_BE_UD_ TYPE and B_BE_UD_FRM_SUB_T YPE
[24] $W 0 B_BE_UD_MSK_RATE 1: Ignore B_BE_UD_RATE
0: Do not ignore B_BE_UD_RATE
[23] $W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:20] $W 0 B_BE_UD_PORT User defined: Port
[19:18] $W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] $W 0 B_BE_UD_FRM_SUB_TYPE User defined: Sub_Type
[15:12] $W 0 B_BE_UD_FRM_TYPE User defined: Type
[11:0] $W 0 B_BE_UD_RATE B_BE_UD_RATE[12:8] = mode_ctrl,
B_BE_UD_RATE[7:0] = CCK+OFDM index[3:0] or HT
index[4:0] / SS[7:5] + mcs index[4:0]
186114E8h R_BE_RX_PLCP_MON
[31:28] RW 0 B_BE_RX_PLCP_MON_SEL RX PLCP content select
[27:0] $RO 0 B_BE_RX_PLCP_CONT RX PLCP content
[27:24] : ppdu type
[23:0] : PLCP content
186114ECh R_BE_RX_TIME_MON
[31:28] R 0 B_BE_DMA_WR_TIME maximum time of Rx write dma fifo (us)
[27:24] R/W 0 B_BE_DMA_WR_TIMEOUT timeout value of dma access (us). 0: timeout disable
[23:22] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_BE_INTF_TIMEOUT_THR timeout value of rx interface (ms). 0: timeout disable
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:8] R 0 B_BE_LATENCY_TIME maximum time of data_on raising to rx idle time (us)
[7:0] R 0 B_BE_CCA2DAT_TIME maximum time of cca raising to data_on raising (us)
186114F0h R_BE_RX_STATE_MONITOR
[31:16] $RO 0 B_BE_STATE_CUR current state
[15:14] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_EXSEL parser internal select
2'd0~2 : mpdu write
2'd3 : segement control
[13:8] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_NXT sw configure state
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_STATE_UPD write 1 to overwrite current state
[6:5] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_MODE 2'd0 : write state immediately
2'd1 : continue write until state match
2'd2 : continue write until state match when rx PSDU
2'd3 : RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_SEL module select
5'd0 : macrx_ctl
5'd1 : macrx_in
5'd2 : macrx_rxd_fifo
5'd3 : macrx_plcp
5'd4 : macrx_protocol
5'd5 : macrx_dma_intf
5'd6 : macrx_sts_write
5'd7~15 : rsvd
5'd16~31 : parser - user0~15
186114F4h R_BE_RX_ERR_ISR
[31:10] W1C 0 RSVD
[9] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_TRIG_ACT_TO rx trigger state time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_STS_ACT_TO rx status write state time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CSI_ACT_TO rx state csi mode time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[6] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_ACT_TO rx state active time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_CSI_DATAON_ASSERT_TO csi_data_on assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[4] W1C 0 B_BE_DATAON_ASSERT_TO data_on assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[3] W1C 0 B_BE_CCA_ASSERT_TO cca assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[2] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DMA_TO rxdma access time out (us) , start from dma_wreq = 1 , clear by dma_wgnt
[1] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DATA_TO rx dead lock protect time out (us) , start from cca falling
[0] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CCA_TO rx dead lock protect time out (us) , start from data_on falling
186114F8h R_BE_RX_ERR_IMR
[31:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_TRIG_ACT_TO_MSK
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_STS_ACT_TO_MSK
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CSI_ACT_TO_MSK
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_ACT_TO_MSK
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_CSI_DATAON_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_DATAON_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_CCA_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DMA_TO_MSK
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DATA_TO_MSK
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CCA_TO_MSK
186114FCh R_BE_RX_DEBUG_SELECT
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DEBUG_SEL [7:3] : module select
0 : macrx_ctl
1 : macrx_in
2 : macrx_rxd_fifo
3 : macrx_plcp
4 : macrx_protocol
5 : macrx_dma_intf
6 : macrx_sts_write
7 : rsvd
8 : parser - user0
9 : parser - user1
10 : parser - user2
11 : parser - user3

[2:0] : sub module/dbg select
18611500h R_BE_WMRX_RCR_EXT_OPTION
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W FFFF B_BE_EXT_CH valid when R_BE_CH_EN = 1
18611510h R_BE_RX_PLCP_EXT_OPTION_0
[15:0] RW 0 B_BE_plcp_cont_chk_bypass bypass plcp content check (check RX LTF only)
[31:16] RW 0 B_BE_plcp_uid_chk_en check CCK/LSIG/SIGA/SIGB and other RX info UID (extcept RX LTF info) according PPDU type
18611514h R_BE_RX_PLCP_EXT_OPTION_1
[31:20] RW 0 RSVD
[19] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_UNSPUUORT terminate rx when UID RX LTF.unsupport = 1
[18] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_BB_BRK terminate rx when UID RX LTF.brk_before_datafield = 1
[17] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_PSDU_PRES terminate rx when UID RX LTF.psdu_pres = 1
[16] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_NDP terminate rx when ppdu type is ndp
[15:12] RW 0 RSVD
[11] RW 0 B_BE_plcp_nss_src PPDU Number of Spatial steam source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[10] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_DOPPLEB_BE_SRC PPDU Doppler source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[9] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_STBC_SRC PPDU stbc source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[8] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_SU_PSDU_LEN_SRC PPDU with single user PSDU length source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[7] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_RXSB_SRC RX Sub band source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : RX INFO
[6:5] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_BW_SRC RX bandwidth source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : RX INFO
2 : PLCP content
[4] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_GILTF_SRC GI and LTF source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[3] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_NSTS_SRC Number of spatial stream source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[2] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_MCS_SRC mcs index source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[1] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CH20_WIDATA_SRC channel 20M with data source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : RX INFO
[0] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_PPDU_TYPE_SRC PPDU type source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX INFO
1 : RX LTF
18611518h R_BE_RX_PLCP_EXT_OPTION_2
[31:4] RW 0 RSVD
[3] RW 1 B_BE_EHTTB_EHTSIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_TB EHTSIG CRC check enable
[2] RW 1 B_BE_EHTTB_USIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_TB USIG CRC4 check enable
[1] RW 1 B_BE_EHTMU_EHTSIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_MU EHTSIG CRC check enable
[0] RW 1 B_BE_EHTMU_USIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_MU USIG CRC4 check enable
18611520h R_BE_RXFILTER_EXT_OPTION_0
[31:3] RW 0 RSVD
[2] RW 0 B_BE_A_BCN_IE_NOHIT accept beacon when IE cam is no hit
[1] RW 0 B_BE_A_BCN_IE_HIT accept beacon when IE cam is hit
[0] RW 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_FILTER_EN accept beacon or not will reference IE CAM result
18611580h R_BE_SPWR4
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_159to128 MICID 159~128 power bit value
18611584h R_BE_SPWR5
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_191to160 MICID 191~160 power bit value
18611588h R_BE_SPWR6
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_223to192 MICID 223~192 power bit value

[15:1] RO 15'd0 RSVD

18612300h R_BE_BTC_CFG_C1
31 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_EN Enable BT coex
30 RO 0 RSVD
29 R/W 0 B_BE_EN_EXT_BT_PINMUX Enable external interface
28 R0 0 B_BE_BTC_RST Reset BTC circuit state
write 1T pulse to reset HW design, rdata don't care this bit.
27 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_DBG_SRC_SEL 0: Debug port is from BT1
1: Debug port is from BT2
26 RO 0 RSVD
25:24 R/W 9 B_BE_BTC_MODE 0: RTK mode
1: CSR 3-wire mode
2, 3: RSVD
23:18 RO 0 RSVD
17 R/W 0 B_BE_INV_WL_ACT2 0: wl_act2 = wl_act2
1: wl_act2 = ~wl_act2
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL 影響 WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX 輸出
(WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX = GNT_BT_BB0 & BTS1_BB_SEL_S1_TRX & B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL)
15:8 R/W 4 B_BE_COEX_DLY_CLK WL module 參考 PTA 訊號所需的delay時間
7 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_RX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_RX
6 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_TX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_TX
5 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2 1: Ignore GNT_BT2
4:3 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_DBG_SEL
2 R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_BTC_CLK_G Control BTCOEX module clk gating disable
0:clok gating
1:disable clock gating
1 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL 0 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX
1 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX & GNT_WL
0 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_SRC 0: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC0
1: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC1
18612304h R_BE_RTK_MODE_CFG_V1_C1
31:25 RO 0 RSVD
24 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_BLE_EN_V1 0: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & BT_TX, GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & BT_RX
1: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & (BT_TX | BT_BLE), GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & (BT_RX | BT_BLE)
23:17 RO 0 RSVD
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_ULTRA_EN Config GNT_BT & GNT_WL when BT_CMD_ID = 0 & BT_CMD_DATA[3] = 1
15:14 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_L_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
13:12 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_L_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
11:10 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_H_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
9:8 R/W 1 B_BE_BT_H_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b10: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
7:0 R/W 0 B_BE_SAMPLE_CLK The number of clocks HW detects RTK-command is 0 or 1
18612308h R_BE_CSR_MODE_CFG_C1
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23:16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_TIME_CNT_V1 The number of clocks of 1us
15:12 RO 0 RSVD Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
11:8 R/W 0 B_BE_CSR_DELAY The number of clocks of BT_STATE delay
7:4 R/W 0 B_BE_CSR_TRX The number of clocks of CSR-TRX(T2)
3:0 R/W 0 B_BE_CSR_PRI The number of clocks of CSR-PRI(T1)
31:0 RO 0xDEAD_BEEF RSVD
18612310h R_BE_BT_CNT_CFG_C1
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_CNT_RST Write 1 to reset BT_ACT_STATISTICS counters
0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_CNT_EN When this bit is set, the BT_CNT starts counting
18612314h R_BE_BT_CNT_HI_C1
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT_HI_RX Counters for BT high priority RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT_HI_TX Counters for BT high priority TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
18612318h R_BE_BT_CNT_LOW_C1
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT_LOW_RX Counters for BT low RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT_LOW_TX Counters for BT low TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
18612320h R_BE_RTK_CMD_ERR_RPT_C1
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 W1C 0 B_BE_RTK_CMD_CRC Indicate the RTK mode command is CRC error
0 W1C 0 B_BE_RTK_CMD_INC Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
18612324h R_BE_COEX_WL_REQ_C1
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_NULL_HI WL TX NULL 時為 High-priority TX
22 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BCN_HI WL TX Beacon 時為 High-priority TX
21 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_NDP_HI WL TX NDPA/NDP 時為 High-priority TX
20 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_PROT_HI WL TX RTS/CTS2SELF 時為 High-priority TX
19 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_CF_END_HI WL TX CF-END 時為 High-priority TX
18 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BAR_HI WL TX BAR/MBAR 時為 High-priority TX
17 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_TRI_HI WL TX Trigger/Basic Trigger Frame 時為 High-priority TX
16 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_VOQ_HI WL TX VO-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
15 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_VIQ_HI WL TX VI-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
14 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BEQ_HI WL TX BE-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
13 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_BKQ_HI WL TX BK-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
12 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_MGQ_HI WL TX MGNT-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
11 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_HIQ_HI WL TX Hi-queue packets 時為 High-priority TX
10 R/W 0 B_BE_RSP_ACK_HI WL TX CBA/MBA/ACK/CTS 時為 High-priority TX
9 R/W 0 B_BE_RSP_CSI_HI WL TX CSI 時為 High-priority TX
8 R/W 0 B_BE_RSP_BSR_BQR_HI WL TX BSR/BQR 時為 High-priority TX
7:5 RO 0 RSVD
4:3 R/W 0 B_BE_PRI_MASK_TX_TIME If the estimate TX time larger than B_BE_PRI_MASK_TX_TIME, the TX is high priority TX.
2'b00: disable
2'b01: 4 ms
2'b10: 6 ms
2'b11: 8 ms
2:1 R/W 0 B_BE_PRI_MASK_RX_TIME_V1 If the estimate RX time larger than B_BE_PRI_MASK_RX_TIME, the RX is high priority RX.
2'b00: disable
2'b01: 4 ms
2'b10: 6 ms
2'b11: 8 ms
0 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_RX 0: CCA-RX
1: Idle RX
18612330h R_BE_BTC_COEX_SEL_C1
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1:0 R/W 0 B_BE_COEX_TBL_SEL 2'b00: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_0
2'b01: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_1
2'b10: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_2
2'b11: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_3
18612334h R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_0_C1
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_0
18612338h R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_1_C1
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_1
1861233Ch R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_2_C1
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_2
18612340h R_BE_BT_COEX_TABLE_3_C1
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_3
18612344h R_BE_BT_BREAK_TABLE_C1
31:16 R/W 0 B_BE_BREAK_WL
15:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BREAK_BT
18612348h R_BE_GNT_SW_CTRL_C1
31:26 RO 0 RSVD
25 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_ACT2_VAL Valid when B_BE_WL_ACT2_CTRL = 1
0: wl_act2 = 0
1: wl_act2 = 1
24 R/W 1 B_BE_WL_ACT2_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control wl_act2
1: Enable SW control wl_act2
23 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_ACT_VAL Valid when B_BE_WL_ACT_CTRL = 1
0: wl_act = 0
1: wl_act = 1
22 R/W 1 B_BE_WL_ACT_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control wl_act
1: Enable SW control wl_act
21 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_rx_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_bt_rx_bb1 = 1
20 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb1
19 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_tx_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_bt_tx_bb1 = 1
18 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb1
17 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_rx_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_bt_rx_bb0 = 1
16 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_rx_bb0
15 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_tx_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_bt_tx_bb0 = 1
14 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_tx_bb0
13 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_rx = 0
1: gnt_wl_rx = 1
12 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_rx
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_rx
11 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_TX_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_TX_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_tx = 0
1: gnt_wl_tx = 1
10 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_TX_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_tx
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_tx
9 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_bt_bb1 = 1
8 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_bb1
7 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_bb1 = 0
1: gnt_wl_bb1 = 1
6 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_bb1
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_bb1
5 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_bt_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_bt_bb0 = 1
4 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_bt_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_bt_bb0
3 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_bb0 = 0
1: gnt_wl_bb0 = 1
2 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_bb0
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_bb0
1 R/W 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR_VAL Valid when B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR_CTRL = 1
0: gnt_wl_bb = 0
1: gnt_wl_bb = 1
0 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR_SWCTRL 0: Disable SW control gnt_wl_bb_pwr
1: Enable SW control gnt_wl_bb
1861234Ch R_BE_GNT_VAL_C1
31:13 RO 0 RSVD
12 RO 0 B_BE_WL_ACT2 The value of wl_act2
11 RO 0 B_BE_WL_ACT The value of wl_act
10 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB1 The value of gnt_bt_rx_bb1
9 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB1 The value of gnt_bt_tx_bb1
8 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_RX_BB0 The value of gnt_bt_rx_bb0
7 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_TX_BB0 The value of gnt_bt_tx_bb0
6 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX The value of gnt_wl_rx
5 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_TX The value of gnt_wl_tx
4 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB1 The value of gnt_bt_bb1
3 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_BT_BB0 The value of gnt_bt_bb0
2 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB1 The value of gnt_wl_bb1
1 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB0 The value of gnt_wl_bb0
0 RO 0 B_BE_GNT_WL_BB_PWR The value of gnt_wl_bb_pwr
18612400h R_BE_BTC2_CFG_C1
31 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC2_EN Enable BT coex
30 RO 0 RSVD
29 R/W 0 B_BE_EN_EXT_BT2_PINMUX Enable external interface
28 W1C 0 B_BE_BTC2_RST Reset BTC circuit state
27 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC2_DBG_SRC_SEL 0: Debug port is from BT1
1: Debug port is from BT2
26 RO 0 RSVD
25:24 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC2_MODE 0: RTK mode
1: CSR 3-wire mode
2, 3: RSVD
23:18 RO 0 RSVD
17 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_INV_WL_ACT 0: wl_act2 = wl_act2
1: wl_act2 = ~wl_act2
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL 影響 WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX 輸出
(WLS1_SEL_BTG_MUX = GNT_BT_BB0 & BTS1_BB_SEL_S1_TRX & B_BE_BTG_LNA1_GAIN_SEL)
15:8 R/W 4 B_BE_COEX_DLY_CLK WL module 參考 PTA 訊號所需的 delay 時間
7 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_RX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_RX
6 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2_TX 1: Ignore GNT_BT2_TX
5 R/W 1 B_BE_IGN_GNT_BT2 1: Ignore GNT_BT2
4:3 R/W 0 B_BE_BTC_DBG_SEL
2 R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_BTC_CLK_G Control BTCOEX module clk gating disable
0:clok gating
1:disable clock gating
1 R/W 1 B_BE_GNT_WL_RX_CTRL 0 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX
1 : GNT_WL_RX = WL_RX & GNT_WL
0 R/W 0 B_BE_WL_SRC 0: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC0
1: WL_TX, WL_RX, WL_PRI come from MAC1
18612404h R_BE_BT2_RTK_MODE_CFG_C1
31:25 RO 0 RSVD
24 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_BLE_EN 0: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & BT_TX, GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & BT_RX
1: GNT_BT_TX = GNT_BT & (BT_TX | BT_BLE), GNT_BT_RX = GNT_BT & (BT_RX | BT_BLE)
23:17 RO 0 RSVD
16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_ULTRA_EN Config GNT_BT & GNT_WL when BT_CMD_ID = 0 & BT_CMD_DATA[3] = 1
15:14 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_L_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
13:12 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_L_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
11:10 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_H_RX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
9:8 R/W 2 B_BE_BT2_H_TX_ULTRA 2'b00: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 0
2'b01: GNT_BT = 0, GNT_WL = 1
2'b10: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 0
2'b11: GNT_BT = 1, GNT_WL = 1
7:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_SAMPLE_CLK The number of clocks HW detects RTK-command is 0 or 1
18612408h R_BE_BT2_CSR_MODE_CFG_C1
31:24 RO 0 RSVD
23:16 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_TIME_CNT The number of clocks of 1us
15:12 RO 0 RSVD Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
11:8 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CSR_DELAY The number of clocks of BT_STATE delay
7:4 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CSR_TRX The number of clocks of CSR-TRX(T2)
3:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CSR_PRI The number of clocks of CSR-PRI(T1)
31:0 RO 0xDEAD_BEEF RSVD
18612410h R_BE_BT2_CNT_CFG_C1
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CNT_RST Write 1 to reset BT_ACT_STATISTICS counters
0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_CNT_EN When this bit is set, the BT_CNT starts counting
18612414h R_BE_BT2_CNT_HI_C1
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT2_HI_RX Counters for BT high priority RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT2_HI_TX Counters for BT high priority TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
18612418h R_BE_BT2_CNT_LOW_C1
31:16 R 0 B_BE_BT2_LOW_RX Counters for BT low RX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
15:0 R 0 B_BE_BT2_LOW_TX Counters for BT low TX. It counts up when B_BE_BT_CNT_EN is set. This counter will reset when B_BE_BT_CNT_RST is written by 1 pulse. This counter cannot wrap around when overflow occurs. Under overflow, this counter is kept with 0xFFFF.
18612420h R_BE_BT2_RTK_CMD_ERR_RPT_C1
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1 W1C 0 B_BE_BT2_RTK_CMD_CRC Indicate the RTK mode command is CRC error
0 W1C 0 B_BE_BT2_RTK_CMD_INC Indicate the RTK mode command is incomplete
31:0 R/W 0 RSVD
18612430h R_BE_BTC2_COEX_SEL_C1
31:2 RO 0 RSVD
1:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_COEX_TBL_SEL 2'b00: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_0_2
2'b01: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_1_2
2'b10: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_2_2
2'b11: coex table = B_BE_BT_COEX_TBL_3_2
18612434h R_BE_BT2_COEX_TABLE_0_C1
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_COEX_TBL_0

18612440h R_BE_BT2_COEX_TABLE_3_C1
31:0 R/W 0 B_BE_BT2_COEX_TBL_3

1861408Ch R_BE_PTCL_RRSR0_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_HE BIT[31:24] = {(msb) HE 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_VHT BIT[23:16] = {(msb) VHT 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_HT BIT[15:8]={(msb) HT MCS7, MCS6, …, MCS0}
[7:0] R/W 0x15 B_BE_RRSR_OFDM BIT[7:0] = { (msb) OFDM54, OFDM48, …,OFDM6}
18614090h R_BE_PTCL_RRSR1_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_RRSR_EHT BIT[23:16] = {(msb) EHT 1SSMCS7, 1SSMCS6, …, 1SSMCS0}
[15:13] R/W 0 RSVD
[12:8] R/W 0x1 B_BE_RRSR_RATE_EN Enabled response rate mode BIT[3:0] = {EHT rate, HE rate,VHT rate,HT rate, OFDM/CCK rate}
[7:6] R/W 0 B_BE_RSC Response frame sub-channel configuration. Response frames (CTS, ACK, BA) are transmitted in the following condition. 00: Primary 20Mhz BW(0x483[3:0] ) 01: Follow Rx packet BW mode. 10: Duplicate mode. (ofdm rate only, others bw20) 11: rsvd
[5:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:0] R/W 0x5 B_BE_RRSR_CCK BIT[3:0] = {(msb) CCK11, …, CCK1}

18614100h R_BE_FWC00IMR_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER6 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_SND_RDY_INT_EN Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RP_END_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx period end.
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that BCN_TO_CNT >= BCN_TO_CNT_THD.
[26] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source that Rx Bcn hit.
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT_EN When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT_EN Enable BCNQ lock interrupt source.
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE7_INT_EN Enable MACID 224~255 power change interrupt source.
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE6_INT_EN Enable MACID 192~223 power change interrupt source.
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE5_INT_EN Enable MACID 160~191 power change interrupt source.
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE4_INT_EN Enable MACID 128~159 power change interrupt source.
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_CTWEnd_INT_EN Enable the CTWindow End 0 interrupt source.
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_TSF32_TOGGLE_INT_EN Enable TSF_BIT32_TOGGLE interrupt source.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_RFON_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt source.
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P2P0_RFOFF_INT_EN Enable P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt source.
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT_EN Enable MACID 96~127 power change interrupt source.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT_EN Enable MACID 64~95 power change interrupt source.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT_EN Enable MACID 32~63 power change interrupt source.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT_EN Enable MACID 0~31 power change interrupt source.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN If B_BE_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTM_INT_EN If B_BE_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_FTM_PTT_EN
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_TXFTM_INT_EN If B_BE_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT_EN Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_RXDONE_INT_EN Enable Rx Packet done interrupt source.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER3 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER2 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER1 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER0 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
18614104h R_BE_FWC00ISR_C1
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_6_INT PSTIMER6 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_C0_PSTIMER6_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[29] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_SND_RDY_INT Issued after BB completes score table computation
[28] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RP_END_INT This event means Rx period end, start to enter LPS.
When the below event happened, issue this interrupt.
- ( (Rx Bcn timeout) | (Bcn hit check done) | (BcnNoHit) )
[27] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_TO_CNT_INT When BCN_TO_CNT > BCN_TO_CNT_THD, issue this interrupt to wake WCPU
[26] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXBCN_HIT_INT When Rx Bcn and IE_HIT or BCAID_HIT or UNIAID_HIT, this interrupt is issued.
[25] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RX_MATCH_RTT_INT When HW receive match RTT frame and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report.
It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[24] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_BCNQ_LOCK_INT BCNQ lock interrupt.
[23] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE7_INT MACID 224~255 power change interrupt.
[22] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE6_INT MACID 192~223 power change interrupt.
[21] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE5_INT MACID 160~191 power change interrupt.
[20] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE4_INT MACID 128~159 power change interrupt.
[19] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, CTWindow End 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[18] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, TSF Timer BIT32 toggle indication interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[17] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF on time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[16] R/W1C 0 RSVD For P2P group0, P2P NoA RF off time indication 0 interrupt.(8852A A cut only, B cut removed)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE3_INT MACID 96~127 power change interrupt.
[14] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE2_INT MACID 64~95 power change interrupt.
[13] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE1_INT MACID 32~63 power change interrupt.
[12] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_MACID_PWRCHANGE0_INT MACID 0~31 power change interrupt.
[11] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTMREQ_INT If B_BE_RXFTMREQ_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTMREQ packet, it will generate interrupt to firmware.
[10] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXFTM_INT If B_BE_RXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW receive FTM and transmit ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[9] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_FTM_PTT_INT
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_TXFTM_INT If B_BE_TXFTM_INT_EN =1. When HW transmit FTM and receive ACK frame successfully, the BB generate FTM report. It will generate interrupt to firmware.
[7] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_SOUND_DONE_INT Be a beamformer, this interrupt is issued at the time after sounding finish.
[6] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_RXDONE_INT Rx Packet done interrupt.
[5] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_5_INT PSTIMER5 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[4] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_4_INT PSTIMER4 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[3] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_3_INT PSTIMER3 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER3_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[2] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_2_INT PSTIMER2 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER2_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_1_INT PSTIMER1 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER1_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_PSTIMER_0_INT PSTIMER0 interrupt.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER0_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
18614108h R_BE_FWC01IMR_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD
[28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27] R/W 0 RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_SW_TXOK1_INT_EN R_FS_P0_SW_TXOK1_INT_EN
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_SW_TXOK0_INT_EN R_FS_P0_SW_TXOK0_INT_EN
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT_EN Enable RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR) interrupt source(Port0)
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF1MRR0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port0)
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port0)
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TRIGGER_PKT_INT_EN Enable TRIGGER_PKT interrupt source.(Port0)
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_EOSP_INT_EN EOSP_INT interrupt mask (HW do not check EOSP, wrong ?).(Port0)
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TXPKTIN_EN
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL1_INT_EN Enable TX null 1 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL0_INT_EN Enable TX null 0 packet done interrupt source.(Port0)
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCNOK_INT_EN When this bit is enable, the interrupt is issued when RX beacon frame occurs.(Port0)
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_RXTSFDIFF_INT_EN Enable RX TSF difference detection. (Port0)
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNERR_INT_EN Enable TX beacon Error interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNOK_INT_EN Enable TX beacon OK interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_HIQWND_INT_EN Enable HIQ window end interrupt source.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTT_INT_EN Enable the interrupt source from the exact TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTTERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by TBTTERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_BCNERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
1861410Ch R_BE_FWC01ISR_C1
[31] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[30] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[29] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[28] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[27] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[26] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[25] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_FS_P0_SW_TXOK1_INT R_FS_P0_SW_TXOK1_INT
[24] W1C 1'b0 B_BE_FS_P0_SW_TXOK0_INT R_FS_P0_SW_TXOK0_INT
[23] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[22] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT The interrupt is issued while RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR)(Port0)
[21] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF1MRR0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port0)
[20] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXMTF0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port0)
[19] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[18] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port0)
[17] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TRIGGER_PKT_INT The interrupt is issued while the pkt is Tx ok which Tri_Frame bit of TXDESC is equal to 1.(Port0)
[16] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_EOSP_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx pkt's EOSP bit = 1.(Port0)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TXPKTIN_INT
[14] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL1_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 1 packet done.(Port0)
[13] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_TX_NULL0_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 0 packet done.(Port0)
[12] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[11] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_UMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[10] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port0)
[9] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RX_BMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port0)
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0_RXBCNOK_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving beacon frame.(Port0)
[7] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[6] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_RXTSFDIFF_INT The interrupt is issued while RX TSF difference is lager than threshold value. (Port0)
[5] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNERR_INT TX beacon Error interrupt(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[4] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TXBCNOK_INT TX beacon OK interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[3] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_HIQWND_INT HIQ window end interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[2] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTT_INT The exact TBTT time interrupt.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_TBTTERLY_INT This interrupt is issued at the time set by TBTTERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P0MB0_BCNERLY_INT This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port0 or MBSSID0)

[30] R/W 0 RSVD

[22] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT_EN Enable RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR) interrupt source(Port1)
[21] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_RXMTF1MRR0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port1)
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_RXMTF0_INT_EN Setting this bit indicates that Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port1)

[18] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port1)

[16] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_EOSP_INT_EN EOSP_INT interrupt mask (HW do not check EOSP, wrong ?).(Port1)

[10] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_RX_BMD0_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port1)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_RX_BMD1_INT_EN Enable interrupt source from receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port1)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_RXBCNOK_INT_EN When this bit is enable, the interrupt is issued when RX beacon frame occurs. (Port1)
[7] R/W 0 RSVD

[0] R/W 0 B_BE_FS_P1_BCNERLY_INT_EN This interrupt is issued at the time set by DRVERLYINT register before TBTT time.(Port1)

[22] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXBCN_NOHIT_INT The interrupt is issued while RX BCN UNIAID and BCAID are no hit (regardless of FCS OK/ERR)(Port4)
[21] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXMTF1MRR0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=1 and MoreRARU=0 in user info of RA-RU (Port4)
[20] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXMTF0_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx trigger frame is matched with MoreTF=0 (Port4)
[19] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UAPSDMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=1, UAPSD=1 (Port4)
[18] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UAPSDMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving pkt matched with that QoS Unicast data frame with MD=0, UAPSD=1 (Port4)
[17] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TRIGGER_PKT_INT The interrupt is issued while the pkt is Tx ok which Tri_Frame bit of TXDESC is equal to 1.(Port4)
[16] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_EOSP_INT The interrupt is issued while Rx pkt's EOSP bit = 1.(Port4)
[15] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TXPKTIN_INT
[14] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TX_NULL1_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 1 packet done.(Port4)
[13] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_TX_NULL0_INT The interrupt is issued while TX null 0 packet done.(Port4)
[12] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[11] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_UMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving unicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[10] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_BMD0_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=0.(Port4)
[9] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RX_BMD1_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving broadcast and multicast data frame with More Data=1.(Port4)
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXBCNOK_INT The interrupt is issued while receiving beacon frame.(Port4)
[7] R/W1C 0 RSVD
[6] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FS_P4_RXTSFDIFF_INT The interrupt is issued while RX TSF difference is lager than threshold value. (Port4)
