18614180h R_BE_HC00IMR_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] R/W 0 RSVD
[28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27] R/W 0 RSVD
[26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0 RSVD
[21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_255to224_INT_EN MACID 255 to 224 power bit change HIMR
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_223to192_INT_EN MACID 223 to 192 power bit change HIMR
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_191to160_INT_EN MACID 191 to 160 power bit change HIMR
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_159to128_INT_EN MACID 159 to 128 power bit change HIMR
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P4_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 4 band 0
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P3_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 3 band 0
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P2_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 2 band 0
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P1_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 1 band 0
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_B0P0_INT_EN TBTT HIMR of port 0 band 0
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PKT_INFO_ERR_INT_EN packet content error or illegal HIMR (EX: WDINFO_EN = 1 but no WDINFO)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_BB_STOPRX_INT_EN RX is over when BB stop HIMR
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_TXERR_INT_EN Tx Error Flag HIMR
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RXERR_INT_EN Rx Error Flag HIMR
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P1_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 1 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P0_TSF32_TOGG_INT_EN P2P 0 TSF Timer bit 32 toggle indication HIMR
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_127to96_INT_EN MACID 127 to 96 power bit change HIMR
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_95to64_INT_EN MACID 95 to 64 power bit change HIMR
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_63to32_INT_EN MACID 63 to 32 power bit change HIMR
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PWR_31to0_INT_EN MACID 31 to 0 power bit change HIMR
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER_5_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER5 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER5_VAL , this interrupt is issued.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER_4_INT_EN Enable PSTIMER4 interrupt source.
When the lower 4 bytes of TSFTR/FreeRun Counter (that select by B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of B_BE_PSTIMER4_VAL, this interrupt is issued.
18614200h R_BE_PPS0_CTRL_C1
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS0_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS0_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 0 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_BE_PPS0_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 0. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 0 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 0. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 0.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 0 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
18614204h R_BE_PPS0_SPEC_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 0 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18614205h R_BE_PPS0_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POW_STATE PPS 0 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_BE_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_BE_PPS0_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18614206h R_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL0_C1
[15] RO 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_0_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_0_pps1_mgq_pause_en
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_0_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_0_pps1_hiq_pause_en
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_0_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_0_pps1_bcnq_pause_en
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 0 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_MACID PPS 0 MACID selection.
18614208h R_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL1_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 0 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1861420Ch R_BE_PPS0_PAUSE_CTRL2_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 0 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PPS0_POWON_ERLY PPS 0 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
18614210h R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_DUR PPS 0 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
18614214h R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_ITVL PPS 0 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
18614218h R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_START First PPS 0 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861421Ch R_BE_PPS0_POF0_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_CNT PPS 0 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18614220h R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_DUR PPS 0 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
18614224h R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_ITVL PPS 0 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
18614228h R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_START First PPS 0 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861422Ch R_BE_PPS0_POF1_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_CNT PPS 0 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18614230h R_BE_PPS0_CURR_DOZE0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
18614234h R_BE_PPS0_CURR_DOZE1_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS0_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 0 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
18614240h R_BE_PPS1_CTRL_C1
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS1_PWR_RST1 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 1
[30] W1C 0 B_BE_PPS1_PWR_RST0 Write 1 to reset PPS 1 POF 0
[29:28] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 5 B_BE_PPS1_CTWIN CTWindow width of PPS 1. Unit: 32 us.
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_TXOP_BRK_EN 1: TXOP break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_AGG_BRK_EN 1: AMPDU aggregation break at the end of PON. 0: Disable.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF_AND_EN 1: Decide power off by POF0 & POF1. 0: Decide power off by POF0 | POF1.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_PSWIND_EN 1: Enable to set PPS 1 PS window for STA_SCH. 0: Disable.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_TSFB32_RST_EN 1: Enable reset POF 0 and POF 1 when TSF BIT32 toggle for PPS 1. 0: Disable.
[10:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_PORT_SEL Port selector for PPS 1.
0 ~ 4 = Port 0 ~ 4, others for none.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_ALLSLEEP_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 all sleep mode, 0: Disable.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_OFF_DISTX_EN 1: Enable HW disable TX in whole power off period. 0: Do Nothing.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_CTWIN_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 CTWINDOW function. 0: Disable.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNAREA_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCN area on function. 0 : Disable.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_WITHBCNERY 1 : PPS power state decision include BCN early. 0 : Do not include.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 1, 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 POF 0, 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_PWR_MGT_EN Main switch for PPS 1 Power Saving. 1: Enable, 0: Disable.
18614244h R_BE_PPS1_SPEC_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_POW_STATE PPS 1 current spec power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 spec period.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 spec period.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_SPEC_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18614245h R_BE_PPS1_STATE_C1
[7] $RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POW_STATE PPS 1 current power state. 1: On. 0: Off.
[6] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_CTWIN_ON Current time is during TBTT to CTWEND or BCNERLY to CTWEND. Decided by B_BE_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNAREA_ON Current time is during TBTT to TXBCN/timeout or BCNERLY to TXBCN/timeout. Decided by B_BE_PPS1_WITHBCNERY.
[4] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNERLY Current time is during BCNERLY to TBTT.
[3] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 1 power off early to power on early.
[2] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE1 If POF 1 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
[1] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_OFF_PERD Current time is during POF 0 power off early to power on early.
[0] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_FORCE_DOZE0 If POF 0 Count == 1, this value is 1. else 0.
18614246h R_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL0_C1
[15] RO 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF_STOP_TX_HANG PPSPS_POF_STOP_TX_HANG
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_1_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_1_pps1_mgq_pause_en
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_1_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_1_pps1_hiq_pause_en
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_P2P_1_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN r_p2p_1_pps1_bcnq_pause_en
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_MGQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MGQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(mgq backoff will stop)
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_HIQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 HIQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused)
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_BCNQ_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 BCNQ pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)(other ports will NOT be paused too)
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_MACID_PAUSE_EN 1: Enable PPS 1 MACID pause. 0: Disable. (dis_tx_case 1 or 2)
[7:0] R/W 0xFF B_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_MACID PPS 1 MACID selection.
18614248h R_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL1_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POWON_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power on interrupt occur. Unit: 32us. (should larger than POF_OFF_EARLY_TIME)
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POWOFF_DISTX The time of the disable TX period after the PPS 1 Power off interrupt occur. Unit: 32us.
1861424Ch R_BE_PPS1_PAUSE_CTRL2_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POWOFF_ERLY PPS 1 power off early. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PPS1_POWON_ERLY PPS 1 power on early. Unit: 32 us.
18614250h R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_DUR PPS 1 POF 0 duration. Unit: us.
18614254h R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_ITVL PPS 1 POF 0 interval. Unit: us.
18614258h R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_START First PPS 1 POF 0 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861425Ch R_BE_PPS1_POF0_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_CNT PPS 1 POF 0 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18614260h R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM0_C1
31:0 R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_DUR PPS 1 POF 1 duration. Unit: us.
18614264h R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00003000 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_ITVL PPS 1 POF 1 interval. Unit: us.
18614268h R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0x00001000 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_START First PPS 1 POF 1 period start TSF(Low 4 bytes).
1861426Ch R_BE_PPS1_POF1_PARAM3_C1
[31:16] R 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_CUR_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 current count.
[7:0] R/W 0x03 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_CNT PPS 1 POF 1 count. 1: Aperiodic POF. 2 ~ 255: Periodic POF.
18614270h R_BE_PPS1_CURR_DOZE0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF0_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 0 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
18614274h R_BE_PPS1_CURR_DOZE1_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_PPS1_POF1_CURR_DOZE PPS 1 POF 1 current doze TSF. Need to backup/restore.
186142A0h R_BE_port_0_tsf_sync_C1
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_BE_p0_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_BE_p0_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_BE_p0_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_BE_p0_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_BE_p0_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus
186142A4h R_BE_port_1_tsf_sync_C1
[31] R 0 RSVD
[30] W 0 B_BE_p1_sync_now_p do port sync when this bit is write 1
[29] W 0 B_BE_p1_sync_once_p only do once port sync when tbtt_int
[28] RW 0 B_BE_p1_auto_sync always do port sync when tbtt_int
[27] R 0 RSVD
[26:24] RW 0 B_BE_p1_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_BE_p1_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus

[26:24] RW 0 B_BE_p2_sync_port_src_sel source port. "0/1/2/3/4" : port 0/1/2/3/4. "5/6/7" : freerun
[23:19] R 0 RSVD
[18:0] RW 0 B_BE_p2_tsftr_sync_offset unit : 32us, bit[18] : "0" pluse , "1" : minus

186142F0h R_BE_ABORT_CNT_SEL_C1
[31:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] RW 1'b0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_OV_EN "1": tx abort cnt will overflow from 0xFF -> 0x0.
[6] $RW 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_CLR_P write 1T pulse to HW design
[5] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_CLR_REQ "1": still clear abort counters. "0": finish clear abort counters
[4:0] RW 5'h0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_SEL to select SCH_ABORT_CNT
186142F4h R_BE_ABORT_CNT_C1
[31:24] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_3 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
[23:16] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_2 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
[15:8] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_1 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
[7:0] RO 0 B_BE_ABORT_CNT_0 select by r_sch_abort_cnt_sel
18614300h R_BE_edca_be_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_be_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_BE_be_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_BE_be_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18614304h R_BE_edca_bk_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_bk_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0xA5 B_BE_bk_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x49 B_BE_bk_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18614308h R_BE_edca_vi_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x5e B_BE_vi_0_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x43 B_BE_vi_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x26 B_BE_vi_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1861430Ch R_BE_edca_vo_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD

An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_vo_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_vo_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space

18614314h R_BE_edca_bk_param_1_C1

[15:8] R/W 0x43 B_BE_vi_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1

1861431Ch R_BE_edca_vo_param_1_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x2f B_BE_vo_1_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_vo_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.

In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18614320h R_BE_edca_mgq_param_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x32 B_BE_cpumgq_cw ( cpumgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[23:16] R/W 0x24 B_BE_cpumgq_aifs ( cpumgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_mgq_cw ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_mgq_aifs ( normal mgq and no power save mgq)
Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18614324h R_BE_edca_bcnq_param_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x44 B_BE_bcnq_cw Beacon Contention Window MAX/MIN
Defines the contention window value for back off before transmitting beacon frame. This field is set to 0 in AP mode to indicate no back off window. In ad hoc mode, its default value is 6. 26-1 = 63 time slots.
[23:16] R/W 0x13 B_BE_bcnq_aifs Beacon Interframe Space
In units of microseconds, this register defines the medium idle time required before transmitting beacon (AP mode) or entering random back off window.
[15:8] R/W 0x1C B_BE_pifs
[7:0] R/W 0x20 B_BE_force_bcn_ifs
18614328h R_BE_edca_ulq_param_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_ulq_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_ulq_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_ulq_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
1861432Ch R_BE_edca_twt_param_0_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD

[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_twt_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_twt_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18614330h R_BE_edca_twt_param_1_C1
[31:27] RSVD RSVD RSVD RSVD
[26:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_twt_1_txoplmt TXOP Limit
An unsigned integer in units of 32 microseconds. Value of zero indicates that a single MSDU or MMPDU in addition to a protection frame exchange can be transmitted at any rate.
Default: BK = 0h; BE = 0h; VI = 5Eh; VO = 2Fh.
[15:8] R/W 0x32 B_BE_twt_1_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x24 B_BE_twt_1_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18614334h R_BE_slottime_cfg_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD
[27:24] R/W 4'h7 B_BE_SLOT_EXT_THD
[23] RO 0 RSVD
[22:16] R/W 7'h19 B_BE_BURST_CNT_DOWN_TIME
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7:0] R/W 8'h09 B_BE_SLOT_TIME count for 1 slot (unit: 1us)
18614338h R_BE_prebkf_cfg_0_C1
[31:29] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[28:24] R/W 0x10 B_BE_100ns_time count for 100ns. (unit: clock cycle) EX: 8 for 80MHz
[23] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:16] R/W 0x3c B_BE_rx_air_end_time when rx_air_end == 1, assume air has idle for this setting value. unit: 0.1 us ( EX: 0x3C is 6 us)
[15:11] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[10:8] R/W 0x02 B_BE_mactx_latency assume latency from mactx to phytx. (unit: 1us)
[7:5] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0x09 B_BE_prebkf_time inform ptcl to gen txcmd if backoff remain time less than this setting value. (unit: 1us) (For ACQ and F2PTXCMD)
1861433Ch R_BE_prebkf_cfg_1_C1
[31:24] RW 0x89 B_BE_sifs_timeout_tb_aggr_V1 if sifs_timer > (rx_air_end+sifs_timeout_tb_aggr), inform ptcl to break aggr.
[23:16] R/W 0x46 B_BE_sifs_prebkf if sifs_prebkf_cnt < prebkf time in burst tx, inform ptcl to gen cmd. unit: 0.1us
[15] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:8] R/W 0x2f B_BE_sifs_timeout_t2 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t2), inform ptcl sifs timeout unit: 0.1us
[7] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:0] R/W 0x48 B_BE_sifs_mactxen_t1 if ifstimer > (rx_air_end+t1), inform wmac txunit: 0.1us
18614340h R_BE_cca_cfg_0_C1
[31:24] RW 0x32 B_BE_r_sifs_aggr_time_V1 rx_air_end 後, r_sifs_aggr_time[6:0] * 0.1 us PTCL 停止 aggregation
[23] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC160_EN r_edcca_s160_en
[22] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC80_EN r_edcca_s80_en
[21] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC40_EN r_edcca_s40_en
[20] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_EDCCA_SEC20_EN r_edcca_s20_en
[19] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_SEC160_EN r_ofdm_cca_s160_en
[18] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_CCA_BITMAP_EN r_cca_per_bitmap_en
[17] R/W 1 B_BE_TXPKTCTL_RST_EDCA_EN
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_WMAC_RST_EDCA_EN
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11] R/W 1'b1 B_BE_TXFAIL_BRK_TXOP_EN This bits control tx fail break/ not break txop.
"0" : tx fail break txop
"1" : tx fail NOT break txop
tx fail indicates receive unexpected frame or acktimeout after transmission.
[10] R/W 1 B_BE_EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS_EN 1: TX TB PPDU 會檢查 EDCCA_PER20_BITMAP_SIFS
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_NO_GNT_WL_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: BT CCA break txop
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_NAV_BRK_TXOP_EN 1: NAV break txop
[7] R/W 1 B_BE_TX_NAV_EN 1: contention 會看 tx_nav
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_IGNORE_EDCCA Not ready
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_NO_GNT_WL_EN scheduler BTCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 BTCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_EDCCA_EN scheduler EDCCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 EDCCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_SEC80_EN scheduler SEC 80 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 80 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_SEC40_EN scheduler SEC 40 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 40 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_SEC20_EN scheduler SEC20 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 SEC 20 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_CCA_EN scheduler primary 20M CCA 總開關. "1" scheduler 會看 CCA, "0" scheduler 不看. (Debug 用途)
18614344h R_BE_misc_0_C1
[31] RW 0 B_BE_sifs_aggr_brk_time_mode "1": refer rx_air_end + aggr_break_ref_time. "0" : refer txon rising + aggr_break_ref_time
[30] RW 1'b1 B_BE_hiq_chk_wmac_tx "1": check wmac txok. "0": check sch_tx_gnt. May occur last tx hiq no retry issue.
[29] $RW 0 B_BE_SCH_NO_GNT_WL_RST_P r_sch_no_gnt_wl_rst_p
[28] RO 0 B_BE_sch_no_gnt_wl sch_no_gnt_wl
[27:24] R/W 9 B_BE_SCH_DBG_FORCE_ABORT_CNT extend scheduler debug force abort signal. (unit : 1us)
[23] RW 1'b1 B_BE_edca_chk_q_empty_en r_edca_chk_q_empty_en
[22:20] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15] RW 0 B_BE_dis_bcn_mbss_gating_clk r_dis_sch_bcn_mbss_gating_clk
[14] RW 1'b1 B_BE_dis_bcn_mprt_gating_clk r_dis_sch_bcn_mprt_gating_clk
[13] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[12] R/W 1 B_BE_SCH_ABORT_BRK_TB_EN "1" : clear scheduler tb timer logic when tx abort
[11] R/W 1 B_BE_SCH_ABORT_BRK_BURST_EN "1" : clear scheduler burst timer logic when tx abort
[10] R/W 1 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_LOW_AUTO_RST “1” : reset port function logic when port function enable is low
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_SCH_CLK_GATING_DIS "1" : scheduler disable dynamic clock gating. "0" : scheduler enable dynamic clock gating
[8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W 0 B_BE_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_CLR_P "1" : clear sch_dbg_rst_edca signal
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_SCH_DBG_RST_EDCA_EN "1" : scheduler creates a sch_dbg_rst_edca signal to reset ifs timer when tx ppdu.
[5:4] R 0 RSVD
[3] W 0 B_BE_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_P "1" : create a pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_SCH_FORCE_ABORT_AUTO_EN "1" : scheduler creates periodic 32 us pulse to try to abort PTCL/SCH tx. It is a stress test for PTCL/SCH tx abort procedure.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_TXOP_RESP_EN "1" : allow response tx in txop.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_en_tbtt_area_foR_BE_bb

[31:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD

18614350h R_BE_muedca_be_param_0_C1
[31:16] R/W 0x00 B_BE_muedca_be_param_0_timer MU EDCA TIMER, in units of 32 us
Note: SPEC: The MU EDCA Timer field (8b) indicates the duration of time, in units of 8 TUs
[15:8] R/W 0xA4 B_BE_muedca_be_param_0_cw ECWmin and ECWmax encode the values of Cwmin and Cwmax respectively in an exponent form. Ex: Cwmax = 2^(ECWmax)-1
Default: BK = Ah/5h; BE = Ah/5h; VI = 5h/4h; VO = 4h/3h.
[7:0] R/W 0x2B B_BE_muedca_be_param_0_aifs Arbitrary Inter frame space
In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission
Default: BK = 49h; BE = 25h; VI = 1Ch; VO = 1Ch.
18614354h R_BE_muedca_bk_param_0_C1

In unit of microsecond. AIFS indicates the time a non-AP QSTA should defer before either invoking a backoff or starting a transmission

18614370h R_BE_muedca_en_C1
[31:9] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] RW 0 B_BE_muedca_wmm_sel "0" : wmm 0 支援 mu edca
"1" : wmm 1 支援 mu edca
[7:6] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_set_muedcatimer_tf_1 RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_set_muedcatimer_tf_0 1: enable HW updating MUEDCATimer after Tx HE TB PPDU
0: disable HW updating MUEDCATimer after Tx HE TB PPDU
[3] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] RW 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_muedca_en_0 WMM0
1: enable HW updating MUEDCATimer
0: disable HW updating MUEDCATimer
18614374h R_BE_rand_scr_bit_C1
[31:23] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:0] $R/W 0x7CFFFF B_BE_rand_scbits 可以讀出目前 23 bits 的 random value. 也可以寫進去
18614378h R_BE_random_cfg_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:0] R/W 0xE21051 B_BE_rand_set [23] : "1" enable random generator
[22:0] : random generater 生成多項式
1861437Ch R_BE_MISC_1_C1
[31:6] RO 0 rsvd
[5] RW 0 B_BE_cal_tbtt_ov_en "1": value after tbtt shift can more than one beacon space. (1st tbtt_int after LPS restore may after 2 beacon space.) "0": If value after tbtt shift is more than one beacon space, HW will minus one beacon space.
[4] RO 0 rsvd
[3] RW 0 B_BE_subbcn_ms_cnt_mode "1": subbcn_ms_cnt refer tsft[10] toggle. "0": subbcn_ms_cnt refer (us_cnt_down[9:0] == 0)
[2] RW 1'b1 B_BE_cal_always_en "1": can always calculate next tbtt when event occur. "0": only calculate next tbtt when event occur and t_1us_p.
[1] RW 0 B_BE_sifs_timer_auto_rst_en "1": auto reset sifs timer if sifs timer reach max.
[0] RW 1'b1 B_BE_chk_has_sifs_tx_abort "1": Do not sifs tx if has already sifs tx abort. Until rx_air_end or cca end.
18614380h R_BE_MUEDCATIMER_0_C1
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BK_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BE_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore (0x170[0]=0, clear timer)
Unit: 32 us.
18614384h R_BE_MUEDCATIMER_1_C1
[31:16] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VO_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VI_0 MUEDCATIMER for backup/restore flow in LPS
HW countdown this timer (until 0) in non-LPS state, and do compensate when restore
Unit: 32 us.
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BK_1 muedca_timer_bk1
[15:0] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_BE_1 muedca_timer_be1
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VO_1 muedca_timer_vo1
[15:0] RO 0 B_BE_MUEDCATIMER_VI_1 muedca_timer_vi1

[3] RW 1'b1 B_BE_sr_eht_ctn_chk_edcca_bitmap r_sr_eht_ctn_chk_edcca_bitmap
[2] RW 1'b1 B_BE_sr_eht_ctn_chk_cca_bitmap r_sr_eht_ctn_chk_cca_bitmap
[1] RW 1'b1 B_BE_sr_eht_ctn_chk_edcca_p20 r_sr_eht_ctn_chk_edcca_p20
[0] RW 1'b0 B_BE_sr_eht_ctn_chk_cca_p20 r_sr_eht_ctn_chk_cca_p20
186143E0h R_BE_PUNC_RPT_CFG_C1
[31] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[30] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[29] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[28] RO 1'h0 rsvd
[27] RO 1'b0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_max
[26] RO 1'b0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_clr_req "1" : after writing "r_punc_rptreg_clr", "0" : after finish reset counter
[25:16] $RO 10'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_total
[15:14] RO 2'h0 rsvd
[13:12] RW 2'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_blk_prd
[11] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[10:8] RW 3'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_mode
[7] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[6:4] RW 3'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_sel
[3] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[2] RO 1'b0 rsvd
[1] $RW 1'b0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_clr write 1 pulse to request clear puncture counter
[0] RW 1'b1 B_BE_punc_rptreg_en
186143E4h R_BE_PUNC_RPT_CNT_C1
[31:24] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_3 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
[23:16] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_2 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
[15:8] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_1 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
[7:0] $RO 8'h0 B_BE_punc_rptreg_0 select by "r_punc_rptreg_sel"
186143E8h R_BE_SCHEDULE_ERR_IMR_C1
[31:2] R/W 0 RSVD -
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_SORT_NON_IDLE_ERR_INT_EN [RSVD] During sort process, and discover another sort_req
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT_EN State machine of SCHEDULE over 32us, and not retrun idle state
186143ECh R_BE_SCHEDULE_ERR_ISR_C1
[31:2] RO 0 RSVD -
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_SORT_NON_IDLE_ERR_INT During sort process, and discover another sort_req
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_FSM_TIMEOUT_ERR_INT State machine of SCHEDULE over 32us, and not retrun idle state
186143F4h R_BE_sch_dbg_sel_C1
[31:17] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_sch_dbg_en enable scheduler debug
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_sch_cfg_cmd_sel scheduler config command select
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_sch_dbg_sel scheduler debug select
186143F8h R_BE_sch_dbg_C1
[31:0] RO 0 B_BE_scheduler_dbg scheduler debug port (for debug)
186143FCh R_BE_SCH_EXT_CTRL_C1
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_31_REG
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY_30_REG

18614400h R_BE_PORT_CFG_P0_C1
[31:19] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_ERLY_SORT_EN_P0 BCN early timer sorting enable.
1: Timer sorting will consider Port 0 BCN early timer count down timer when PORT_FUNC_EN_P0 = 1 and TBTT_AGG_P0 != 0.
0: Timer sorting does not consider Port 0 BCN early count down timer.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P0 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_BRK_SETUP_P0 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P0 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P0 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P0 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNTX_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_NET_TYPE_P0 Network Type for port 0 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P0 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P0 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_AGRES_P0 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_TSFTR_RST_P0 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P0 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_TSF_UDT_EN_P0 1: Enable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 0 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_P0 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P0 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.
18614404h R_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_P0_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0xC8 B_BE_TBTT_HOLD_P0 TBTT prohibit hold time. unit: 32 us.
[15:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0x02 B_BE_TBTT_SETUP_P0 TBTT prohibit setup time. unit: 32 us.
18614408h R_BE_BCN_AREA_P0_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_MSK_AREA_P0 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x60 B_BE_BCN_CTN_AREA_P0 BCN contention area 1 width. Unit: 32us ( Not ready)
1861440Ch R_BE_BCNERLYINT_CFG_P0_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_BE_BCNERLY_P0 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1861440Eh R_BE_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P0_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x05 B_BE_TBTTERLY_P0 It is used to config BB/RF early at TBTT early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 1 us.
18614412h R_BE_TBTT_AGG_P0_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_AGG_NUM_P0 Set TBTT AGG number for DTIM TBTT. TBTT related INTs are NOT issued at non-DTIM TBTT.
[7:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
18614414h R_BE_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P0_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_SUB_BCN_SPACE_P0 BCN interval of the VAP in port 0. Not valid for port 1~4. Unit: TU.
[15:0] R/W 0x64 B_BE_BCN_SPACE_P0 When MBSSID is disable, this field is the beacon interval. When MBSSID is enable, this register is the beacon space of root. Unit: TU.
18614418h R_BE_BCN_FORCETX_P0_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x01 B_BE_FORCE_BCN_NUM_P0 When BCN TX forced mode is enabled, force mode will be over after BCN TX OK number reaches this threshold. Set to 0 is equal to 1 (Still have 1 BCN in forced mode). (Not ready)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_BE_BCN_MAX_ERR_P0 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)
18614420h R_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_P0_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P0 BCN error total count of port 0
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_NAV_P0 BCN error count caused by NAV of port 0
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_EDCCA_P0 BCN error count caused by EDCCA of port 0
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_CCA_P0 BCN error count caused by CCA of port 0
18614424h R_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_P0_C1
[15:4] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_SRCHEND_P0 BCN error flag caused by search until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[2] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_INVALID_P0 BCN error flag caused by INVALID of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[1] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_CMP_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCN_SRCH_SEQ compare illegal of port 0. Write 1 clear.
[0] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_LOCK_P0 BCN error flag caused by BCNQ locked until hold time end of port 0. Write 1 clear.
18614426h R_BE_DTIM_CTRL_P0_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_BE_DTIM_NUM_P0 Set the DTIM count of port 0.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DTIM_CURRCNT_P0 Current DTIM count of port 0.
18614428h R_BE_TBTT_SHIFT_P0_C1
[31:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_SHIFT_OFST_P0 TBTT shift offset. unit: TU.
Notice that this field is an signed number, it is minus value if MSB is 1.
Next TBTT counter = BCN_ITVL - (current TSF % BCN_ITVL) +- TBTT_SHIFT
18614434h R_BE_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_CNT_TMR_P0 Beacon count down timer of port 0. Unit: us.
18614438h R_BE_TSFTR_LOW_P0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 1 B_BE_TSFTR_LOW_P0 TSFT TIMER low 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
1861443Ch R_BE_TSFTR_HIGH_P0_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_TSFTR_HIGH_P0 TSFT TIMER high 32 bits of port 0
(需先寫 Low 32 bits 再寫 High 32 bits)
18614440h R_BE_PORT_CFG_P1_C1
[31:19] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_ERLY_SORT_EN_P1 BCN early timer sorting enable.
1: Timer sorting will consider Port 1 BCN early count down timer when PORT_FUNC_EN_P1 = 1 and TBTT_AGG_P1 != 0.
0: Timer sorting does not consider Port 1 BCN early count down timer.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P1 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_BRK_SETUP_P1 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P1 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P1 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P1 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNTX_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_NET_TYPE_P1 Network Type for port 1 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P1 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P1 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_AGRES_P1 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_TSFTR_RST_P1 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P1 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_TSF_UDT_EN_P1 1: Enable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 1 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_P1 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P1 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.

18614480h R_BE_PORT_CFG_P2_C1
[30:19] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_ERLY_SORT_EN_P2 BCN early timer sorting enable.
1: Timer sorting will consider Port 2 BCN early count down timer when PORT_FUNC_EN_P2 = 1 and TBTT_AGG_P2 != 0.
0: Timer sorting does not consider Port 2 BCN early count down timer.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P2 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_BRK_SETUP_P2 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P2 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P2 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P2 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNTX_EN_P2 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_NET_TYPE_P2 Network Type for port 2 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P2 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P2 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P2 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_AGRES_P2 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_TSFTR_RST_P2 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P2 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer

(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_TSF_UDT_EN_P2 1: Enable port 2 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 2 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_P2 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.

2. Timestamp enable for port.

[0] R/W 1 B_BE_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P2 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.

18614488h R_BE_BCN_AREA_P2_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_MSK_AREA_P2 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] $RO 0 B_BE_BCN_CTN_AREA_P2 same value as B_BE_BCN_CTN_AREA_P1
1861448Ch R_BE_BCNERLYINT_CFG_P2_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_BE_BCNERLY_P2 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.
1861448Eh R_BE_TBTTERLYINT_CFG_P2_C1
[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0x05 B_BE_TBTTERLY_P2 It is used to config BB/RF early at TBTT early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 1 us.
18614492h R_BE_TBTT_AGG_P2_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_AGG_NUM_P2 Set TBTT AGG number for DTIM TBTT. TBTT related INTs are NOT issued at non-DTIM TBTT.
[7:0] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
18614494h R_BE_BCN_SPACE_CFG_P2_C1
[31:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0x64 B_BE_BCN_SPACE_P2 Beacon interval. Unit: TU.
18614498h R_BE_BCN_FORCETX_P2_C1
[31:24] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:16] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:8] R/W 0x01 B_BE_FORCE_BCN_NUM_P2 When BCN TX forced mode is enabled, force mode will be over after BCN TX OK number reaches this threshold. Set to 0 is equal to 1 (Still have 1 BCN in forced mode). (Not ready)
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_BE_BCN_MAX_ERR_P2 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)
186144A0h R_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_P2_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_SUM_P2 BCN error total count of port 2
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_NAV_P2 BCN error count caused by NAV of port 2
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_EDCCA_P2 BCN error count caused by EDCCA of port 2
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_CNT_CCA_P2 BCN error count caused by CCA of port 2
186144A4h R_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_P2_C1
[15:4] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[3] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_SRCHEND_P2 BCN error flag caused by search until hold time end of port 2. Write 1 clear.
[2] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_INVALID_P2 BCN error flag caused by INVALID of port 2. Write 1 clear.
[1] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_CMP_P2 BCN error flag caused by BCN_SRCH_SEQ compare illegal of port 2. Write 1 clear.
[0] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_ERR_FLAG_LOCK_P2 BCN error flag caused by BCNQ locked until hold time end of port 2. Write 1 clear.
186144A6h R_BE_DTIM_CTRL_P2_C1
[15:8] R/W 1 B_BE_DTIM_NUM_P2 Set the DTIM count of port 2.
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DTIM_CURRCNT_P2 Current DTIM count of port 2.
186144A8h R_BE_TBTT_SHIFT_P2_C1
[31:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_BE_TBTT_SHIFT_OFST_P2 TBTT shift offset. unit: TU.
Notice that this field is an signed number, it is minus value if MSB is 1.
Next TBTT counter = BCN_ITVL - (current TSF % BCN_ITVL) +- TBTT_SHIFT
186144B4h R_BE_BCN_CNT_TMR_P2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_CNT_TMR_P2 Beacon count down timer of port 2. Unit: us.
186144B8h R_BE_TSFTR_LOW_P2_C1
[31:0] $R/W 1 B_BE_TSFTR_LOW_P2 TSFT TIMER low 32 bits of port 2
需先寫 Low 32 bits, 再寫 High 32 bits
186144BCh R_BE_TSFTR_HIGH_P2_C1
[31:0] $R/W 0 B_BE_TSFTR_HIGH_P2 TSFT TIMER high 32 bits of port 2
需先寫 Low 32 bits, 再寫 High 32 bits
186144C0h R_BE_PORT_CFG_P3_C1
[30:19] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_ERLY_SORT_EN_P3 BCN early timer sorting enable.
1: Timer sorting will consider Port 3 BCN early count down timer when PORT_FUNC_EN_P3 = 1 and TBTT_AGG_P3 != 0.
0: Timer sorting does not consider Port 3 BCN early count down timer.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P3 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_BRK_SETUP_P3 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P3 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P3 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P3 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNTX_EN_P3 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_NET_TYPE_P3 Network Type for port 3 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P3 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P3 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P3 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_AGRES_P3 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_TSFTR_RST_P3 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P3 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_TSF_UDT_EN_P3 1: Enable port 3 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 3 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_P3 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.
3. Interrupt source.(TSF)
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_TXBCN_RPT_EN_P3 1: Enable to issue TXBCN report in ad hoc and AP mode. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_RXBCN_RPT_EN_P3 1: Enable RXBCNOK report. 0: Disable.
186144C4h R_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_P3_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] RO 0xC8 B_BE_TBTT_HOLD_P3 TBTT prohibit hold time. unit: 32 us.
[15:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7:0] RO 0x02 B_BE_TBTT_SETUP_P3 TBTT prohibit setup time. unit: 32 us.

[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_MSK_AREA_P3 Mask BCN contention area width. Unit: 32us

[11:0] $RO 0 B_BE_BCN_CTN_AREA_P2 same value as B_BE_BCN_CTN_AREA_P1

[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0xA0 B_BE_BCNERLY_P3 It is used to wake up early at BCN early time before TBTT and send interrupt to notify FW/SW. Unit: 32 us.

[15:12] RO 0 RSVD RSVD

[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_BE_BCN_MAX_ERR_P3 When BCN TX error count goes over this threshold, BCN contention area 2 becomes forced mode (BCN will ignore CCA to TX). Set 0xFF to disable forced mode. (Not ready)

18614500h R_BE_PORT_CFG_P4_C1
[30:19] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[18] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_ERLY_SORT_EN_P4 BCN early timer sorting enable.
1: Timer sorting will consider Port 4 BCN early count down timer when PORT_FUNC_EN_P4 = 1 and TBTT_AGG_P4 != 0.
0: Timer sorting does not consider Port 4 BCN early count down timer.
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_PROHIB_END_CAL_EN_P4 1: Hold time end update TBTT count down
0: Hold time end DO NOT update TBTT count down
[16] R/W 1 B_BE_BRK_SETUP_P4 1: ACQ/ULQ TX breaks at setup time.
0: ACQ/ULQ TX may cross setup time.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_UPD_SHIFT_SEL_P4 1: TBTT count down timer is updated with mod and shift at TBTT.
0: TBTT count down timer is updated to beacon interval at TBTT.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_BCN_DROP_ALLOW_P4 1: Allow HW drop beacon.
0: NOT allow HW drop beacon.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_TBTT_PROHIB_EN_P4 1: Enable TBTT prohibit (setup time + hold time)
0: Disable TBTT prohibit and BCN TRX,but TBTT INT still send to FW.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNTX_EN_P4 1: Enable Beacon TX after TBTT.
0: Disable beacon TX and prohibit time.
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_NET_TYPE_P4 Network Type for port 4 (Default: 00b).
00: No link
01: Link in ad hoc network
10: Link in infrastructure network
11 : AP mode
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_FORCETX_EN_P4 1: Enable BCN TX force mode, 0: Disable
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_TXBCN_BTCCA_EN_P4 1: Enable Beacon Tx at TBTT if BT_CCA is enabled
0: Disable
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNERR_CNT_EN_P4 1: Enable BCN error counter
0: Disable BCN error counter and reset counter to 0
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_AGRES_P4 1: BCN PKT aggression TX.
0: BCN PKT normal TX.
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_TSFTR_RST_P4 Write 1 to reset tsft
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_BSSID_FIT_EN_P4 1: HW will handle rx_beacon_pkt and do the following actions
0: HW will ignore rx_beacon_pkt and ignore the following actions
(a). update tsf timer
(b). generate rx bcn report
(c). rx beacon time record
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_TSF_UDT_EN_P4 1: Enable port 4 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
0: Disable port 4 TSF update when RX beacon frames or probe response frames.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_PORT_FUNC_EN_P4 When this bit is set, TSF and other beacon related functions are then enabled.
1. MAC address of port path. (A1 match_enable)
2. Timestamp enable for port.

18614568h R_BE_MBSSID_CTRL_C1
[31:21] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_MBSSID_MODE_SEL 0: co-hosted mode, 1: collapsed mode
[19:16] R/W 0 B_BE_P0MB_NUM Number of MBSSID is utilized. Only odd number can be set. If even number is set, the last MBSSID will NOT be available.
[15] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB15_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 15 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 15 of port 0.
[14] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB14_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 14 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 14 of port 0.
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB13_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 13 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 13 of port 0.
[12] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB12_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 12 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 12 of port 0.
[11] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB11_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 11 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 11 of port 0.
[10] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB10_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 10 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 10 of port 0.
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB9_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 9 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 9 of port 0.
[8] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB8_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 8 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 8 of port 0.
[7] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB7_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 7 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 7 of port 0.
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB6_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 6 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 6 of port 0.
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB5_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 5 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 5 of port 0.
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB4_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 4 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 4 of port 0.
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB3_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 3 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 3 of port 0.
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB2_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 2 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 2 of port 0.
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_P0MB1_EN 1: Enable auto MBSSID for virtual interface 1 of port 0.
0: Disable beacon TX, prohibit time and related INT for virtual interface 1 of port 0.

18614574h R_BE_RXBCN_TIME_CTRL_C1
[31] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[30:28] R/W 0 B_BE_RXBCN_TIME_PORT Port selection for RX beacon time. 0 ~ 4: port 0 ~ 4. Others: RSVD.
[27:18] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[17] W1C 0 B_BE_RXBCN_TIME_VLD 1: RX beacon TSF record is valid. 0: Invalid. Write 1 clear valid bit.
[16] R 0 B_BE_RXBCN_TIME_UDFW 1: Difference value is underflow (before > after).
[15:0] R 0 B_BE_RXBCN_TIME_DIFF Difference of TSF between TSF sync before and after. Unit: us.
18614578h R_BE_RXBCN_TIME_SYNC_C1
[31:0] R 0 B_BE_RXBCN_TIME_SYNC RX beacon TSF record after TSF sync. Unit: us.
1861457Ch R_BE_TBTT_TSF_INFO_C1
[31:0] R 0 B_BE_TBTT_TSF_INFO Latch TSF[31:0] when tbtt_int occurs. Unit: us.

186145B0h R_BE_C0_SCH_DBG_INFO_0_C1
[31:0] $RO 0 B_BE_SCH_EDCA_RST_DBG sch_edca_rst_dbg
186145B4h R_BE_C0_SCH_DBG_INFO_1_C1
[31:0] $RO 0 B_BE_SCH_PREBKF_DBG sch_prebkf_dbg_1
186145B8h R_BE_LPS_RX_PERIOD_CTRL_C1
[31:24] R 0 RSVD
[23:16] RW 0 B_BE_RXBCN_PERIOD Rx Bcn Period:
This field is the period for waiting RX Bcn.
This period starts from TBTT. Unit: 64us
[15:8] RW 0 B_BE_CAT_PERIOD Consider Air Traffic Period
Stop count down RXBCN period if CCA is high during this period.
This period starts from TBTT. Unit: 32us
[7:4] R 0 rsvd
[3] RW 0 B_BE_LPS_RX_CTRL_EN Set this bit to 1 to enable the Rx period ctrl and Bcn count ctrl.
[2:0] RW 0 B_BE_LPS_PORT_SEL Port selection for LPS Rx period end ctrl and LPS_BCN_CNT.
186145BCh R_BE_LPS_BCN_CNT_C1
[31:24] RW 0 B_BE_BCN_TO_ACC_CNT Rx Bcn timeout accumulated counter:
Record the accumulated Bcn timeout counter, this counter WON’T be reset when Rx Bcn.
[23:16] RW 0 B_BE_BCN_OK_ACC_CNT Rx Bcn ok accumulated counter :
Record the accumulated Bcn ok counter.
[15:8] RW 0 B_BE_BCN_TO_CNT_THD Rx Bcn timeout counter threshold
When BCN_TO_CNT > BCN_TO_CNT_THD, issue
BCN_TO_CNT_EVENT to wake WCPU.
[7:0] RW 0 B_BE_BCN_TO_CNT Rx Bcn timeout counter
This counter will increase when (“no Rx Bcn” & “count > RXBCN_PERIOD”). Scheduler reset this value when Rx Bcn
186145CCh R_BE_PSTIMER0_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER0_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_BE_PSTIMER0_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_0 interrupt is issued
186145D0h R_BE_PSTIMER1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER1_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_BE_PSTIMER1_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_1 interrupt is issued
186145D4h R_BE_PSTIMER2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER2_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_BE_PSTIMER2_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_2 interrupt is issued
186145D8h R_BE_PSTIMER3_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER3_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_BE_PSTIMER3_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_3 interrupt is issued
186145DCh R_BE_PSTIMER4_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER4_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_4 interrupt is issued
186145E0h R_BE_PSTIMER5_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER5_VAL This register is set by driver/fw. When the lower 4 bytes of TSF(that select by B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL) matches the trigger event of this register, the PSTIMER_5 interrupt is issued
186145E4h R_BE_PSTIMER_CTRL_C1
[31:28] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[27] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER6_EN PSTIMER6 Enable
[26:24] R/W 5 B_BE_PSTIMER6_SEL PSTIMER6 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER5_EN PSTIMER5 Enable
[22:20] R/W 5 B_BE_PSTIMER5_SEL PSTIMER5 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER4_EN PSTIMER4 Enable
[18:16] R/W 5 B_BE_PSTIMER4_SEL PSTIMER4 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER3_EN PSTIMER3 Enable
[14:12] R/W 5 B_BE_PSTIMER3_SEL PSTIMER3 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER2_EN PSTIMER2 Enable
[10:8] R/W 5 B_BE_PSTIMER2_SEL PSTIMER2 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER1_EN PSTIMER1 Enable
[6:4] R/W 5 B_BE_PSTIMER1_SEL PSTIMER1 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_PSTIMER0_EN PSTIMER0 Enable
[2:0] R/W 5 B_BE_PSTIMER0_SEL PSTIMER0 Source Select
0 for port 0, 1 for port1, 2 for port2, 3 for port3, 4 for port4, else for freerun counter
186145E8h R_BE_timer_compare_C1
[31] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[30:28] RW 0 B_BE_PSTIMER_TRIGGER_TIME Pstimer trigger interrupt time setting
[27:8] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_x_comp_y_tsft_p trigger X Y compare function
[6:4] R/W 0 B_BE_y_comp_sel select Y factor
[3] RO 0 B_BE_x_comp_y_over "1": X < Y. "0": X >= Y
[2:0] R/W 0 B_BE_x_comp_sel select X factor
186145ECh R_BE_timer_compare_value_low_C1
[31:0] RO 0 B_BE_x_comp_y_val_low x compare y value bit 31:0
186145F0h R_BE_timer_compare_value_high_C1
[31:0] RO 0 B_BE_x_comp_y_val_high x compare y value bit 63:32
18614800h R_BE_PTCL_COMMON_SETTING_0_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:14] R/W 0x1 B_BE_PCIE_MODE 2’b01 : GEN1 / 2’b10 : GEN2 / Others : RSVD
[13:9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] R/W 0x0 B_BE_CPUMGQ_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for MGQ2
[7] R/W 0x0 B_BE_MGQ_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for MGQ0, MGQ1
[6] R/W 0x0 B_BE_LIFETIME_EN Lifetime function enable bit for ACQ, TWTQ, ULQ
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_PTCL_CLK_GATING
[4] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_UL 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to UL
[3] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_1 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to WMM1
[2] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PTCL_TRIGGER_SS_EN_0 1: enable PTCL triggering f2p_cmd_done (to STA scheduler), if F2P_CMD.NEXT_QSEL belong to WMM0
[1] R/W 0x1 B_BE_CMAC_TX_MODE_1 PTCL Tx mode for WMM 1
1: HW mode
0: SW mode
[0] R/W 0x1 B_BE_CMAC_TX_MODE_0 PTCL Tx mode for WMM 0
1: HW mode
0: SW mode
18614804h R_BE_AGG_BK_0_C1
[31:21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20] RW 1'h0 B_BE_DIS_SIFS_BK_AGG_AMPDU
[19] RW 1'h0 B_BE_EN_MU2SU_CHK_PROTECT_PPDU
[18] RW 1'h1 B_BE_RPT_TXOP_START_PROTECT
[17] RW 1'h0 B_BE_RANDOM_GEN_CMD_ABORT_EN
[16] RW 1'h1 B_BE_PHYTXON_ENDPS_RESP_CHK
[15] RW 1'h1 B_BE_CTN_CHK_SEQ_REQ_EN
[14] RW 1'h0 B_BE_PTCL_RLS_ALLFAIL_EN
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_MAX_AGG_NUM_FIX_MODE_EN 1: PTCL will only use 0xC610[7:0](B_BE_MAX_AGG_NUM) to break AMPDU
0: Disable this fix mode, PTCL uses the original AGG MAX NUM rules
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_MURU_SEC_Q_EMPTY_CHK 1: Disable check "Whether SEC USERs's ac queue is empty or not, let MURU DATA PPDU TX"
0: Enable check "If SEC USERs's ac queue is empty, Abort MURU DATA PPDU TX"
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_EN_SAMPDU_TXIME_TWT_CHECK 1: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > TWT SP". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
0: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > TWT SP"
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_SAMPDU_TXIME_P2P_CHECK 1: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > P2P off time".
0: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > P2P off time". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_SAMPDU_TXIME_BCN_CHECK 1: Disable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME".
0: Enable check "PPDU which txpktnum = 1's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME". If Yes, stop tx this f2ptxcmd.
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_UL_SEQ_ABORT_CHECK 1: Disable check "UL SEQ's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME/TWT SP/P2P off time".
0: Enable check "UL SEQ's TX time > BCN SETUP TIME/TWT SP/P2P off time". If Yes, abort this f2ptxcmd.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_SND_STS_CHECK 1: PTCL will bypass "checking sounding status" step of MU2SU condtion
0: PTCL will check the sounding status of MU2SU condtion
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_NAV_PAUS_PHB_EN 1: Enable TXCMD paused if NAV cross setup time or during prohibit time.
0: Disable pause condition, Trigger sequence may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_TXOP_SHT_PHB_EN 1: Enable (protect all) TXOP shorten at setup time, and pause during prohibit time.
0: Disable break condition, (protect all) TXOP may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_AGG_BRK_PHB_EN 1: Enable AMPDU AGG break at setup time, (protect next) TXOP will be over at the same time. TX is paused during prohibit time.
0: Disable break condition, AMPDU / (protect next) TXOP may cross into prohibit time.
* Not available in 8852A
[3] R/W 0x0 B_BE_DIS_SSN_CHK Disable check the SSN rule when generating AMPDU TX cmd.
[2] R/W 0x0 B_BE_WDBK_CFG 0: WD.BK mode 0
1: WD.BK mode 1

mode 0:
WD.BK = 0: Aggregation proceed with this MPDU
WD.BK = 1: This MPDU is not aggregated with previous aggregation, but it can be aggregated in a new ARSVDMPDU (depending on the setting of AGG_EN)
mode 1:
only MPDUs with the same WD.BK value can be aggregated. 0 can be aggregated with 0, 1 can be aggregated with 1.
[1] R/W 0x1 B_BE_EN_RTY_BK 0: Follow CR.B_BE_EN_RTY_BK_COD
1: Retried MPDU can not be aggregated with new MPDU
[0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_EN_RTY_BK_COD 0: Retried MPDU can be aggregated with new MPDU
1:
If rate of the first retried MPDU is the same as initial rate, retried MPDU can be aggregated with new MPDU
If rate of the first retried MPDU is different with initial rate, retried MPDU can not be aggregated with new MPDU
18614808h R_BE_TX_CTRL_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x40 B_BE_DROP_CHK_MAX_NUM maximum number of packet can be check in a MACID drop or lifetime drop event
[23:20] R/W 0x6 B_BE_DROP_CHK_TIMEOUT timeout for MACID drop or lifetime drop event
[19:16] R/W 0x6 B_BE_FWD_SRCH_TIMEOUT forward search timeout (note: ≦ slot time)
unit: 1 us
[15:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PTCL_STOP_WMM 1: stop WMM Tx path (WMM0/1/2/3), TWT Tx path and UL Tx path
包含主動 Tx (含 spatial reuse), HE TB PPDU Tx
[6:5] R/W 0 RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TXOP_DELAY_TX define W: the maximum Tx delay in TXOP
Tx deadline(PLCP start) = SIFS(16us) + W after CCA falling edge
Unit: 1 us
1861480Ch R_BE_TB_PPDU_CTRL_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TB_PPDU_BK_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[14] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TB_PPDU_BE_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[13] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TB_PPDU_VI_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[12] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TB_PPDU_VO_DIS 1: TB PPDU do not Tx this AC
[11:3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TB_BYPASS_TXPWR Note: TXPWR module已有option, 當無法滿足TXPWR時會給PWR上限 or 給不Tx flag, PTCL 此bit 8852A已做了, 但下一顆IC要移除
[1:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_SW_PREFER_AC HE TB PPDU 將指定 AC priority 提至最高, 其餘依 VO > VI > BE > BK 排序
0: BE (default 排序)
1: BK
2: VI
3: VO
18614810h R_BE_AMPDU_AGG_LIMIT_C1
[31:24] R/W 0xA5 B_BE_AMPDU_MAX_TIME unit: 32us
[23:16] R/W 0x3F B_BE_RA_TRY_RATE_AGG_LMT The aggregation packet number limit (= B_BE_RA_TRY_RATE_AGG_LMT + 1) for try up rate of rate adaptive when descriptor Try bit is set.
[15:8] R/W 0x3F B_BE_RTS_MAX_AGG_NUM In RTS frame exchange sequence, the maximum aggregation packet number limit = B_BE_RTS_MAX_AGG_NUM + 1
[7:0] R/W 0x3F B_BE_MAX_AGG_NUM the maximum aggregation packet number limit = B_BE_MAX_AGG_NUM + 1
18614814h R_BE_AGG_LEN_HT_0_C1
[31:16] R/W 0xFFFF B_BE_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_HT HT PPDU 限制, need to support 65,535 octets
Unit: Byte
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_RTS_TXTIME_TH RTS packet txtime threshold (unit: 32us)
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_RTS LEN_TH RTS packet Length threshold (unit: 16byte).
18614818h R_BE_AGG_LEN_VHT_0_C1
[31:20] R/W 12'h91A B_BE_OFDM_LEN_TH when rate is OFDM rate and length thrushold default is 2330 bytes(mac header + payload)
[19:0] R/W 0xFFFFF B_BE_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_VHT VHT PPDU 限制, need to support 1,048,575 octets
Unit: Byte
1861481Ch R_BE_AGG_LEN_HE_0_C1
[31:23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22:0] R/W 0x633117 B_BE_AMPDU_MAX_LEN_HE HE PPDU 限制, need to support 6,500,631 octets
Unit: Byte
18614820h R_BE_SPECIAL_TX_SETTING_C1
[31] R/W 0x1 B_BE_TRI_PADDING_EXTEND
[30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29] RW 1'h0 B_BE_USE_DATA_BW
[28:27] R/W 0x0 B_BE_BW_SIGTA
[26] R/W 0x1 B_BE_BMC_NAV_PROTECT
[25:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:20] RW 4'h4 B_BE_BAR_TXRATE_FOR_NULL_WD
[19:18] R/W 0x0 B_BE_STBC_CFEND
[17:9] R/W 0xC B_BE_STBC_CFEND_RATE
[8:0] R/W 0x4 B_BE_Basic_CFEND_RATE
18614824h R_BE_SIFS_SETTING_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x10 B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH When B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_EN = 1 & B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH > 0 & TXPKTNUM = 1,
If first WD.txpktsize > B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH (UNIT : 256B) & SEC_TYPE != WEP/TKIP/WAPI,
PTCL will TX CTS2SELF before that pkt in order to extend the time of DMA fetching payload
[23:18] R/W 0 B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH_TWW When B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_EN = 1 & B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH_TWW > 0 & TXPKTNUM = 1,
If first WD.txpktsize > B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_PKT_LEN_TH (UNIT : 256B) & SEC_TYPE == WEP/TKIP/WAP,
PTCL will TX CTS2SELF before that pkt in order to extend the time of DMA fetching payload
[17] R/W 0 RSVD
[16] R/W 0x0 B_BE_HW_CTS2SELF_EN HW CTS2SELF ENABLE
[15:8] R/W 0x10 B_BE_SPEC_SIFS_OFDM_PTCL
[7:0] R/W 0x10 B_BE_SPEC_SIFS_CCK_PTCL
18614828h R_BE_TXRATE_CHK_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x0 B_BE_LATENCY_PADDING_PKT_TH SEC USERs組的筆數小於等於CR.LATENCY_PADDING_PKT_TH+1就要補對應的LATENCY_PADDING
[23:16] R/W 0x10 B_BE_PLCP_FETCH_BUFF BB來要payload前MAC可以先搬的時間, 實際約略為22~23 us, CR預設值先預設為16us
[15:7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6] RW 1'h0 B_BE_OFDM_CCK_ERR_PROC
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_PKT_LAST_TX OFDM rate & >2304B / 1st AMSDU pkt time >5.484ms / Tx NSS > 0xC628[3:2] 上述error case 發生就會把last_tx舉1
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_BAND_MODE Operation band check condition
0: 5GHz; 1:2.4GHz
[3:2] R/W 1 B_BE_MAX_TXNSS Tx Nss check condition
0: 1SS; 1: 2SS, 2: 3SS, 3: 4SS
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_Rts_limit_in_ofdm6 If this bit is set, HW check Tx pkt’s data rate. If Rts rate is CCK rate, RTS is fixed to OFDM6.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_CHECK_CCK_EN If this bit is set, HW check Tx pkt’s data rate. When data rate is CCK rate, modify the rate to OFDM6
1861482Ch R_BE_TXCNT_C1

[29:24] R/W 0x20 B_BE_S_TXCNT_LMT Short tx cnt limit
[23:22] R/W 0 rsvd
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_BE_L_TXCNT_LMT Long tx cnt limit
[15:0] R/W 0 RSVD

1861483Ch R_BE_MBSSID_DROP_0_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0 B_BE_gi_ltf_fb_sel 0: no GI_LTF fallback
1: GI_LTF fallback option 1 enabled (downgrade GI_LTF first from init. rate)
Others RSVD
[29:24] R/W 0 B_BE_rate_sel New ARFR (REG 0x40) rate group selection:
0: CCK1M – OFDM18M
1: OFDM24MRSVDOFDM54 , other no use
2: HT MCS0~MCS7
3: HT MCS8~MCS15
4: HT MCS16~MC23
5: HT MCS24~MCS31
6:VHT1SS/ MCS0~MCS7
7:VHT1SS/ MCS8~MCS9,other no use
…
…
…
20:VHT 8SS/ MCS0~MCS7
21:VHT 8SS/MCS8~MCS9,other no use
22:HE 1SS /MCS0~MCS7
23:HE 1SS /MCS8~MCS11 ,other no use
…
…
…
36:HE 1SS /MCS0~MCS7
37:HE 1SS /MCS8~MCS11 ,other no use

Others: rsvd

[20:16] R/W 0x0 B_BE_PORT_DROP_4_0 1: PORT4~PORT0 Drop (per bit controlled)
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_MBSSID_DROP_15_0 1: BSSID15~BSSID0 Drop (per bit controlled)

18614854h R_BE_PTCL_ATM_C1
[31] R/W 0x1 B_BE_CHNL_REF_RX_BASIC_NAV Busy time reference RX basic NAV (Rx)
[30] R/W 0x1 B_BE_CHNL_REF_RX_INTRA_NAV Busy time reference RX intra NAV (Rx)
[29] R/W 0x0 B_BE_CHNL_REF_DATA_ON Busy time reference data_on (Rx)
[28] R/W 0x0 B_BE_CHNL_REF_EDCCA_P20 Busy time reference EDCCA (Rx)
[27] R/W 0x0 B_BE_CHNL_REF_CCA_P20 Busy time reference primary 20 CCA (Rx)
[26] R/W 0x0 B_BE_CHNL_REF_CCA_S20 Busy time reference secondary 20 CCA (Rx)
[25] R/W 0x0 B_BE_CHNL_REF_CCA_S40 Busy time reference secondary 40 CCA (Rx)
[24] R/W 0x0 B_BE_CHNL_REF_CCA_S80 Busy time reference secondary 80 CCA (Rx)
[23] R/W 0 B_BE_CHNL_REF_PHY_TXON Busy time reference phy_txon (Tx)
[22:20] R/W 0 RSVD
[19] RW 0x0 B_BE_RST_CHNL_BUSY Write “one” to set the counter to zero. (channel busy time) (由於屬性是 RW, 需要再寫成 0)
[18] RW 0x0 B_BE_RST_CHNL_IDLE Write “one” to set the counter to zero. (channel idle time) (由於屬性是 RW, 需要再寫成 0)
[17] R/W 0x1 B_BE_CHNL_INFO_EN 0: stop counter (no clear counter)
1: start count (no clear counter)
[16] R/W 0x1 B_BE_ATM_AIRTIME_EN 0 : If this bit disable, no need to count air time
1 : If this bit enable, count air time and paste to TXRPT
[15:14] R/W 0 RSVD
[13] R/W 0x1 B_BE_ATM_PRI
[12] R/W 0x1 B_BE_ATM_TF_UD After Trigger frame sequence Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update UL quota
[11:10] R/W 0x0 B_BE_ATM_SR_UD_1 After WMM1 spatial reuse Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[9:8] R/W 0x0 B_BE_ATM_SR_UD_0 After WMM0 spatial reuse Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[7:6] R/W 0x0 B_BE_ATM_TB_UD_1 After WMM1 HE TB PPDU Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[5:4] R/W 0x0 B_BE_ATM_TB_UD_0 After WMM0 HE TB PPDU Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[3:2] R/W 0x1 B_BE_ATM_TX_UD_1 After WMM1 normal Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota
[1:0] R/W 0x1 B_BE_ATM_TX_UD_0 After WMM0 normal Tx, update SS_SRAM.quota
0: do not update
1: update DL quota
2: update UL quota
3: update both DL quota and UL quota

18614860h R_BE_PTCLRPT_FULL_HDL_C1
[31:22] R/W 0 RSVD
[21:16] RW 6'h20 B_BE_CMAC_DMA_BLOCK_TX_THD
[15:12] R/W 0xA B_BE_RPT_LATCH_PHY_TIME set latch r2t_collision, t2r_collision time after falling edge of normal txon. (unit: us)
[11] R/W 0x1 B_BE_CMAC_DMA_PRE_FULL_DROP r_CMAC_DMA_PRE_FULL_DROP
[10] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TXOP_END_RPT_EN 1 : Generate extra TXRPT(TXOP_END bit = 1)
0 : Do not generate extra TXRPT for TXOP_END
[9] R/W 0x0 B_BE_F2PCMD_FWWD_RLS_MODE 0: basic trigger/BSRP/Sounding to macid_drop queue, he sig-b/MU-RTS/MU-BAR to no report queue (default)
1: all FW PKT ID to no report queue
[8] R/W 0x1 B_BE_F2PCMD_RPT_EN 1 : Generate F2PCMDRPT
0 : Do not generate F2PCMDRPT
[7:6] R/W 0x0 B_BE_BCN_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0x0 B_BE_SPE_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[3:2] R/W 0x1 B_BE_TX_RPT_PATH 0 : To Driver
1 : To WLCPU
2 : To Data CPU (RSVD)
3 : RSVD
[1] R/W 0x0 B_BE_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP 1: CMAC_DMA issues full_signal to PTCL (then PTCL drops this F2PCMD report)
0: PTCL wait for quota becoming available (then PTCL blocks the next txcmd)
[0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_NON_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP 1: CMAC_DMA issues full_signal to PTCL (then PTCL drops this nonRSVDF2PCMD report)
0: PTCL wait for quota becoming available (then PTCL blocks the next txcmd)

[26] RW 1'h1 B_BE_CMAC_DMA_BLOCK_TX
[25] RW 1'h0 B_BE_CMAC_DMA_BREAK_TXOP
[24:16] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TXOP_BK_EN_V1 Enable PKT NUM and TX TIME limitation compare. 6bits mapping to TWT_3, TWT_2, TWT_1, TWT_0, ULQ,VO, VI, BK, BE from MSB to LSB
[15:8] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TXOP_BK_PKT_NUM When aggregation number < BIT_TXOP_LMT_PKT_NUM break TXOP
[7:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TXOP_BK_TX_TIME UNIT : 32us
When TX time < BIT_TXOP_LMT_TX_TIME break TXOP
18614874h R_BE_PTCL_NAV_PROT_LEN_C1
[31:16] R/W 0x40 B_BE_SPEC_MBA_HE_PTCL The spec MRSVDBA value for NAV(duration) calculation
(Protocol circuit calcuate data packet NAV of TxPktBuf)
[15:0] R/W 0x40 B_BE_NAV_PROT_LEN In TXOP mode ,NAV setting which protects next packets, Unit: 1 us
18614878h R_BE_PROT_C1
[31:24] R/W 0x0 B_BE_TXQ_NAV_MSK
[23:19] R/W 0 RSVD
[18] R/W 0x1 B_BE_LSIG_TXOP_TXCMD_NAV
[17] R/W 0x0 B_BE_RTS_NAV_TXOP
[16] R/W 0x0 B_BE_NAV_OVER_TXOP_EN Enable B_BE_NAV_PROT_LEN exceeds the end of TXOP
[15:0] R/W 0x0 B_BE_NAV_PROT_LEN_CTN_MODE In CTN mode ,NAV setting which protects next packets, Unit: 1 us
1861487Ch R_BE_BT_PLT_C1
31:16 RO 0 B_BE_BT_PLT_PKT_CNT
15:10 R/W 0 RSVD
9 W1C 0 B_BE_BT_PLT_RST reset B_BE_BT_PLT_PKT_CNT
8 R/W 0 B_BE_PLT_EN Enable polluted mechanism
7 R/W 0 B_BE_RX_PLT_GNT_LTE_RX 等Response過程中發現 LTE_RX = 1則為BT polluted
6 R/W 0 B_BE_RX_PLT_GNT_BT_RX 等Response過程中發現 GNT_BT_RX = 1則為BT polluted
5 R/W 0 B_BE_RX_PLT_GNT_BT_TX 等Response過程中發現 GNT_BT_TX = 1則為BT polluted
4 R/W 0 B_BE_RX_PLT_GNT_WL 等Response過程中發現 GNT_WL = 0則為BT polluted
3 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_PLT_GNT_LTE_RX TX 過程中發現 LTE_RX = 1則為BT polluted
2 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_PLT_GNT_BT_RX TX 過程中發現 GNT_BT_RX = 1則為BT polluted
1 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_PLT_GNT_BT_TX TX 過程中發現 GNT_BT_TX = 1則為BT polluted
0 R/W 0 B_BE_TX_PLT_GNT_WL TX 過程中發現 GNT_WL = 0則為BT polluted

[31:16] R/W 0 B_BE_TWTQ_ULTRHD TWTQ uplink drop condition threshold. Unit: 32 us.
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_TWTQ_TXOPTRHD TWTQ TXOP break condition threshold. Unit: 32 us. (not available)

[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_TWTQ_AGGTRHD TWTQ AMPDU AGG break condition threshold. Unit: 32 us.

18614890h R_BE_BCNQ_CTRL_C1
[31] $RO 0 B_BE_BCNQ_LOCK_STUS After B_BE_BCNQ_LOCK_B0 is set, this status shows the operation permission is obtained or not.
1: BCNQ operation permission is obtained by FW.
0: HW still has BCNQ operation permission.
[30:14] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[13:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_DROP_DSTQUEID Destination port for PTCL drop beacon
[7] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[6:4] R/W 7 B_BE_BCN_DROP_PRTQUEID Destination queue for PTCL drop beacon
[3:2] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_BCNQ_PKTIN_EN
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCNQ_LOCK Set 1 to request to lock band 0 BCNQ operation permission for FW. After FW operation done, this bit shall set to 0.

186148C8h R_BE_PTCL_IMR1_C1
[31] RO 1'h0 RSVD
[30] RW 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMD_PKTID_IMR PTCL GET到一筆 0xfff 的 f2ptxcmd pktid
[29] RW 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMD_RD_PKTID_IMR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 MURTS/SIGB WD pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[28] RW 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMD_ASSIGN_PKTID_IMR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 某一筆 FW WD pktid為 0xfff 無效位置
[27] RW 1'h1 B_BE_F2PCMD_USER_ALLC_IMR f2ptxcmd MU/RU時 各user的TX AGG NUM配置相加超過 128 限制
[26] RW 1'h0 B_BE_RX_SPF_U0_PKTID_IMR 分析 user_0 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[25] RW 1'h0 B_BE_TX_SPF_U1_PKTID_IMR 分析 user_1 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[24] RW 1'h0 B_BE_TX_SPF_U2_PKTID_IMR 分析 user_2 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[23] RW 1'h0 B_BE_TX_SPF_U3_PKTID_IMR 分析 user_3 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[22] RW 1'h0 B_BE_TX_RECORD_PKTID_IMR 要累加TXCNT時從TMAC端時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[21:15] RO 1'h0 RSVD
[14] RW 1'h0 B_BE_TWTSP_QSEL_IMR F2pcmd for twtsp_start, twtsp_end, but qsel not twtq
[13] RW 1'h0 B_BE_F2P_RLS_CTN_SEL_IMR
[12] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BCNQ_ORDER_IMR BCNQ forward search and fine order bit error value. EX: order = 0 and 2, and not decide which PKTID first push in BCNQ.
[11] RW 1'h0 B_BE_Q_PKTID_IMR Ptcl q operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[10] RW 1'h0 B_BE_D_PKTID_IMR Ptcl d operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[9] RW 1'h0 B_BE_TXPRT_FULL_DROP_IMR Ptcl drop txrpt because cmac_dma full
[8] RW 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP_IMR Ptcl drop f2pcmdrpt because cmac_dma full
[7:0] RO 8'h0 RSVD RSVD
186148CCh R_BE_PTCL_ISR1_C1
[31] RO 1'h0 RSVD
[30] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMD_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到一筆 0xfff 的 f2ptxcmd pktid
[29] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMD_RD_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 MURTS/SIGB WD pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[28] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMD_ASSIGN_PKTID_ERR PTCL GET到 f2ptxcmd 中 某一筆 FW WD pktid為 0xfff 無效位置
[27] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMD_USER_ALLC_ERR f2ptxcmd MU/RU時 各user的TX AGG NUM配置相加超過 128 限制
[26] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_RX_SPF_U0_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_0 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[25] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_TX_SPF_U1_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_1 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[24] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_TX_SPF_U2_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_2 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[23] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_TX_SPF_U3_PKTID_ERR 分析 user_3 的第一筆WD時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[22] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_TX_RECORD_PKTID_ERR 要累加TXCNT時從TMAC端時 GET 到 pktid 為 0xfff 無效位置
[21:15] RO 7'h0 RSVD
[14] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_TWTSP_QSEL_ERR F2pcmd for twtsp_start, twtsp_end, but qsel not twtq
[13] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_F2P_RLS_CTN_SEL_ERR
[12] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BCNQ_ORDER_ERR BCNQ forward search and fine order bit error value. EX: order = 0 and 2, and not decide which PKTID first push in BCNQ.
[11] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_Q_PKTID_ERR Ptcl q operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[10] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_D_PKTID_ERR Ptcl d operation display pktid == 0xFFF(null page)
[9] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_TXPRT_FULL_DROP_ERR Ptcl drop txrpt because cmac_dma full
[8] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_F2PCMDRPT_FULL_DROP_ERR Ptcl drop f2pcmdrpt because cmac_dma full
