186148E0h R_BE_PTCL_RST_CTRL_C1
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] $RO 0 B_BE_PTCL_TX_FINISH_REQ_STATUS "1" : ptcl tx finish job is still processing, enabled by write 1 to 0x00E0[0]. "0" : ptcl tx finish job is done or idle.
[23:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9:8] RW 1 B_BE_FSM1_TIMEOUT_THB_BE_UNIT FSM1 timeout unit:
0/1/2/3 : 32/64/128/256 ms
[7:5] RW 0 RSVD
[4] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_ABORT_CNT_RST
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_DUMMY
[2] RW 0 B_BE_TX_ABORT_ALWAYS_END_CMD "1" : Roll back to 52A. Always send end_cmd if tx_abort occurs.
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_PTCL_WDE_EN "1" : enable PTCL to DMAC interface. "0" : disable PTCL to DMAC interface. EX: DLE q/d operation and txpktctl cmd.
[0] W1C 0 B_BE_PTCL_TX_FINISH_REQ Write 1 to enabe tx finish procedure manully.
186148E8h R_BE_PTCL_FSM_MON_C1
[31] R/W 0 RSVD
[30] R/W 0x1 B_BE_PTCL_FSM2_TO_MODE
[29:24] R/W 0x20 B_BE_PTCL_FSM2_TO_THR
[23] R/W 0 RSVD
[22] R/W 0x1 B_BE_PTCL_FSM1_TO_MODE
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_BE_PTCL_FSM1_TO_THR
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14] R/W 0x1 B_BE_PTCL_FSM0_TO_MODE
[13:8] R/W 0x20 B_BE_PTCL_FSM0_TO_THR
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0x1 B_BE_PTCL_TX_ARB_TO_MODE
[5:0] R/W 0x20 B_BE_PTCL_TX_ARB_TO_THR
186148ECh R_BE_PTCL_TX_CTN_SEL_C1
[31:17] RO 0 RSVD
[16:9] RO 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] RO 0 B_BE_PTCL_TXOP_STAT 當成功收到 response frame 時, 會設1
EX:
RTS++CTS後TXOP flag = 1
Data++ACK後TXOP flag = 1
CTS2SELF後TXOP flag = 1 (不需response的frame, 則是Tx 成功後設1)
當timer數完, 或queue empty會清0
[7] RO 0 B_BE_PTCL_BUSY ro_PTCL_BUSY =1 代表PTCL FSM is busy 或正在TXOP/TX TBPPDU 期間
[6] RO 0 RSVD
[5] RO 0 B_BE_PTCL_DROP PTCL drop pkt flag, 1: doing drop
[4:0] RO 0 B_BE_PTCL_tx_QUEUE_IDX queue idx // 定義如下, 0 ~ 15 對應 scheduler 的 backoff engine. 16 是 TB PPDU.
“0" : WMM 0 BE
“1" : WMM 0 BK
“2" : WMM 0 VI
“3" : WMM 0 VO
“4" : WMM 1 BE
“5" : WMM 1 BK
“6" : WMM 1 VI
“7" : WMM 1 VO
“8" : Normal MGQ
“9" : No power save MGQ
"10": Fast EDCA MGQ
"11": HIQ
"12": BCNQ
"13": ULQ
"14": TWTQ0
"15": TWTQ1
"16": TWTQ2
"17": TWTQ3
"18": TB PPDU
Other : RSVD

18614900h R_BE_TXCMD_DBG_SEL_C1
[31:28] R/W 0 B_BE_DBG_SEL_TX_MACIDS 0x0 :
B_BE_TX_MACID_0 = U0 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_1 = U1 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_2 = U2 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_3 = U3 macid
0x1 :
B_BE_TX_MACID_0 = U4 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_1 = U5 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_2 = U6 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_3 = U7 macid
0x2 :
B_BE_TX_MACID_0 = U8 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_1 = U9 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_2 = U10 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_3 = U11 macid
0x3 :
B_BE_TX_MACID_0 = U12 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_1 = U13 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_2 = U14 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_3 = U15 macid
else :
B_BE_TX_MACID_0 = U0 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_1 = U1 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_2 = U2 macid
B_BE_TX_MACID_3 = U3 macid

[7:4] RW 4'h0 B_BE_PKTCNT_PPDUVAR_READ_IDX LCCK:
0: Long
SCCK:
0: Short
Legacy:
0: Normal
HT_MF:
0: Normal
1: Sounding NDP
HT_GF:
0: Normal
VHT_SU:
0: Normal
1: Sounding NDP
VHT_MU:
0: DL MUMIMO
HE_SU:
0: Normal
1: Sounding NDP
2: Sounding NDP with Puncture
3: HE Ranging NDP
HE_ER_SU:
0: All
HE_MU:
0: OFDMA or OFDMA with MUMIMO
1: DL fullband MUMIMO
2: OFDMA or OFDMA with MUMIMO and with Puncture
HE_TB:
0: Normal
1: NDP for feedback status
2: HETB Ranging NDP
EHT_MU:
0: non-OFDMA with Single User
1: ER
2: OFDMA or OFDMA with MUMIMO
3: DL fullband MUMIMO
4: Sounding NDP
5: non-OFDMA with Single User and Puncture
6: OFDMA or OFDMA with MUMIMO and with Puncture
7: Sounding NDP with Puncture
8: DL fullband MUMIMO with Puncture
EHT_TB:
0: Normal
[3:0] RW 4'h0 B_BE_PKTCNT_PPDUTYPE_READ_IDX 0:LCCK, 1:SCCK, 2:OFDM, 3:HT,
4:HTGF, 5:VHT_SU, 6:VHT_MU, 7:HE_SU,
8:HE_ERSU, 9:HE_MU, 10:HE_TB 11:EHT_MU,
12:EHT_TB

[31:24] RW 8'hf B_BE_BFMER_EHT_CSI_OFFSET service(8) + categoty(1) + action(1) + mimo ctrl field(5)
[23:16] RW 8'hf B_BE_BFMER_HE_CSI_OFFSET service(8) + categoty(1) + action(1) + mimo ctrl field(5)
[15:8] RW 8'hd B_BE_BFMER_VHT_CSI_OFFSET service(8) + categoty(1) + action(1) + mimo ctrl field(3)

18615180h R_BE_BFMEE_RESP_OPTION_C1
[31:24] RW 8'h0 RSVD
[23:20] RW 4'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_SEC_TYPE CSI security type
[19:18] RW 2'h0 RSVD
[17:16] RW 2'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_BFRPT_SEG_SIZE
[15:9] RW 7'h0 RSVD
[8] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_MIMO_EN_SEL 1 : phase shift 4T
0 : phase shift 0 T
[7] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_MU_BFEE_DIS If set to 1, HW will be SU only beamformee and not response to NDPA or Beamforming report poll.
[6] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_CHECK_RPTPOLL_MACID_DIS 1: For any A1-matched BF Rpt Poll, send back VHT-CB
0: If A1-matched BF Rpt Poll's A2 fails to match the previous receiving NDPA's A2, do not send VHT-CB
[5] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_NOCHK_BFPOLL_BMP Set this bit to ignore retransmission bitmap of rx beamforming report poll
[4] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_VHTBFRPT_CHK
[3] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_EHT_NDPA_EN Set to 1, MAC would inform BB of preparing to receive NDP if the received NDPA is valid.
[2] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_HE_NDPA_EN Set to 1, MAC would inform BB of preparing to receive NDP if the received NDPA is valid.
[1] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_VHT_NDPA_EN Set to 1, MAC would inform BB of preparing to receive NDP if the received NDPA is valid.
[0] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_HT_NDPA_EN Set to 1, MAC would inform BB of preparing to receive NDP if the received NDP Announcement MPDU is valid.

[18] RW 1'h0 RSVD
[17] RW 1'h0 B_BE_RESP_FIFO_IORST
[16] $RW 1'h0 B_BE_RESP_FIFO_ADDR_CLR clear read / write pointer
[15:8] RO 8'h0 B_BE_RESP_FIFO_RADDR response FIFO read pointer
[7:0] RO 8'h0 B_BE_RESP_FIFO_WADDR response FIFO write pointer
186151A4h R_BE_WMAC_BFMEE_DMA_OPTION_1_C1
[31] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_CHKSUM_ERROR After received NDPA , expecteed to receive NDP , but NDP timeout
[30] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_BBLEN_LT_MAC Too late to transfer data between CSI_DATA_TIMEOUT, then ro_csirpt_csi_data_timeout=1.
[29] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_BBLEN_GT_MAC // rsvd
[28] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_BBLEN_ZERO 1.After received NDP, expecteed to receive CSI_data_on, but CSI_data_on does not pull up.
2.After T3 ready to receive data, CSI_header does not received.
[27] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_CSI_DATAON_TIMEOUT BB report CSI report length is zero
[26] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_CSI_HEADER_TIMEOUT Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number overflow
[25] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_CSI_DATA_TIMEOUT Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number underflow
[24] W1C 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_RPT_NDP_TIMEOUT Indicate MAC Rx csi rpt checksum error
[23:22] RW 2'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_RPT_SEL Indicate NC NR etc source
[21] RW 1'h1 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_FCS_TIMEOUT destory fcs when [27:24] != 0
[20] RW 1'h1 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_FCS_LEN_ERR destory fcs when bb length is zero ([28] == 1)
[19] RW 1'h1 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_FCS_LEN_MIS destory fcs when bb length mismatch rdrdy number ([30:29] != 0)
[18] RW 1'h1 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_FCS_CHKSUM destory fcs when CSI checksum Fail ([31] == 1)
[17] RW 1'h1 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_EMPTY_APPZERO Append zero if csi data from BB is sharter than mac expectation
[16] RW 1'h0 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_GCKDIS disable gated clock control
[15:8] RW 8'h20 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_FIFO_RESUME_THR mac resume csi data when fifo data last than threshold
[7:0] RW 8'h60 B_BE_BFMEE_CSI_FIFO_PAUSE_THR csi report mac pause bb almost full threshold

18615400h R_BE_RCR_C1
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_busy_chksn check SN FIFO before RX close
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_dyn_chen dynamic parser channel enable
[13] R/W 1 B_BE_auto_rst RX auto reset when idle
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_timer_sel RX timer source select
0 : from wmac 1/8 us pluse , 1 : from 32K 1 us pluse
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_STOP_RX_IN Stop RX input
[10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9:8] RW 0 B_BE_DRV_INFO_SZ driver info size (unit : 8 bytes)
[7:6] RW 0 B_BE_HDR_CNV_SZ header conv info size (unit : 16 bytes)
[5:4] RW 0 B_BE_PHY_RPT_SZ phy report size (unit : 8 bytes)
[3:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_EN Rx channel enable for specific 16 users.
16 RUs setting @ B_BE_EXT_CH
18615402h R_BE_DLK_PROTECT_CTL_C1
[15:8] R/W 0x80 B_BE_RX_DLK_CCA_TIME rx dead lock protect time (us) , start from cca falling
[7:4] R/W 0xf B_BE_RX_DLK_DATA_TIME rx dead lock protect time (us) , start from data_on falling
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_rx_dlk_rst_fsm rx dead lock protect reset when rx error status [7:6] != 0
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_rx_dlk_rst_skipdma rx dead lock protect reset will skip rx_end_rst , jump to dis_gclk
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_DLK_RST_EN rx dead lock protect reset enable
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_RX_DLK_INT_EN rx dead lock protect interrupt enable
18615404h R_BE_PLCP_HDR_FLTR_C1
[15:12] R/W 0 B_BE_plcp_rxfa_reset_type Reset BB when specified PPDU type assert false alarm
4'd15 : all ppdu type
4'd0~14 : specified PPDU type
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_plcp_rxfa_reset_en Reset BB when assert false alarm enable
[10:9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_CHK_MIN_LEN CCK/OFDM/HT min length (14Bytes:ACK) check disable
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_HE_SIGB_CRC_CHK HE MU SIGB common part CRC4 check enable
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_VHT_MU_SIGB_CRC_CHK VHT MU SIGB CRC8 check enable
[4] R/W 1 B_BE_VHT_SU_SIGB_CRC_CHK VHT SU SIGB CRC8 check enable
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_SIGA_CRC_CHK HT/VHT SIGA CRC8 & HE SIGA CRC4 check enable
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_LSIG_PARITY_CHK_EN OFDM/HT/VHT/HE rate parity bit check enable
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_CCK_SIG_CHK CCK rate signal field check enable
[0] R/W 1 B_BE_CCK_CRC_CHK CCK rate CRC16 check enable
18615406h R_BE_RXGCK_CTRL_C1
[15:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9:8] R/W 0 B_BE_RXGCK_GCK_RATE_LIMIT PPDU limint of MAC_RX enable clcok / per rxd
0 : CCK only
1 : CCK + OFDM
others : RSVD
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6:4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXGCK_ENTRY_DELAY MAC_RX time delay to gate clock after making the decision.
Unit: T. 0 / 2 / 4 / 8 / 16 / 32 / 64 / 128 T.
[3:2] R/W 3 B_BE_RXGCK_GCK_CYCLE MAC_RX enable clcok / per rxd
0 : 32 cycle / 1 : 64 cycle / 2 : 128 cycle / 3: disable
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXGCK_CCA_EN This bit is set to 1 to let CCA be one of the signals that can wakeup
MAC from Rx_idle
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_DISGCLK Disable macrx clock gating control. Before accessing Rx circuit,
SW needs to set this bit to 1.
18615408h R_BE_RXPSF_CTRL_C1
[31:20] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[19:16] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_PKT_TIME_THR RX packet time of PPDU longer than threshold will trigger invalid_pkt pulse. Unit: us.
0~12:0 / 2 / 4 / 8 / 16 / 32 / 64 / 128 / 256 / 512 / 1024 / 2048 us.
13~15: 0 us.
[15] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[14:12] R/W 7 B_BE_RXPSF_ERRTHR Continuous FCS error packet threshold. Unit: number.
1 / 4 / 8 / 12 / 16 / 20 / 24 / 28 packets.
[11:10] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[9:8] R/W 2 B_BE_INVALID_WIDTH Config invalid_pkt pulse width. Unit: T.
4 / 8 / 16 / 32 T.
[7:5] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_PLCP_CHKEN Set 1 to enable MAC to issue invalid_pkt when PLCP error or interBSS (invalid).
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_BSS_CHKEN This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to consider trigging invalid_pkt as rx packet is inter BSS
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MHCHKEN This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to consider trigging invalid_pkt as rx packet unmatch rate/type/rx filter results
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_CONT_ERRCHKEN This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to inform BB enter power saving mode as continuous rx FCS error packets number in a PPDU is large than the FCS error packet threshold defined by BBPSF_ERRTHR. This function is independent from rate, type and IDs.
[0] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
1861540Ch R_BE_RXPSF_DATA_TYPE_C1
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA15_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1111.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA14_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1110.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA13_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1101.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA12_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1100.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA11_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1011.
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA10_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1010.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA9_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1001.
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA8_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=1000.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA7_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0111.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA6_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0110.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA5_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0101.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA4_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0100.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA3_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0011.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA2_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0010.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA1_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0001.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_DATA_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=10 and subtype=0000.
1861540Eh R_BE_RXPSF_MGT_TYPE_C1
[15] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT15_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1111.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT14_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1110.
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT13_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1101.
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT12_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1100.
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT11_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1011.
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT10_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1010.
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT9_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1001.
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT8_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=1000.
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT7_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0111.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT6_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0110.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT5_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0101.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT4_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0100.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT3_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0011.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT2_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0010.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT1_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0001.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_MGT0_PRSV Set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type=00 and subtype=0000.
18615410h R_BE_RXPSF_CTRL_TYPE_C1
[15:1] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_CTRL_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet Type = 01.
18615412h R_BE_RXPSF_RATE_C1
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HETB_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE TB
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HEMU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE MU
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HEERSU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE ERSU
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HESU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HE SU
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_VHTMU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = VHT MU
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_VHTSU_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = VHT SU
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_HT_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = HT
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_OFDM_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = OFDM
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXPSF_CCK_PRSV This bit is set to 1 to enable MAC to pRSVD rx packet rate = CCK
18615414h R_BE_RXAI_CTRL_C1
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_RXAI_INFO_RST Write 1 to reset the RXAI events
[6] RO 0 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_REL If recca_protect is set to 0 by MAC decision circuit (address/A-MPDU checking), set this bit to 1. Reset by BIT_RXAI_INFO_RST = 1
[5] RO 0 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_VIO If MAC gets BB_reset_MAC pulse when recca_protect = 1, set this bit to 1. Reset by BIT_RXAI_INFO_RST = 1
[4:3] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_rxai_recca_dis 0 : enable phy recca
1 : disable phy recca
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_SEL recca_protect rises at
0: DATA_ON rises
1: MAC header and FCS check done (HW default)
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXAI_PRTCT_EN Set to 1 to enable MAC to inform BB not doing reCCA during receiving the address matched PPDU.
18615418h R_BE_RX_FIFO_STATUS_C1
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_ADDR_CLR addr mode = 2'd0 : write 1 to clear read/write address
addr mode = 2'd1 : write 1 to clear last normail rx mode read/write pointer
addr mode = 2'd2 : write 1 to clear last csi mode read/write pointer
[30] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[29:28] R/W 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_ADDR_MODE 0 : current pointer
1 : last normail rx mode read/write pointer
2.: last csi mode read/write pointer
[27:24] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[23:12] RO 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_RADDR RXD FIFO read pointer
[11:0] RO 0 B_BE_RXDFIFO_WADDR RXD FIFO write pointer
1861541Ch R_BE_RX_FIFO_CTRL_C1
[31:26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_RXS_FIFO_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[24] W1C 0 B_BE_RXD_FIFO_MAX_LEV_CLR clear rxd fifo maximum data level
[23:12] R 0 B_BE_RXD_FIFO_MAX_LEV maximum data level of rxd fifo
[11:0] R/W 0x2ff B_BE_RXD_FIFO_FULL_TH RXD FIFO full threshold
18615420h R_BE_RX_FLTR_OPT_C1
[31:24] R/W 0xf B_BE_UID_FILTER user id filter
[23] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22] R/W 0 B_BE_UNSPT_TYPE unsupported type filter
[21:16] R/W 0x1f B_BE_RX_MPDU_MAX_LEN RX packets upper limit. The unit is 512 bytes. Set to“0", no RX limit is forced.
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_A_FTM_REQ Accept FTM REQ packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_A_ERR_PKT Accept error packets.
Protocol Version set to nonzero.
Encrypted pkts IV to short.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_A_UNSUP_PKT Accept upsupport packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_A_CRC32_ERR Accept CRC32 Error packets.
1: Accept
0: Reject
[10] R/W 0 RSVD Reserved
[9:8] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_RULE Beacon or probe response check rule. Only valid when B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_EN=1
0: A3 hit
1: A2 hit
2: A2 & A3 hit
3: A2 | A3 hit
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_EN Determine whether HW needs to check B_BE_A_BCN_CHK_RULE when receiving beacon or probe response.
1: Need to check
0: No need to check
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_A_MC_LIST_CAM_MATCH Receive specific MC packets. Only valid when B_A_MC=1.
1: Whitelist. If cam_srch_hit=1, this MC packet should be received;
otherwise, drop this packet.
0: Blacklist. If cam_srch_hit=1, this MC packet should be dropped;
otherwise, receive this packet.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BC_CAM_MATCH Determine whether HW need to check cam_srch_hit=1 when receiving BC packets. Only valid when B_A_BC=1.
1: If cam_srch_hit=1, this packet should be received; otherwise, drop this packet.
0: No need to check cam_srch_hit when receiving BC packets
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_A_UC_CAM_MATCH Determine whether HW need to check cam_srch_hit=1 when receiving UC packets. Only valid when B_A_UC=1.
1: If cam_srch_hit=1, this packet should be received; otherwise, drop this packet.
0: No need to check cam_srch_hit when receiving UC packets.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_A_MC 0: Accept
1: Depends on B_BE_A_MC_CAM_MATCH
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_A_BC 0: Accept
1: Depends on B_BE_A_BC_CAM_MATCH.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_A_A1_MATCH 0: Accept
1: If a1_match = 1 depends on B_BE_A_UC_CAM_MATCH; Else Drop.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE Sniffer mode. No matter the result of ADDR_CAM search, all packets will be received.
1: Enable
0: Disable
18615424h R_BE_CTRL_FLTR_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0 B_BE_CTRL_STYPE Every bit maps to ctrl frame sub-type 0 ~ 15.
0: indicates dropping this sub-type
1: indicates receiving this sub-type
18615428h R_BE_MGNT_FLTR_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0xffff B_BE_MGNT_STYPE Every bit maps to mgnt frame sub-type 0 ~ 15.
0: indicates dropping this sub-type
1: indicates receiving this sub-type
1861542Ch R_BE_DATA_FLTR_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W 0xffff B_BE_DATA_STYPE Every bit maps to data frame sub-type 0 ~ 15.
0: indicates dropping this sub-type
1: indicates receiving this sub-type
18615430h R_BE_ZLENDEL_COUNT_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:8] R 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_NUM Delimiter count value of last MPDU
[7:4] R/W 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_NUM_SEL USER select (UID) of B_BE_RXD_DELI_NUM
[3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2:1] R/W 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_UNIT zero length delimiter count unit
2'd0 : 4 Bytes
2'd1 : 16 Bytes
2'd2 : 128 Bytes
2'd3 : 8192 Bytes
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RXD_DELI_EN zero length delimiter count enable
18615434h R_BE_ADDR_CAM_CTRL_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 RSVD
[23:16] R/W 0x7f B_BE_ADDR_CAM_RANGE Indicate how many entries do HW searches, which can be used to decrease HW search time.
[15:12] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_CMPLIMT address cam search limit (timeout)
0 : no limit
limit = 2^[11:8]
[11] R/W 0 RSVD
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_DIS_ADDR_CLK_GATED 1: disable address CAM clock gated
0: enable address CAM clock gated
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_CLR Clear all address CAM contents. Set VALID of all ADDR_CAM entries to 0.
Write '1' to trigger clear and read '0' to check clear done
[7:3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_A2_B0_CHK address cam search enable A2 Bit0 compare
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_SRCH_PERPKT address cam search per MPDU.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_EN Enable address CAM.
1: Enable
0: Disable
18615438h R_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_INFO_C1
[31:24] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_MACID address cam info macid
[23:16] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_SEC_IDX address cam security index
[15] R/W 0 RSVD
[14:12] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_PORT address cam port select
[11] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A3_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A3 not hit
1 : A3 hit
[10] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A2_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A2 not hit
1 : A2 hit
[9] R/W 1 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_A1_HIT address cam A1 hit flag
0 : A1 not hit
1 : A1 hit
[8] R/W 1 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_CAM_HIT address cam hit flag
0 : addr cam not hit
1 : addr cam hit
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_ADDR_CAM_DIS_IDX address cam search report
1861543Ch R_BE_RESPBA_CAM_CTRL_C1
[31:25] R/W 0 RSVD
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_SKIP_ALL_QOSNULL 1: ignore all SN from qosnull
0: just skip qosnull when SN = 0
[23:21] R/W 0 RSVD
[20] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_STD_SSN_SEL The way to decide SSN of BA. (for standard entry initial only)
0: SSN = Rx SN – (window size-1)
1: SSN = Rx SN
[19:18] R/W 0 RSVD
[17:16] R/W 2 B_BE_BACAM_TEMP_SZ temp entry size
2'd0: 256 bitmap
2'd1: 512 bitmap
2'd2: 1024 bitmap
others : rsvd
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_RST_IDX
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_BACAM_SHIFT_POLL Write 1’b1 to trigger HW moving BA CAM control field and BA bitmap content from src_entry_idx (temp) to dest_entry_idx (std).
HW sets to 0 after completion.
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_BACAM_GCK_DIS Disable ba cam clock gating control
[4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_COMPL_VAL Within BA window size, the value of bitmap outside of the range between min. SN and max. SN:
0: set to all 0
1: set to all 1
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_SSN_SEL The way to decide SSN of BA.
0: SSN = max. Rx SN – window size
1: SSN = min. Rx SN
[1:0] W1C 0 B_BE_BACAM_RST 0: no reset
1: reset specific BA CAM entry (indicated in BIT[11:8] B_BE_SRC_ENTRY_IDX)
2: reset all BA CAM entry
3: rsvd
18615440h R_BE_PPDU_STAT_C1
[15:14] R/W 0 RSVD
[13] R/W 0 B_BE_stat_iorst
[12] R/W 0 B_BE_stat_gckdis
[11:10] R/W 0x3 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_WR_BW status report write bandwidth option
2'd0 : 5.12Gbps
2'd1 : 7/(1+7) * 5.12 = 4.48Gbps
2'd2 : 5/(1+5) * 5.12 = 4.267Gbps
2'd3 : 4/(1+4) * 5.12 = 4.096Gbps
[9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_TRIG (For debug use)
Write one would trigger a pulse to HW. HW would send a PPDU status to host/WLCPU. The PHY status in the PPDU status is removed and the others are valid (if has).
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_DMA 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a DMA-OK MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: Always generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT, and don't care whether DMA OK or not.
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_CRC32 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a CRC-OK MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: Always generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT, and don't care whether CRC OK or not.
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_ADDR 1: Only generate PPDU_STATUS_RPT when there is at least a AddressCAM-hit MPDU(HW would ignore this setting when receiving NDP PPDU status)
0: don't care
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_APP_PLCP_HDR_RPT Append PLCP_HDR after MAC_INFO. Only valid when B_BE_APP_MAC_INFO_RPT = 1.
1: Append, 0: Not append.
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_APP_RX_CNT_RPT Append RX_CNT_RPT after MAC_INFO. Only valid when B_BE_APP_MAC_INFO_RPT = 1.
1: Append, 0: Not append.
[1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_RPT_EN Enable PPDU status report function.
1: Enabe, 0: Disable.
18615442h R_BE_PPDU_STAT_ERR_C1
[15:8] RO 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_CNTR PPDU status_counter
[7:0] W1C 0 B_BE_PPDU_STAT_err_flag error flag of status write
[0] : status idle but dma busy & phy status trigger
[1] : input buffer overflow
[2] : status active & phy status trigger
[3]~[7]: RSVD
18615444h R_BE_CH_INFO_QRY_C1
[31:24] RO 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_TIME The period CMAC requests channel info to DMAC
Unit: 1us
[23:21] RO 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_CNT The times of requesting channel info
[20] RO 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_REQUSTING Indicate CMAC has sent the channel info request to DMAC
[19] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_MGNT_FRM 1: Indicate the management frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[18] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_CTRL_FRM 1: Indicate the control frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[17] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_DATA_FRM 1: Indicate the data frame would trigger get-channel-info operation
[16] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_CRC_FAIL 1: Indicate the CRC-fail packet would trigger get-channel-info operation
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_MACID MAC ID of channel info.
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3:1] R/W 0 B_BE_CH_INFO_MODE 0: MACID trigger.
1: MACID + NDPA + NDP trigger.
2: MACID + Sounding PPDU
Else: RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_GET_CH_INFO_EN 1: Start to get channel info if B_BE_CH_INFO_MACID equals received packet.
0: Do not get channel info
18615448h R_BE_MACID_MATCH_C1
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_MACID_MATCH (Valid when B_BE_MACID_MATCH_EN = 1)
The MACID which would trigger mac_id_match signal to BB.
[7:2] R/W 0 RSVD
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_MACID_MATCH_MODE (Valid when B_BE_MACID_MATCH_EN = 1)
0: (smart antenna, check CRC)sends the mac_id_match signal every PPDU
1: (LA mode, DO NOT check CRC)sends the mac_id_match signal every MPDU
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_MACID_MATCH_EN Enable MAC sends the mac_id_match signal to BB. 1: Enable, 0: Disable
1861544Ah R_BE_RX_SR_CTRL_C1
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 B_BE_SR_OP_MODE Set the OP_MODE for Inter/Intra decision use. The OP_MODE is same as
NETYPE.
[3] R/W 0 RSVD
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_SRG_CHK_EN Enable SRG decision module. If this bit = 0, all PPDU decide to non-SRG
PPDU.
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_SR_CTRL_PLCP_EN When this bit enable, 802.11AX Spatial Reuse PLCP RX parsing enable.
Otherwise, all SR RX related decision by MACHDR.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_SR_EN When this bit enable, 802.11AX Spatial Reuse function enable.
1861544Bh R_BE_BSSID_SRC_CTRL_C1
[7:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 1 B_BE_BSSID_MATCH if B_BE_ADDR_CAM_EN = 1 ADDRESSCAM will use MACHDR information to decide BSSID match or not.
If B_BE_ADDR_CAM_EN = 0 ADDRESSCAM will output this bit as a search result.
0: BSSID not match.
1: BSSID match.
[2] R/W 1 B_BE_PARTIAL_AID_MATCH This bit will be set as the result of PATIAL_AID search when B_BE_PLCP_SRC_EN = 0.
0: PATIAL AID not match.
1: PATIAL AID match.
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_BSSCOLOR_MATCH This bit will be set as the result of BSSID_COLOR search when B_BE_PLCP_SRC_EN = 0.
0: BSSID_COLOR not match.
1: BSSID_COLOR match.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PLCP_SRC_EN if this bit is 1 ADDRESSCAM will use PLCP information to decide BSSID_COLOR, PATIAL_AID match or not.
if this bit is 0 ADDRESSCAM will output B_BE_BSSCOLOR_MATCH and B_BE_PARTIAL_AID_MATCH as search results
1861544Ch R_BE_SR_OBSS_PD_C1
[31:24] R/W 0xC0 B_BE_SRG_OBSS_PD_MAX For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -62dbm + SRG OBSS PD Max Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[23:16] R/W 0x70 B_BE_SRG_OBSS_PD_MIN For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -82dbm + SRG OBSS PD Min Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[15:8] R/W 0xC0 B_BE_NONSRG_OBSS_PD_MAX For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -62dbm + Non-SRG OBSS PD Max Offset which in Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
[7:0] R/W 0x70 B_BE_NONSRG_OBSS_PD_MIN For Spatial Reuse RPL calculation used. This field is equals -82dbm.
18615450h R_BE_SR_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
18615454h R_BE_SR_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
18615458h R_BE_SR_PARTIAL_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
1861545Ch R_BE_SR_PARTIAL_BSSCOLOR_BITMAP_H_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP_H For Spatial Reuse SRG/non-SRG decision used. When STA associated with
AP. Fill the R_SR_PARTIAL_BSSID_BITMAP from Spatial Reuse Parameter Set element.
18615460h R_BE_SCOPE_CTRL_C1
[31:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:8] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_LEN sgement length (Unit : 1K *2^[7:4])
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:4] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_FILTER scope packet target
0 : drop
1 : to host
2 : to WLCPU
3 : rsvd
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_APPZERO scope mode append zero when data is not enough
[2:0] R/W 0 B_BE_SCOPE_MODE scope mode
0 : disable
1 : BB scope
2 : MAC RXD dump
3 : MAC PSDU segment
18615464h R_BE_CSIRPT_OPTION_C1
[31] R 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_CHKSUM_ERROR Indicate MAC Rx csi rpt checksum error
[30] R 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_BBLEN_LT_MAC Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number underflow
[29] R 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_BBLEN_GT_MAC Indicate MAC Rx csi rxd number overflow
[28:26] R/W 0 RSVD
[25] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIPRT_HESU_AID_EN 0:check AID 1:bypass HE NONTB SU AID check
[24] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIPRT_VHTSU_AID_EN 0:check AID 1:bypass VHT SU AID check
[23:16] R/W 0x20 B_BE_CSIRPT_FIFO_RESUME_THR mac resume csi data when fifo data last than threshold
[15:8] R/W 0xA0 B_BE_CSIRPT_FIFO_PAUSE_THR mac pause csi data when fifo data more than threshold
[7] R/W 0 RSVD
[6] R/W 1 B_BE_CSIRPT_LEN_MISMATCH destory fcs when bb length mismatch rdrdy number
[5] R/W 1 B_BE_CSIRPT_DMAFULL_IGNORE pause data write when dma assert fifo full
[4:3] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_FILTER CSI report filter
0 : drop
1 : To Host
2 : To WLCPU
3 : Rsvd
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_CHECKSUM_DIS Disable CSI checksum
[1] R/W 1 B_BE_CSIRPT_EMPTY_APPZERO Append zero if csi data from BB is sharter than mac expectation
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_CSIRPT_NDPPLCP_CHK_EN NDP PLCP check enable
18615468h R_BE_BSR_UPD_CTRL_C1
[31:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_QSIZE_UPD If received Queue Size Subfield = 255,
0: report queue size 0 to STA_SCH (ac_type follows TID subfield of OoS ctrl)
1: ignore to report queue size
1861546Ch R_BE_WMRX_LA_EVENT_OPTION_C1
[31:17] RW 0 RSVD
[16] RW 1'h0 B_BE_dbg_ignore_unexprx 1: ignore unexpected rx
0: do nothing
[15:6] RW 0 RSVD
[5:4] RW 2'h0 B_BE_lastop_cont_fcs_error stop LA record when continue fcs error > threshold
0 : disable
1 : 4
2 : 8
3 : 16
[3] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_rx_fsm_hang stop LA record when FSM timeout
[2] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_rx_self_rst stop LA record when RX self reset
[1] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_plcp_error stop LA record when RX PLCP with parity or CRC error
[0] RW 1'h0 B_BE_lastop_plcp_incomp stop LA record when RX PLCP content is incompleted
18615470h R_BE_DRV_INFO_OPTION_C1
[31:1] R/W 0 RSVD
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_DRV_INFO_PHYRPT_EN Fill phy report into driver informatation (first 32 bytes)
18615480h R_BE_BCN_PSR_CTRL_C1
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_MLT_PARSER_EN Multi-Link Traffic element parsing enable. 1:Enable. 0:Disable.
[7:4] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_HIT_INT_PORT Port selection of RX BCN HIT INT of band 0.
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_INT_EN 1: Issue INT if BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_TIM_PARSER_EN 1: Enable RX Beacon TIM Parser of band 0.
18615482h R_BE_BCN_IECAM_CTRL_C1
[15] RO 0 B_BE_BCN_PSR_BUSY 1: Beacon parser is busy. 0: idle.
[14] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_IORST 0: io related function reset with register only
1: io related function reset with register & fuction enable
[13:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:10] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_NOHIT_FRWD Forwarding selection when BCN IE no hit in band 0.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[9:8] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_HIT_FRWD Forwarding selection when BCN IE hit in band 0.
0: Drop.
1: To host driver.
2: To WLAN CPU.
3: RSVD.
[7:4] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_PORT Port selection of BCN IE CAM of band 0.
[3] W1C 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_CLR
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_NOHIT_FRWD_EN 1: Enable BCN forwarding overwrites when IE no hit in band 0. 0: Disable.
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_HIT_FRWD_EN 1: Enable BCN forwarding overwrites when IE hit in band 0. 0: Disable.
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCN_IECAM_EN 1: Enable BCN IE CAM detection of band 0. 0: Disable.
18615484h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P0_C1
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P0 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P0 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P0 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P0 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P0 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P0 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P0 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P0 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 0.
18615488h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P1_C1
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P1 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P1 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P1 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P1 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P1 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P1 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P1 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P1 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 1.
1861548Ch R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P2_C1
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P2 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P2 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P2 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P2 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P2 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P2 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P2 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P2 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 2.
18615490h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P3_C1
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P3 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P3 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P3 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P3 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P3 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P3 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P3 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P3 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 3.
18615494h R_BE_BCN_PSR_RPT_P4_C1
[31:24] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_CNT_P4 DTIM count field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[23:16] R 0 B_BE_DTIM_PERIOD_P4 DTIM period field of the TIM element of RX BCN
[15] R 0 B_BE_BCAID_HIT_P4 1: Broadcast AID is hit in PVB or BitmapControl field of RX BCN
[14] R 0 B_BE_UNIAID_HIT_P4 1: Unicast AID bit is hit in PVB field of RX BCN
[13] R 0 B_BE_IE_HIT_P4 1: BCN IE is hit by BCN IE CAM
[12] R 0 B_BE_TIM_ILEGAL_P4 1: TIM IE is illegal.
[11] W1C 0 B_BE_RPT_VALID_P4 1: BCN parser report is valid. 0: invalid. Write 1 to clear report value (bit [31:11]).
[10:0] R/W 0 B_BE_BCAID_P4 Broadcast AID of band 0 port 4.
18615498h R_BE_MLT_RPT0_C1
[31] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P3 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 3.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[30] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P3 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 3.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[29:24] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_P3 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 3. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
[23] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P2 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 2.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[22] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P2 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 2.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[21:16] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_P2 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 2. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
[15] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P1 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 1.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[14] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P1 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 1.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[13:8] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_P1 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 1. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
[7] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P0 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 0.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[6] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P0 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 0.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[5:0] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_MLT_RPT_P0 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 0. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
1861549Ch R_BE_MLT_RPT1_C1
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[7] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_RPT_VALID_P4 Multi-Link Traffic element parser report indication of Port 4.
1: Report is valid
0: Report is invalid
[6] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_IE_EXIST_P4 Multi-Link Traffic element exist indication of Port 4.
1: BCN with MLT IE.
0: BCN without MLT IE.
[5:0] RO 0 B_BE_MLT_MLT_RPT_P4 Multi-Link Traffic indication bitmap report of Port 4. Each bit corresponds to a link.
BIT 0: Link 0
BIT 1: Link 1
…
BIT 5: Link 5
186154A0h R_BE_PS_RXINFO_C1
[31:15] R/W 0 rsvd
[14] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P4_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[13] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P4_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[12] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P4_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[11] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P3_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[10] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P3_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[9] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P3_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[8] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P2_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[7] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P2_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[6] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P2_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[5] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P1_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[4] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P1_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[3] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P1_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[2] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P0_RXCTRL It is set to 1 if NIC received ctrl frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[1] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P0_RXMGT It is set to 1 if NIC received mgnt frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
[0] R/W1C 0 B_BE_P0_RXDATA It is set to 1 if NIC received data frame with correct BSSID and DA (including unicast and BMC).
186154ACh R_BE_PWRINT_CTRL_C1
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_SEQNUM_MACID The sequence number for the selected macid for power bit check[19:16] is the segment
[15:8] R/W 0 B_BE_REF_MACID the selected macid to check the seqnumber of the power bit
[7:1] R/W 0 RSVD rsvd
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_PWRINT_EN When this bit set, HW auto detect power state per MACID by check every RX packets. And HW will fill power state to power state register. If power state change, generate interrupt to host.
186154B0h R_BE_SPWR0_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_31to0 MICID 31 ~ 0 power bit value
186154B4h R_BE_SPWR1_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_63to32 MICID 63 ~ 32 power bit value
186154B8h R_BE_SPWR2_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_95o64 MICID 95 ~ 64 power bit value
186154BCh R_BE_SPWR3_C1
[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_127to96 MICID 127 ~ 96 power bit value
186154C0h R_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_CTRL_C1
[31:4] R/W 0 RSVD
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_AID3_ENABLE Enable bit for fourth AID register
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_AID2_ENABLE Enable bit for third AID register
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_AID1_ENABLE Enable bit for second AID register
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_AID0_ENABLE Enable bit for first AID register
186154C4h R_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_CFG0_C1
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_AID1 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 1.
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD
186154C8h R_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_CFG1_C1
[31:28] R/W 0 RSVD
[27:16] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_AID3 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 0.
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD
[11:0] R/W 0 B_BE_SNIFFER_MODE_AID2 It is used for SW or FW to fill the AID, which it want to capture the specific station 0.
186154CCh R_BE_RPL_CFG_C1
[31] R/W 0 B_BE_rplcfg_uppeB_BE_en repleace upper 80M RPL for BW = 80M + 80M
[30:25] RW 0 RSVD
[24:16] RW 0 B_BE_rplcfg_uppeB_BE_dbm b"[8:0] = upper RPL dBm/(20Mhz*path) + 110 unit : dbm
repleace RPL from BB when [31] = 1
[15] RW 0 B_BE_rplcfg_en rpl repleace enable for BW <= 80 M
[14:9] RW 0 RSVD
[8:0] RW 0 B_BE_rplcfg_dbm b"[8:0] = RPL dBm/(20Mhz*path) + 110 unit : dbm
repleace RPL from BB when [15] = 1
186154D0h R_BE_RX_TO_BRK_OPT_C1
[31:30] R/W 0 RSVD
[29:24] RW 3 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_frmtype pause parser when match specific frame type
[23:22] RW 0 RSVD
[21] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_beacon pause parser when reecive beacon
[20] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_trigger pause parser when reecive trigger
[19] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_bar pause parser when reecive bar
[18] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_ba pause parser when reecive ba
[17:16] RW 0 B_BE_rxpsr_pause_mode pause parser dependent on frame type
00 : disable
01 : 1/2 * 80M * 64bit = 2.56Gbps
10 : 1/3 * 80M * 64bit = 1.706Gbps
11 : 1/4 * 80M * 64bit = 1.28Gbps
[15:13] RW 0 RSVD
[12:8] RW 0 B_BE_rxbrk_tb_time RX TB will drop remain data in 2p ram when break timeout
5'd0 : disable others : unit us
[7:4] RW 0 RSVD
[3:0] RW 0 B_BE_rxbrk_time RX will drop remain data in 2p ram when break timeout (except TB)
4'd0 : disable others : unit us
186154E0h R_BE_RX_DBG_CNT_SEL_C1
[31:16] RO 0 B_BE_RX_DBG_CNT The counter value corresponding to B_BE_RX_CNT_IDX.
[15:9] R/W 0 RSVD
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_RXERR_RPT_RST Write “one” to set the counter to zero.
[7:6] R/W 0 RSVD
[5:0] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_CNT_IDX 6'd0: OFDM MPDU OK counter
6'd1: OFDM MPDU Fail counter
6'd2: OFDM PPDU OK counter
6'd3: OFDM False Alarm counter
6'd4: CCK MPDU OK counter
6'd5: CCK MPDU Fail counter
6'd6: CCK PPDU counter
6'd7: CCK False Alarm counter
6'd8: HT MPDU OK counter
6'd9: HT MPDU Fail counter
6'd10: HT PPDU counter
6'd11: HT False Alarm counter
6'd12: VHT SU MPDU OK counter
6'd13: VHT SU MPDU Fail counter
6'd14: VHT SU PPDU counter
6'd15: VHT SU False Alarm counter
6'd16: VHT MU MPDU OK counter
6'd17: VHT MU MPDU Fail counter
6'd18: VHT MU PPDU counter
6'd19: VHT MU False Alarm counter
6'd20: HE SU MPDU OK counter
6'd21: HE SU MPDU Fail counter
6'd22: HE SU PPDU counter
6'd23: HE SU False Alarm counter
6'd24: HE MU MPDU OK counter
6'd25: HE MU MPDU Fail counter
6'd26: HE MU PPDU counter
6'd27: HE MU False Alarm counter
6'd28: HE TB MPDU OK counter
6'd29: HE TB MPDU Fail counter
6'd30: HE TB PPDU counter
6'd31: HE TB False Alarm counter
6'd32: EHT MU_SU FCS OK
6'd33: EHT MU_SU FCS FAIL
6'd34: EHT MU_SU PPDU (PLCP ok)
6'd35: EHT MU_SU PLCP False Alarm
6'd36: EHT MU FCS OK
6'd37: EHT MU FCS FAIL
6'd38: EHT MU PPDU (PLCP ok)
6'd39: EHT MU PLCP False alarm
6'd40: EHT TB FCS OK
6'd41: EHT TB FCS FAIL
6'd42: EHT TB PPDU (PLCP ok)
6'd43: EHT MU PLCP False Alarm
6'd44: Invalid packet counter
6'd45: PHY RECCA
6'd46: RXD overflow
6'd47: RX packet full drop
6'd48: RX packet DMA OK
6'd49: RX packet address filter drop
6'd50: RX packet type/subtype + length filter drop
6'd51: RX NDP PPDU counter
6'd52: user define 0 counter
6'd53: user define 1 counter
6'd54: user define 2 counter
6'd55: user define 3 counter
6'd56: user define 4 counter
6'd57: user define 5 counter
6'd58: user define 6 counter
6'd59: user define 7 counter
6'd60: user define 8 counter
6'd61: user define 9 counter
6'd62: user define 10 counter
6'd63: user define 11 counter
186154E4h R_BE_RX_CNT_RPT_CFG_C1
[31] W1C 0 B_BE_UD_W1S write 1 to set user define counter
[30:28] $W 0 B_BE_UD_CNT_MODE UD_MODE:
3'd0: specific user counter
3'd1: plcp error
3'd2: RSVD
3'd3: RSVD
3'd4: Host define
3'd5: HW debug
3'd6: RX parser counter (per RX reset)
3'd7: PPDU status
others: RSVD
[27] $W 0 RSVD RSVD
[26] $W 0 B_BE_UD_MSK_PORT 1: Ignore B_BE_UD_PORT
0: Do not ignore B_BE_UD_PORT
[25] $W 0 B_BE_UD_MSK_TYPE 1: Ignore B_BE_UD_TYPE and B_BE_UD_FRM_SUB_T YPE
0: Do not ignore B_BE_UD_ TYPE and B_BE_UD_FRM_SUB_T YPE
[24] $W 0 B_BE_UD_MSK_RATE 1: Ignore B_BE_UD_RATE
0: Do not ignore B_BE_UD_RATE
[23] $W 0 RSVD RSVD
[22:20] $W 0 B_BE_UD_PORT User defined: Port
[19:18] $W 0 RSVD RSVD
[17:16] $W 0 B_BE_UD_FRM_SUB_TYPE User defined: Sub_Type
[15:12] $W 0 B_BE_UD_FRM_TYPE User defined: Type
[11:0] $W 0 B_BE_UD_RATE B_BE_UD_RATE[12:8] = mode_ctrl,
B_BE_UD_RATE[7:0] = CCK+OFDM index[3:0] or HT
index[4:0] / SS[7:5] + mcs index[4:0]
186154E8h R_BE_RX_PLCP_MON_C1
[31:28] RW 0 B_BE_RX_PLCP_MON_SEL RX PLCP content select
[27:0] $RO 0 B_BE_RX_PLCP_CONT RX PLCP content
[27:24] : ppdu type
[23:0] : PLCP content
186154ECh R_BE_RX_TIME_MON_C1
[31:28] R 0 B_BE_DMA_WR_TIME maximum time of Rx write dma fifo (us)
[27:24] R/W 0 B_BE_DMA_WR_TIMEOUT timeout value of dma access (us). 0: timeout disable
[23:22] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[21:16] R/W 0x20 B_BE_INTF_TIMEOUT_THR timeout value of rx interface (ms). 0: timeout disable
[15:12] R/W 0 RSVD RSVD
[11:8] R 0 B_BE_LATENCY_TIME maximum time of data_on raising to rx idle time (us)
[7:0] R 0 B_BE_CCA2DAT_TIME maximum time of cca raising to data_on raising (us)
186154F0h R_BE_RX_STATE_MONITOR_C1
[31:16] $RO 0 B_BE_STATE_CUR current state
[15:14] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_EXSEL parser internal select
2'd0~2 : mpdu write
2'd3 : segement control
[13:8] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_NXT sw configure state
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_STATE_UPD write 1 to overwrite current state
[6:5] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_MODE 2'd0 : write state immediately
2'd1 : continue write until state match
2'd2 : continue write until state match when rx PSDU
2'd3 : RSVD
[4:0] R/W 0 B_BE_STATE_SEL module select
5'd0 : macrx_ctl
5'd1 : macrx_in
5'd2 : macrx_rxd_fifo
5'd3 : macrx_plcp
5'd4 : macrx_protocol
5'd5 : macrx_dma_intf
5'd6 : macrx_sts_write
5'd7~15 : rsvd
5'd16~31 : parser - user0~15
186154F4h R_BE_RX_ERR_ISR_C1
[31:10] W1C 0 RSVD
[9] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_TRIG_ACT_TO rx trigger state time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[8] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_STS_ACT_TO rx status write state time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[7] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CSI_ACT_TO rx state csi mode time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[6] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_ACT_TO rx state active time out (ms) >= r_fsm_timeout_thr
[5] W1C 0 B_BE_CSI_DATAON_ASSERT_TO csi_data_on assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[4] W1C 0 B_BE_DATAON_ASSERT_TO data_on assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[3] W1C 0 B_BE_CCA_ASSERT_TO cca assert time >= (0xCEEC[21:16] : r_intf_timeout_thr)
[2] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DMA_TO rxdma access time out (us) , start from dma_wreq = 1 , clear by dma_wgnt
[1] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DATA_TO rx dead lock protect time out (us) , start from cca falling
[0] W1C 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CCA_TO rx dead lock protect time out (us) , start from data_on falling
186154F8h R_BE_RX_ERR_IMR_C1
[31:10] R/W 0 RSVD
[9] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_TRIG_ACT_TO_MSK
[8] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_STS_ACT_TO_MSK
[7] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CSI_ACT_TO_MSK
[6] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_ACT_TO_MSK
[5] R/W 0 B_BE_CSI_DATAON_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[4] R/W 0 B_BE_DATAON_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[3] R/W 0 B_BE_CCA_ASSERT_TO_MSK
[2] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DMA_TO_MSK
[1] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_DATA_TO_MSK
[0] R/W 0 B_BE_RX_ERR_CCA_TO_MSK
186154FCh R_BE_RX_DEBUG_SELECT_C1
[31:8] R/W 0 RSVD
[7:0] R/W 0 B_BE_DEBUG_SEL [7:3] : module select
0 : macrx_ctl
1 : macrx_in
2 : macrx_rxd_fifo
3 : macrx_plcp
4 : macrx_protocol
5 : macrx_dma_intf
6 : macrx_sts_write
7 : rsvd
8 : parser - user0
9 : parser - user1
10 : parser - user2
11 : parser - user3

[2:0] : sub module/dbg select
18615500h R_BE_WMRX_RCR_EXT_OPTION_C1
[31:16] R/W 0 RSVD
[15:0] R/W FFFF B_BE_EXT_CH valid when R_BE_CH_EN = 1
18615510h R_BE_RX_PLCP_EXT_OPTION_0_C1
[15:0] RW 0 B_BE_plcp_cont_chk_bypass bypass plcp content check (check RX LTF only)
[31:16] RW 0 B_BE_plcp_uid_chk_en check CCK/LSIG/SIGA/SIGB and other RX info UID (extcept RX LTF info) according PPDU type
18615514h R_BE_RX_PLCP_EXT_OPTION_1_C1
[31:20] RW 0 RSVD
[19] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_UNSPUUORT terminate rx when UID RX LTF.unsupport = 1
[18] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_BB_BRK terminate rx when UID RX LTF.brk_before_datafield = 1
[17] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_PSDU_PRES terminate rx when UID RX LTF.psdu_pres = 1
[16] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CLOSE_RX_NDP terminate rx when ppdu type is ndp
[15:12] RW 0 RSVD
[11] RW 0 B_BE_plcp_nss_src PPDU Number of Spatial steam source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[10] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_DOPPLEB_BE_SRC PPDU Doppler source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[9] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_STBC_SRC PPDU stbc source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[8] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_SU_PSDU_LEN_SRC PPDU with single user PSDU length source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[7] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_RXSB_SRC RX Sub band source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : RX INFO
[6:5] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_BW_SRC RX bandwidth source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : RX INFO
2 : PLCP content
[4] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_GILTF_SRC GI and LTF source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[3] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_NSTS_SRC Number of spatial stream source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[2] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_MCS_SRC mcs index source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : PLCP content
[1] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_CH20_WIDATA_SRC channel 20M with data source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX LTF
1 : RX INFO
[0] RW 0 B_BE_PLCP_PPDU_TYPE_SRC PPDU type source from BB redefine (UID RX LTF info)
0 : RX INFO
1 : RX LTF
18615518h R_BE_RX_PLCP_EXT_OPTION_2_C1
[31:4] RW 0 RSVD
[3] RW 1 B_BE_EHTTB_EHTSIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_TB EHTSIG CRC check enable
[2] RW 1 B_BE_EHTTB_USIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_TB USIG CRC4 check enable
[1] RW 1 B_BE_EHTMU_EHTSIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_MU EHTSIG CRC check enable
[0] RW 1 B_BE_EHTMU_USIG_CRC_CHK_EN EHT_MU USIG CRC4 check enable
18615520h R_BE_RXFILTER_EXT_OPTION_0_C1
[31:3] RW 0 RSVD
[2] RW 0 B_BE_A_BCN_IE_NOHIT accept beacon when IE cam is no hit
[1] RW 0 B_BE_A_BCN_IE_HIT accept beacon when IE cam is hit
[0] RW 0 B_BE_BCN_IE_FILTER_EN accept beacon or not will reference IE CAM result

[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_159to128 MICID 159~128 power bit value

[31:0] R/W 0 B_BE_MID_223to192 MICID 223~192 power bit value
